---
title: "Untitled"
output: html_document
date: "2025-04-14"
---
#Importation
##DAG direct + tab coef direct
```{r }
rm(list=ls()) 

setwd("C:/Users/u237004/Documents/1_Boulot_SC/2_Papier Pan/Work/MM/8_Graph/")

#Libraries
library(data.table) #is used to import and manipulate tables
library(ggplot2)
library(qgraph)
library(igraph)

library(ggraph)
library(tidyverse)
#Tableau,pour tous les continents, toutes les variables réponse, effet total env sur chaque variable réponse (attributs et AGBs)
mean_coef_all_all<-fread("mean_coef_all_all.csv")
rmse_mean_all_all<-fread("rmse_mean_all_all.csv")
rmse_mean_all_all<-rmse_mean_all_all[,.(rmse=mean(rmse),rsquared=mean(r_squared)),by=c("sub_rep","area")]
#je dois encore inverser pour avoir est en colonne, avec meancoef2
essais<-dcast(mean_coef_all_all,sub_rep + area + var~est,value.var="mean_coef2")

#Effet direct Env sur BA
mean_coef_ba<-fread("mean_coef_ba_dbh_sd.csv")
rmse_mean_ba<-fread("rmse_mean_ba_dbh_sd.csv")
rmse_mean_ba<-rmse_mean_ba[,.(rmse=mean(rmse),rsquared=mean(r_squared)),by=c("sub_rep","area")]
#je dois encore inverser pour avoir est en colonne, avec meancoef2
essais2<-dcast(mean_coef_ba,sub_rep + area + var~est,value.var="mean_coef2")

#Effet direct env sur DBHqm
mean_coef_dbh<-fread("mean_coef_dbh_sd.csv")
rmse_mean_dbh<-fread("rmse_mean_dbh_sd.csv")
rmse_mean_dbh<-rmse_mean_dbh[,.(rmse=mean(rmse),rsquared=mean(r_squared)),by=c("sub_rep","area")]
#je dois encore inverser pour avoir est en colonne, avec meancoef2
essais3<-dcast(mean_coef_dbh,sub_rep + area + var~est,value.var="mean_coef2")


#Effet direct env sur DBHqm
mean_coef_wdba<-fread("mean_coef_wdba_ba.csv")
rmse_mean_wdba<-fread("rmse_mean_wdba_ba.csv")
rmse_mean_wdba<-rmse_mean_wdba[,.(rmse=mean(rmse),rsquared=mean(r_squared)),by=c("sub_rep","area")]
#je dois encore inverser pour avoir est en colonne, avec meancoef2
essais2bis<-dcast(mean_coef_wdba,sub_rep + area + var~est,value.var="mean_coef2")

#Effet direct attributs sur AGB
mean_coef_agb<-fread("mean_coef_agb.csv")
rmse_mean_agb<-fread("rmse_mean_agb.csv")
rmse_mean_agb<-rmse_mean_agb[,.(rmse=mean(rmse),rsquared=mean(r_squared)),by=c("sub_rep","area")]
#je dois encore inverser pour avoir est en colonne, avec meancoef2
essais4<-dcast(mean_coef_agb,sub_rep + area + var~est,value.var="mean_coef2")


#Effet direct attributs sur AGB
mean_coef_agb_all<-fread("mean_coef_agb_all.csv")
rmse_mean_agb_all<-fread("rmse_mean_agb_all.csv")
rmse_mean_agb_all<-rmse_mean_agb_all[,.(rmse=mean(rmse),rsquared=mean(r_squared)),by=c("sub_rep","area")]
#je dois encore inverser pour avoir est en colonne, avec meancoef2
essais4bis<-dcast(mean_coef_agb_all,sub_rep + area + var~est,value.var="mean_coef2")

#Effet total attributs sur AGB
mean_coef_agb_sd<-fread("mean_coef_agb_sd.csv")
rmse_mean_agb_sd<-fread("rmse_mean_agb_sd.csv")
rmse_mean_agb_sd<-rmse_mean_agb_sd[,.(rmse=mean(rmse),rsquared=mean(r_squared)),by=c("sub_rep","area")]
#je dois encore inverser pour avoir est en colonne, avec meancoef2
essais5<-dcast(mean_coef_agb_sd,sub_rep + area + var~est,value.var="mean_coef2")

mean_coef_agb_dbh_sd<-fread("mean_coef_agb_dbh_sd.csv")
rmse_mean_agb_dbh_sd<-fread("rmse_mean_agb_dbh_sd.csv")
rmse_mean_agb_dbh_sd<-rmse_mean_agb_dbh_sd[,.(rmse=mean(rmse),rsquared=mean(r_squared)),by=c("sub_rep","area")]
#je dois encore inverser pour avoir est en colonne, avec meancoef2
essais6<-dcast(mean_coef_agb_dbh_sd,sub_rep + area + var~est,value.var="mean_coef2")

mean_coef_agb_wdba<-fread("mean_coef_agb_wdba.csv")
rmse_mean_agb_wdba<-fread("rmse_mean_agb_wdba.csv")
rmse_mean_agb_wdba<-rmse_mean_agb_wdba[,.(rmse=mean(rmse),rsquared=mean(r_squared)),by=c("sub_rep","area")]
#je dois encore inverser pour avoir est en colonne, avec meancoef2
essais7<-dcast(mean_coef_agb_wdba,sub_rep + area + var~est,value.var="mean_coef2")


##Africa avec Proportion####################################################################################################################################################

#Tableau,pour tous les continents, toutes les variables réponse, effet total env sur chaque variable réponse (attributs et AGBs)
mean_coef_all_all_af<-fread("mean_coef_all_all_af.csv")
rmse_mean_all_all_af<-fread("rmse_mean_all_all_af.csv")
rmse_mean_all_all_af<-rmse_mean_all_all_af[,.(rmse=mean(rmse),rsquared=mean(r_squared)),by=c("sub_rep","area")]
#je dois encore inverser pour avoir est en colonne, avec meancoef2
essais_af<-dcast(mean_coef_all_all_af,sub_rep + area + var~est,value.var="mean_coef2")

#Effet direct Env sur BA
mean_coef_ba_af<-fread("mean_coef_ba_dbh_sd_af.csv")
rmse_mean_ba_af<-fread("rmse_mean_ba_dbh_sd_af.csv")
rmse_mean_ba_af<-rmse_mean_ba_af[,.(rmse=mean(rmse),rsquared=mean(r_squared)),by=c("sub_rep","area")]
#je dois encore inverser pour avoir est en colonne, avec meancoef2
essais2_af<-dcast(mean_coef_ba_af,sub_rep + area + var~est,value.var="mean_coef2")

#Effet direct env sur DBHqm
mean_coef_dbh_af<-fread("mean_coef_dbh_sd_af.csv")
rmse_mean_dbh_af<-fread("rmse_mean_dbh_sd_af.csv")
rmse_mean_dbh_af<-rmse_mean_dbh_af[,.(rmse=mean(rmse),rsquared=mean(r_squared)),by=c("sub_rep","area")]
#je dois encore inverser pour avoir est en colonne, avec meancoef2
essais3_af<-dcast(mean_coef_dbh_af,sub_rep + area + var~est,value.var="mean_coef2")


#Effet direct env sur DBHqm
mean_coef_wdba_af<-fread("mean_coef_wdba_ba_af.csv")
rmse_mean_wdba_af<-fread("rmse_mean_wdba_ba_af.csv")
rmse_mean_wdba_af<-rmse_mean_wdba_af[,.(rmse=mean(rmse),rsquared=mean(r_squared)),by=c("sub_rep","area")]
#je dois encore inverser pour avoir est en colonne, avec meancoef2
essais2bis_af<-dcast(mean_coef_wdba_af,sub_rep + area + var~est,value.var="mean_coef2")


#Effet direct attributs sur AGB
mean_coef_agb_af<-fread("mean_coef_agb_af.csv")
rmse_mean_agb_af<-fread("rmse_mean_agb_af.csv")
rmse_mean_agb_af<-rmse_mean_agb_af[,.(rmse=mean(rmse),rsquared=mean(r_squared)),by=c("sub_rep","area")]
#je dois encore inverser pour avoir est en colonne, avec meancoef2
essais4_af<-dcast(mean_coef_agb_af,sub_rep + area + var~est,value.var="mean_coef2")


#Effet direct attributs sur AGB
mean_coef_agb_all_af<-fread("mean_coef_agb_all_af.csv")
rmse_mean_agb_all_af<-fread("rmse_mean_agb_all_af.csv")
rmse_mean_agb_all_af<-rmse_mean_agb_all_af[,.(rmse=mean(rmse),rsquared=mean(r_squared)),by=c("sub_rep","area")]
#je dois encore inverser pour avoir est en colonne, avec meancoef2
essais4bis_af<-dcast(mean_coef_agb_all_af,sub_rep + area + var~est,value.var="mean_coef2")

#Effet total attributs sur AGB
mean_coef_agb_sd_af<-fread("mean_coef_agb_sd_af.csv")
rmse_mean_agb_sd_af<-fread("rmse_mean_agb_sd_af.csv")
rmse_mean_agb_sd_af<-rmse_mean_agb_sd_af[,.(rmse=mean(rmse),rsquared=mean(r_squared)),by=c("sub_rep","area")]
#je dois encore inverser pour avoir est en colonne, avec meancoef2
essais5_af<-dcast(mean_coef_agb_sd_af,sub_rep + area + var~est,value.var="mean_coef2")

mean_coef_agb_dbh_sd_af<-fread("mean_coef_agb_dbh_sd_af.csv")
rmse_mean_agb_dbh_sd_af<-fread("rmse_mean_agb_dbh_sd_af.csv")
rmse_mean_agb_dbh_sd_af<-rmse_mean_agb_dbh_sd_af[,.(rmse=mean(rmse),rsquared=mean(r_squared)),by=c("sub_rep","area")]
#je dois encore inverser pour avoir est en colonne, avec meancoef2
essais6_af<-dcast(mean_coef_agb_dbh_sd_af,sub_rep + area + var~est,value.var="mean_coef2")

mean_coef_agb_wdba_af<-fread("mean_coef_agb_wdba_af.csv")
rmse_mean_agb_wdba_af<-fread("rmse_mean_agb_wdba_af.csv")
rmse_mean_agb_wdba_af<-rmse_mean_agb_wdba_af[,.(rmse=mean(rmse),rsquared=mean(r_squared)),by=c("sub_rep","area")]
#je dois encore inverser pour avoir est en colonne, avec meancoef2
essais7_af<-dcast(mean_coef_agb_wdba_af,sub_rep + area + var~est,value.var="mean_coef2")

mean_coef_agb_prop_af<-fread("mean_coef_agb_prop_af.csv")
rmse_mean_agb_prop_af<-fread("rmse_mean_agb_prop_af.csv")
rmse_mean_agb_prop_af<-rmse_mean_agb_prop_af[,.(rmse=mean(rmse),rsquared=mean(r_squared)),by=c("sub_rep","area")]
#je dois encore inverser pour avoir est en colonne, avec meancoef2
essais8_af<-dcast(mean_coef_agb_prop_af,sub_rep + area + var~est,value.var="mean_coef2")

#############################################################################################################################################################################

essais[,unique(area)]
essais[area=="north America",area:="north_america"]
essais[area=="Oceania",area:="oceania"]

essais2[,unique(area)]
essais2[area=="North America",area:="north_america"]
essais2[area=="Oceania",area:="oceania"]

essais2bis[,unique(area)]
essais2bis[area=="North America",area:="north_america"]
essais2bis[area=="Oceania",area:="oceania"]

essais3[,unique(area)]
essais3[area=="North America",area:="north_america"]
essais3[area=="Oceania",area:="oceania"]


essais4[,unique(area)]
essais4[area=="North America",area:="north_america"]
essais4[area=="Oceania",area:="oceania"]

essais4bis[,unique(area)]
essais4bis[area=="North America",area:="north_america"]
essais4bis[area=="Oceania",area:="oceania"]


essais5[,unique(area)]
essais5[area=="North America",area:="north_america"]
essais5[area=="Oceania",area:="oceania"]

essais6[,unique(area)]
essais6[area=="North America",area:="north_america"]
essais6[area=="Oceania",area:="oceania"]

essais7[,unique(area)]
essais7[area=="North America",area:="north_america"]
essais7[area=="Oceania",area:="oceania"]

rmse_mean_agb_all[area=="North America",area:="north_america"]
rmse_mean_agb_all_af[area=="North America",area:="north_america"]
rmse_mean_agb[area=="North America",area:="north_america"]
rmse_mean_agb_af[area=="North America",area:="north_america"]
rmse_mean_agb_dbh_sd[area=="North America",area:="north_america"]
rmse_mean_agb_dbh_sd_af[area=="North America",area:="north_america"]
rmse_mean_agb_sd[area=="North America",area:="north_america"]
rmse_mean_agb_sd_af[area=="North America",area:="north_america"]
rmse_mean_all_all[area=="north America",area:="north_america"]
rmse_mean_all_all_af[area=="North America",area:="north_america"]
rmse_mean_ba[area=="North America",area:="north_america"]
rmse_mean_ba_af[area=="North America",area:="north_america"]
rmse_mean_dbh[area=="North America",area:="north_america"]
rmse_mean_dbh_af[area=="North America",area:="north_america"]
rmse_mean_wdba[area=="North America",area:="north_america"]
rmse_mean_wdba_af[area=="North America",area:="north_america"]
rmse_mean_agb_wdba[area=="North America",area:="north_america"]
rmse_mean_agb_wdba_af[area=="North America",area:="north_america"]

rmse_mean_agb_all[area=="Oceania",area:="oceania"]
rmse_mean_agb_all_af[area=="Oceania",area:="oceania"]
rmse_mean_agb[area=="Oceania",area:="oceania"]
rmse_mean_agb_af[area=="Oceania",area:="oceania"]
rmse_mean_agb_dbh_sd[area=="Oceania",area:="oceania"]
rmse_mean_agb_dbh_sd_af[area=="Oceania",area:="oceania"]
rmse_mean_agb_sd[area=="Oceania",area:="oceania"]
rmse_mean_agb_sd_af[area=="Oceania",area:="oceania"]
rmse_mean_all_all[area=="Oceania",area:="oceania"]
rmse_mean_all_all_af[area=="Oceania",area:="oceania"]
rmse_mean_ba[area=="Oceania",area:="oceania"]
rmse_mean_ba_af[area=="Oceania",area:="oceania"]
rmse_mean_dbh[area=="Oceania",area:="oceania"]
rmse_mean_dbh_af[area=="Oceania",area:="oceania"]
rmse_mean_wdba[area=="Oceania",area:="oceania"]
rmse_mean_wdba_af[area=="Oceania",area:="oceania"]
rmse_mean_agb_wdba[area=="Oceania",area:="oceania"]
rmse_mean_agb_wdba_af[area=="Oceania",area:="oceania"]

rmse_mean_agb_all[,unique(area)]
rmse_mean_agb_all_af[,unique(area)]
rmse_mean_agb[,unique(area)]
rmse_mean_agb_af[,unique(area)]
rmse_mean_agb_dbh_sd[,unique(area)]
rmse_mean_agb_dbh_sd_af[,unique(area)]
rmse_mean_agb_sd[,unique(area)]
rmse_mean_agb_sd_af[,unique(area)]
rmse_mean_all_all[,unique(area)]
rmse_mean_all_all_af[,unique(area)]
rmse_mean_ba[,unique(area)]
rmse_mean_ba_af[,unique(area)]
rmse_mean_dbh[,unique(area)]
rmse_mean_dbh_af[,unique(area)]
rmse_mean_wdba[,unique(area)]
rmse_mean_wdba_af[,unique(area)]
rmse_mean_agb_wdba[,unique(area)]
rmse_mean_agb_wdba_af[,unique(area)]

essais_af[,unique(area)]
essais2_af[,unique(area)]
essais3_af[,unique(area)]
essais2_af[,unique(area)]
essais5_af[,unique(area)]
essais6_af[,unique(area)]
essais7_af[,unique(area)]
essais2bis_af[,unique(area)]
essais4bis_af[,unique(area)]

essais[,unique(area)]
essais2[,unique(area)]
essais3[,unique(area)]
essais4[,unique(area)]
essais5[,unique(area)]
essais6[,unique(area)]
essais7[,unique(area)]
essais2bis[,unique(area)]
essais4bis[,unique(area)]
```
###Oceania

```{r }
brut<-fread("C:/Users/u237004/Documents/1_Boulot_SC/2_Papier Pan/Work/MM/7_Modele_AGB_sans_montane/Pantropical_dataset_2023plots_V2_N_55_1_SOIL.csv")
brut<-brut[!elevation.y>=1000]
mean_ba<-brut[Continent=="Oceania"][!is.na(BA),mean(BA)]
sd_ba<-brut[Continent=="Oceania"][!is.na(BA),sd(BA)]

mean_dbh<-brut[Continent=="Oceania"][!is.na(DBHqm),mean(DBHqm)]
sd_dbh<-brut[Continent=="Oceania"][!is.na(DBHqm),sd(DBHqm)]

mean_sd<-brut[Continent=="Oceania"][!is.na(SD),mean(SD)]
sd_sd<-brut[Continent=="Oceania"][!is.na(SD),sd(SD)]

mean_wd<-brut[Continent=="Oceania"][!is.na(WDba),mean(WDba)]
sd_wd<-brut[Continent=="Oceania"][!is.na(WDba),sd(WDba)]

mean_agb<-brut[Continent=="Oceania"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Pan),mean(AGB_Feld_Pan)]
sd_agb<-brut[Continent=="Oceania"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Pan),sd(AGB_Feld_Pan)]

mean_agbcont<-brut[Continent=="Oceania"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Cont),mean(AGB_Feld_Cont)]
sd_agbcont<-brut[Continent=="Oceania"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Cont),sd(AGB_Feld_Cont)]

mean_agbreg<-brut[Continent=="Oceania"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Reg),mean(AGB_Feld_Reg)]
sd_agbreg<-brut[Continent=="Oceania"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Reg),sd(AGB_Feld_Reg)]


a<-essais2[area=="oceania",.(from=var,to=sub_rep,coef=estimate)]#env sur att D et att sur att D
b<-essais3[area=="oceania",.(from=var,to=sub_rep,coef=estimate)]#env sur att D et att sur att D
c<-essais2bis[area=="oceania",.(from=var,to=sub_rep,coef=estimate)]#env sur att D et att sur att D
d<-essais[area=="oceania",.(from=var,to=sub_rep,coef=estimate)][to=="SD"]#j'ai toutes els directes vers attributs et entre ttributs
e<-essais4[area=="oceania",.(from=var,to=sub_rep,coef=estimate)][from=="DBHqm"]#DBHqm et SD sur AGB
h<-essais4[area=="oceania",.(from=var,to=sub_rep,coef=estimate)][from=="SD"]#DBHqm et SD sur AGB
g<-essais4bis[area=="oceania",.(from=var,to=sub_rep,coef=estimate)][!from=="DBHqm"&!from=="SD"&!from=="WDba"]#BA et env sur AGB
f<-essais7[area=="oceania",.(from=var,to=sub_rep,coef=estimate)][from=="WDba"]


edges<-rbind(a,b,c,d,e,f,g,h)
edges[to=="DBH_qm",to:="DBHqm"]

#je standardise les coefs (en ecart type et en %)
edges[to=="BA",coef_sd:=coef/sd_ba]
edges[to=="BA",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean_ba)*100]

edges[to=="SD",coef_sd:=coef/sd_sd]
edges[to=="SD",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean_sd)*100]

edges[to=="DBHqm",coef_sd:=coef/sd_dbh]
edges[to=="DBHqm",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean_dbh)*100]


edges[to=="WDba",coef_sd:=coef/sd_wd]
edges[to=="WDba",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean_wd)*100]


edges[to=="AGB_Feld_Pan",coef_sd:=coef/sd_agb]
edges[to=="AGB_Feld_Pan",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean_agb)*100]


edges[to=="AGB_Feld_Reg",coef_sd:=coef/sd_agbreg]
edges[to=="AGB_Feld_Reg",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean_agbreg)*100]


edges[to=="AGB_Feld_Cont",coef_sd:=coef/sd_agbcont]
edges[to=="AGB_Feld_Cont",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean_agbcont)*100]

edges_brut<-edges
edges_brut2<-edges
data2<-edges_brut2[,area:="Oceania"]

###coef non stand

sd_bio1<-brut[Continent=="Oceania"][,.(Bio1_WC,Bio1_CHELSA,Bio1_CRU,Bio1_ERA5,Bio1_TC,Bio1_MODIS)]
sd_bio1[, row_mean := rowMeans(.SD, na.rm = TRUE)]
sd_bio1<-sd_bio1[,sd(row_mean)]
data2[from=="bio1"&area=="Oceania",coef_brut:=(coef/sd_bio1)]

sd_bio12<-brut[Continent=="Oceania"][,.(Bio12_WC,Bio12_CHELSA,Bio12_CRU,Bio12_ERA5,Bio12_TC,Bio12_IMERG,Bio12_CHIRPS)]
sd_bio12[, row_mean := rowMeans(.SD, na.rm = TRUE)]
sd_bio12<-sd_bio12[,sd(row_mean)]
data2[from=="bio12"&area=="Oceania",coef_brut:=(coef/sd_bio12)]

sd_bio15<-brut[Continent=="Oceania"][,.(Bio15_WC,Bio15_CHELSA,Bio15_CRU,Bio15_ERA5,Bio15_TC,Bio15_IMERG,Bio15_CHIRPS)]
sd_bio15[, row_mean := rowMeans(.SD, na.rm = TRUE)]
sd_bio15<-sd_bio15[,sd(row_mean)]
data2[from=="bio15"&area=="Oceania",coef_brut:=(coef/sd_bio15)]

sd<-brut[Continent=="Oceania",sd(slope)]
data2[from=="slope"&area=="Oceania",coef_brut:=(coef/sd)]

sd<-brut[Continent=="Oceania",sd(sand)]
data2[from=="sand"&area=="Oceania",coef_brut:=(coef/sd)]

sd<-brut[Continent=="Oceania",sd(org)]
data2[from=="org"&area=="Oceania",coef_brut:=(coef/sd)]

sd<-brut[Continent=="Oceania",sd(ph)]
data2[from=="ph"&area=="Oceania",coef_brut:=(coef/sd)]

sd<-brut[Continent=="Oceania",sd(DBHqm)]
data2[from=="DBHqm"&area=="Oceania",coef_brut:=(coef/sd)]

sd<-brut[Continent=="Oceania",sd(SD)]
data2[from=="SD"&area=="Oceania",coef_brut:=(coef/sd)]


sd<-brut[Continent=="Oceania",sd(BA)]
data2[from=="BA"&area=="Oceania",coef_brut:=(coef/sd)]

sd<-brut[Continent=="Oceania",sd(WDba)]
data2[from=="WDba"&area=="Oceania",coef_brut:=(coef/sd)]

```


```{r }
###################################################################################################################################
###################################################################################################################################
###################################################################################################################################
#Oceania
###################################################################################################################################
###################################################################################################################################
###################################################################################################################################


###################################################################################################################################
###################################################################################################################################
##AGB_Feld_pan
###################################################################################################################################
###################################################################################################################################
edges<-edges_brut[!to=="AGB_Feld_Reg"&!to=="AGB_Feld_Cont"]
# Harmonisation des noms
edges[from=="bio1",from:="MAT"]
edges[from=="bio12",from:="TAP"]
edges[from=="bio15",from:="PS"]
edges[from=="ph",from:="pH"]
edges[from=="sand",from:="Sand "]
edges[from=="org",from:="Org. C "]
edges[from=="slope",from:="Slope"]
edges[from=="AGB_Feld_Pan",from:="AGB"]
edges[to=="AGB_Feld_Pan",to:="AGB"]

# Groupes de variables
climatiques    <- c("MAT", "TAP", "PS")
autres_exp     <- c("Org. C ", "pH", "Sand ", "Slope")
explicatives   <- c(climatiques, autres_exp)
structurelles  <- c("WDba", "BA", "SD", "DBHqm")
agb            <- "AGB"

# Initialisation layout
all_nodes <- unique(c(edges$from, edges$to))        
layout_mat <- matrix(NA, nrow = length(all_nodes), ncol = 2)
rownames(layout_mat) <- all_nodes

# Position manuelle
layout_mat["MAT", ]               <- c(0, 2.7)
layout_mat["TAP", ]               <- c(0, 2.5)
layout_mat["PS", ]                <- c(0, 2.3)
layout_mat["Org. C ", ]    <- c(0, 1.9)
layout_mat["pH", ]                <- c(0, 1.7)
layout_mat["Sand ", ]      <- c(0, 1.5)
layout_mat["Slope", ]             <- c(0, 1.3)

# Variables structurelles
y_agb <- 1.6
layout_mat["WDba", ]  <- c(1, y_agb + 1.1)
layout_mat["BA",   ]  <- c(0.8, y_agb + 0.5)
layout_mat["SD",   ]  <- c(1, y_agb - 0.3)
layout_mat["DBHqm", ] <- c(1.3,y_agb + 0.2 )
layout_mat["AGB", ]   <- c(2, 2.1)

# Mise en forme
df_layout <- as_tibble(layout_mat, rownames = "name")
colnames(df_layout) <- c("name", "x", "y")

# RMSE / R²
rmse_vals <- c(
  WDba  = rmse_mean_all_all[area=="oceania"&sub_rep=="WDba",rmse][[1]],
  BA    = rmse_mean_ba[area=="oceania"&sub_rep=="BA",rmse][[1]],
  SD    = rmse_mean_all_all[area=="oceania"&sub_rep=="SD",rmse][[1]],
  DBHqm = rmse_mean_dbh[area=="oceania"&sub_rep=="DBH_qm",rmse][[1]],
  AGB   = rmse_mean_agb_all[area=="oceania"&sub_rep=="AGB_Feld_Pan",rmse][[1]]
)

rsq_vals <- c(
  WDba  = rmse_mean_all_all[area=="oceania" & sub_rep=="WDba", rsquared][[1]],
  BA    = rmse_mean_ba[area=="oceania" & sub_rep=="BA", rsquared][[1]],
  SD    = rmse_mean_all_all[area=="oceania" & sub_rep=="SD", rsquared][[1]],
  DBHqm = rmse_mean_dbh[area=="oceania" & sub_rep=="DBH_qm", rsquared][[1]],
  AGB   = rmse_mean_agb_all[area=="oceania" & sub_rep=="AGB_Feld_Pan", rsquared][[1]]
)

# Graphe
edges_plot <- edges %>% filter(!is.na(coef_sd))
graph <- graph_from_data_frame(edges_plot, directed = TRUE)
E(graph)$weight <- edges_plot$coef_sd
E(graph)$color  <- ifelse(E(graph)$weight > 0, "forestgreen", "firebrick3")

df_layout <- df_layout %>%
  filter(name %in% V(graph)$name) %>%
  arrange(match(name, V(graph)$name))

edge_df <- igraph::as_data_frame(graph, what = "edges") %>%
  mutate(
    x = (df_layout$x[match(from, df_layout$name)] + df_layout$x[match(to, df_layout$name)]) / 2,
    y = (df_layout$y[match(from, df_layout$name)] + df_layout$y[match(to, df_layout$name)]) / 2,
    label = round(weight, 2),
    text_color = ifelse(weight > 0, "forestgreen", "firebrick3")
  )

E(graph)$edge_width <- case_when(
  abs(E(graph)$weight) < 0.1   ~ "< 0.1",
  abs(E(graph)$weight) < 0.25  ~ "0.1 ≤ coef < 0.25",
  abs(E(graph)$weight) < 0.5   ~ "0.25 ≤ coef < 0.5",
  abs(E(graph)$weight) < 0.75  ~ "0.5 ≤ coef < 0.75",
  TRUE                         ~ "coef ≥ 0.75"
)

# Labels riches avec ggtext
library(ggtext)
labels_rmse_rsq <- sapply(df_layout$name, function(var) {
  if (var %in% names(rmse_vals)) {
    paste0("<b>", var, "</b><br><span style='font-size:9pt;'>",
           "RMSE = ", round(rmse_vals[[var]], 2), "<br>",
           "R² = ", round(rsq_vals[[var]], 2), "</span>")
  } else if (var %in% explicatives) {
    paste0("<b>", var, "</b>")
  } else {
    var
  }
})

df_layout <- df_layout %>%
  mutate(label = ifelse(name %in% names(labels_rmse_rsq), labels_rmse_rsq[name], name))

# Tracé final
library(ggraph)
library(shadowtext)

one<-ggraph(graph, layout = "manual", x = df_layout$x, y = df_layout$y) +
  geom_edge_link(aes(color = I(color), width = edge_width),
                 arrow = arrow(length = unit(3, 'mm')),
                 end_cap = circle(13, 'mm'),
                 lineend = "round") +
  shadowtext::geom_shadowtext(
    data = edge_df,
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = label, color = text_color),
    size = 4,
    fontface = "bold",
    bg.colour = "white",
    bg.r = 0.15
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("forestgreen" = "forestgreen", "firebrick3" = "firebrick3"), guide = "none") +
  scale_edge_width_manual(
    values = c("< 0.1" = 0.5, "0.1 ≤ coef < 0.25" = 1, "0.25 ≤ coef < 0.5" = 1.5, "0.5 ≤ coef < 0.75" = 2, "coef ≥ 0.75" = 2.5),
    name = "Standardized coefficient (sd)",
    guide = guide_legend(override.aes = list(color = "grey1"))
  ) +
  geom_node_point(size = 32, shape = 21, fill = "white", color = "grey1", stroke = 1.5) +
  ggtext::geom_richtext(data = df_layout, aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
                        fill = NA, label.color = NA, size = 5, lineheight = 1.1) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(1.1, 2.8)) +
  theme_void() +
  ggtitle("Oceania") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 20))

one



##################################################################################################################################
#Pourc
#################################################################################################################################
edges<-edges_brut[!to=="AGB_Feld_Reg"&!to=="AGB_Feld_Cont"]
# Harmonisation des noms
edges[from=="bio1",from:="MAT"]
edges[from=="bio12",from:="TAP"]
edges[from=="bio15",from:="PS"]
edges[from=="ph",from:="pH"]
edges[from=="sand",from:="Sand "]
edges[from=="org",from:="Org. C "]
edges[from=="slope",from:="Slope"]
edges[from=="AGB_Feld_Pan",from:="AGB"]
edges[to=="AGB_Feld_Pan",to:="AGB"]

# Groupes de variables
climatiques    <- c("MAT", "TAP", "PS")
autres_exp     <- c("Org. C ", "pH", "Sand ", "Slope")
explicatives   <- c(climatiques, autres_exp)
structurelles  <- c("WDba", "BA", "SD", "DBHqm")
agb            <- "AGB"

# Initialisation layout
all_nodes <- unique(c(edges$from, edges$to))        
layout_mat <- matrix(NA, nrow = length(all_nodes), ncol = 2)
rownames(layout_mat) <- all_nodes

# Position manuelle
layout_mat["MAT", ]               <- c(0, 2.7)
layout_mat["TAP", ]               <- c(0, 2.5)
layout_mat["PS", ]                <- c(0, 2.3)
layout_mat["Org. C ", ]    <- c(0, 1.9)
layout_mat["pH", ]                <- c(0, 1.7)
layout_mat["Sand ", ]      <- c(0, 1.5)
layout_mat["Slope", ]             <- c(0, 1.3)

# Variables structurelles
y_agb <- 1.6
layout_mat["WDba", ]  <- c(1, y_agb + 1.1)
layout_mat["BA",   ]  <- c(0.8, y_agb + 0.5)
layout_mat["SD",   ]  <- c(1, y_agb - 0.3)
layout_mat["DBHqm", ] <- c(1.3,y_agb + 0.2 )
layout_mat["AGB", ]   <- c(2, 2.1)

# Mise en forme
df_layout <- as_tibble(layout_mat, rownames = "name")
colnames(df_layout) <- c("name", "x", "y")

# RMSE / R²
rmse_vals <- c(
  WDba  = rmse_mean_all_all[area=="oceania"&sub_rep=="WDba",rmse][[1]],
  BA    = rmse_mean_ba[area=="oceania"&sub_rep=="BA",rmse][[1]],
  SD    = rmse_mean_all_all[area=="oceania"&sub_rep=="SD",rmse][[1]],
  DBHqm = rmse_mean_dbh[area=="oceania"&sub_rep=="DBH_qm",rmse][[1]],
  AGB   = rmse_mean_agb_all[area=="oceania"&sub_rep=="AGB_Feld_Pan",rmse][[1]]
)

rsq_vals <- c(
  WDba  = rmse_mean_all_all[area=="oceania" & sub_rep=="WDba", rsquared][[1]],
  BA    = rmse_mean_ba[area=="oceania" & sub_rep=="BA", rsquared][[1]],
  SD    = rmse_mean_all_all[area=="oceania" & sub_rep=="SD", rsquared][[1]],
  DBHqm = rmse_mean_dbh[area=="oceania" & sub_rep=="DBH_qm", rsquared][[1]],
  AGB   = rmse_mean_agb_all[area=="oceania" & sub_rep=="AGB_Feld_Pan", rsquared][[1]]
)

# Graphe
edges_plot <- edges %>% filter(!is.na(coef_pourc))
graph <- graph_from_data_frame(edges_plot, directed = TRUE)
E(graph)$weight <- edges_plot$coef_pourc
E(graph)$color  <- ifelse(E(graph)$weight > 0, "forestgreen", "firebrick3")

df_layout <- df_layout %>%
  filter(name %in% V(graph)$name) %>%
  arrange(match(name, V(graph)$name))

edge_df <- igraph::as_data_frame(graph, what = "edges") %>%
  mutate(
    x = (df_layout$x[match(from, df_layout$name)] + df_layout$x[match(to, df_layout$name)]) / 2,
    y = (df_layout$y[match(from, df_layout$name)] + df_layout$y[match(to, df_layout$name)]) / 2,
    label = round(weight, 2),
    text_color = ifelse(weight > 0, "forestgreen", "firebrick3")
  )


E(graph)$edge_width <- case_when(
  abs(E(graph)$weight) < 1   ~ "< 1",
  abs(E(graph)$weight) < 5  ~ "1 ≤ coef < 5",
  abs(E(graph)$weight) < 10   ~ "5 ≤ coef < 10",
  abs(E(graph)$weight) < 20  ~ "10 ≤ coef < 20",
  TRUE                         ~ "coef ≥ 20"
)
E(graph)$edge_width <- factor(E(graph)$edge_width,
                              levels = c("< 1",
                                         "1 ≤ coef < 5",
                                         "5 ≤ coef < 10",
                                         "10 ≤ coef < 20",
                                         "coef ≥ 20"))
# Labels riches avec ggtext
library(ggtext)
labels_rmse_rsq <- sapply(df_layout$name, function(var) {
  if (var %in% names(rmse_vals)) {
    paste0("<b>", var, "</b><br><span style='font-size:9pt;'>",
           "RMSE = ", round(rmse_vals[[var]], 2), "<br>",
           "R² = ", round(rsq_vals[[var]], 2), "</span>")
  } else if (var %in% explicatives) {
    paste0("<b>", var, "</b>")
  } else {
    var
  }
})

df_layout <- df_layout %>%
  mutate(label = ifelse(name %in% names(labels_rmse_rsq), labels_rmse_rsq[name], name))

# Tracé final
library(ggraph)
library(shadowtext)

two<-ggraph(graph, layout = "manual", x = df_layout$x, y = df_layout$y) +
  geom_edge_link(aes(color = I(color), width = edge_width),
                 arrow = arrow(length = unit(3, 'mm')),
                 end_cap = circle(13, 'mm'),
                 lineend = "round") +
  shadowtext::geom_shadowtext(
    data = edge_df,
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = label, color = text_color),
    size = 4,
    fontface = "bold",
    bg.colour = "white",
    bg.r = 0.15
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("forestgreen" = "forestgreen", "firebrick3" = "firebrick3"), guide = "none") +
  scale_edge_width_manual(
     values = c("< 1" = 0.5, "1 ≤ coef < 5" = 1, "5 ≤ coef < 10" = 1.5, "10 ≤ coef < 20" = 2, "coef ≥ 20" = 2.5),
    name = "Standardized coefficient (%)",
    guide = guide_legend(override.aes = list(color = "grey1"))
  ) +
  geom_node_point(size = 32, shape = 21, fill = "white", color = "grey1", stroke = 1.5) +
  ggtext::geom_richtext(data = df_layout, aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
                        fill = NA, label.color = NA, size = 5, lineheight = 1.1) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(1.1, 2.8)) +
  theme_void() +
  ggtitle("Oceania") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 20))


two



```

###North America
```{r }
brut<-fread("C:/Users/u237004/Documents/1_Boulot_SC/2_Papier Pan/Work/MM/7_Modele_AGB_sans_montane/Pantropical_dataset_2023plots_V2_N_55_1_SOIL.csv")
brut<-brut[!elevation.y>=1000]
mean_ba<-brut[Continent=="North America"][!is.na(BA),mean(BA)]
sd_ba<-brut[Continent=="North America"][!is.na(BA),sd(BA)]

mean_dbh<-brut[Continent=="North America"][!is.na(DBHqm),mean(DBHqm)]
sd_dbh<-brut[Continent=="North America"][!is.na(DBHqm),sd(DBHqm)]

mean_sd<-brut[Continent=="North America"][!is.na(SD),mean(SD)]
sd_sd<-brut[Continent=="North America"][!is.na(SD),sd(SD)]

mean_wd<-brut[Continent=="North America"][!is.na(WDba),mean(WDba)]
sd_wd<-brut[Continent=="North America"][!is.na(WDba),sd(WDba)]

mean_agb<-brut[Continent=="North America"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Pan),mean(AGB_Feld_Pan)]
sd_agb<-brut[Continent=="North America"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Pan),sd(AGB_Feld_Pan)]

mean_agbcont<-brut[Continent=="North America"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Cont),mean(AGB_Feld_Cont)]
sd_agbcont<-brut[Continent=="North America"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Cont),sd(AGB_Feld_Cont)]

mean_agbreg<-brut[Continent=="North America"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Reg),mean(AGB_Feld_Reg)]
sd_agbreg<-brut[Continent=="North America"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Reg),sd(AGB_Feld_Reg)]


a<-essais2[area=="north_america",.(from=var,to=sub_rep,coef=estimate)]#env sur att D et att sur att D
b<-essais3[area=="north_america",.(from=var,to=sub_rep,coef=estimate)]#env sur att D et att sur att D
c<-essais2bis[area=="north_america",.(from=var,to=sub_rep,coef=estimate)]#env sur att D et att sur att D
d<-essais[area=="north_america",.(from=var,to=sub_rep,coef=estimate)][to=="SD"]#j'ai toutes els directes vers attributs et entre ttributs
e<-essais4[area=="north_america",.(from=var,to=sub_rep,coef=estimate)][from=="DBHqm"]#DBHqm et SD sur AGB
h<-essais4[area=="north_america",.(from=var,to=sub_rep,coef=estimate)][from=="SD"]#DBHqm et SD sur AGB
g<-essais4bis[area=="north_america",.(from=var,to=sub_rep,coef=estimate)][!from=="DBHqm"&!from=="SD"&!from=="WDba"]#BA et env sur AGB
f<-essais7[area=="north_america",.(from=var,to=sub_rep,coef=estimate)][from=="WDba"]


edges<-rbind(a,b,c,d,e,f,g,h)
edges[to=="DBH_qm",to:="DBHqm"]

#je standardise les coefs (en ecart type et en %)
edges[to=="BA",coef_sd:=coef/sd_ba]
edges[to=="BA",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean_ba)*100]

edges[to=="SD",coef_sd:=coef/sd_sd]
edges[to=="SD",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean_sd)*100]

edges[to=="DBHqm",coef_sd:=coef/sd_dbh]
edges[to=="DBHqm",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean_dbh)*100]


edges[to=="WDba",coef_sd:=coef/sd_wd]
edges[to=="WDba",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean_wd)*100]


edges[to=="AGB_Feld_Pan",coef_sd:=coef/sd_agb]
edges[to=="AGB_Feld_Pan",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean_agb)*100]


edges[to=="AGB_Feld_Reg",coef_sd:=coef/sd_agbreg]
edges[to=="AGB_Feld_Reg",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean_agbreg)*100]


edges[to=="AGB_Feld_Cont",coef_sd:=coef/sd_agbcont]
edges[to=="AGB_Feld_Cont",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean_agbcont)*100]

edges_brut<-edges
edges_brut2<-edges
data<-edges_brut2[,area:="North America"]
data[,coef_brut:=NA]
data2<-rbind(data2,data)

###coef non stand

sd_bio1<-brut[Continent=="North America"][,.(Bio1_WC,Bio1_CHELSA,Bio1_CRU,Bio1_ERA5,Bio1_TC,Bio1_MODIS)]
sd_bio1[, row_mean := rowMeans(.SD, na.rm = TRUE)]
sd_bio1<-sd_bio1[,sd(row_mean)]
data2[from=="bio1"&area=="North America",coef_brut:=(coef/sd_bio1)]

sd_bio12<-brut[Continent=="North America"][,.(Bio12_WC,Bio12_CHELSA,Bio12_CRU,Bio12_ERA5,Bio12_TC,Bio12_IMERG,Bio12_CHIRPS)]
sd_bio12[, row_mean := rowMeans(.SD, na.rm = TRUE)]
sd_bio12<-sd_bio12[,sd(row_mean)]
data2[from=="bio12"&area=="North America",coef_brut:=(coef/sd_bio12)]

sd_bio15<-brut[Continent=="North America"][,.(Bio15_WC,Bio15_CHELSA,Bio15_CRU,Bio15_ERA5,Bio15_TC,Bio15_IMERG,Bio15_CHIRPS)]
sd_bio15[, row_mean := rowMeans(.SD, na.rm = TRUE)]
sd_bio15<-sd_bio15[,sd(row_mean)]
data2[from=="bio15"&area=="North America",coef_brut:=(coef/sd_bio15)]

sd<-brut[Continent=="North America",sd(slope)]
data2[from=="slope"&area=="North America",coef_brut:=(coef/sd)]

sd<-brut[Continent=="North America",sd(sand)]
data2[from=="sand"&area=="North America",coef_brut:=(coef/sd)]

sd<-brut[Continent=="North America",sd(org)]
data2[from=="org"&area=="North America",coef_brut:=(coef/sd)]

sd<-brut[Continent=="North America",sd(ph)]
data2[from=="ph"&area=="North America",coef_brut:=(coef/sd)]

sd<-brut[Continent=="North America",sd(DBHqm)]
data2[from=="DBHqm"&area=="North America",coef_brut:=(coef/sd)]

sd<-brut[Continent=="North America",sd(SD)]
data2[from=="SD"&area=="North America",coef_brut:=(coef/sd)]


sd<-brut[Continent=="North America",sd(BA)]
data2[from=="BA"&area=="North America",coef_brut:=(coef/sd)]

sd<-brut[Continent=="North America",sd(WDba)]
data2[from=="WDba"&area=="North America",coef_brut:=(coef/sd)]
```


```{r }
###################################################################################################################################
###################################################################################################################################
###################################################################################################################################
#North America
###################################################################################################################################
###################################################################################################################################
###################################################################################################################################


###################################################################################################################################
###################################################################################################################################
##AGB_Feld_pan
###################################################################################################################################
###################################################################################################################################
edges<-edges_brut[!to=="AGB_Feld_Reg"&!to=="AGB_Feld_Cont"]
# Harmonisation des noms
edges[from=="bio1",from:="MAT"]
edges[from=="bio12",from:="TAP"]
edges[from=="bio15",from:="PS"]
edges[from=="ph",from:="pH"]
edges[from=="sand",from:="Sand "]
edges[from=="org",from:="Org. C "]
edges[from=="slope",from:="Slope"]
edges[from=="AGB_Feld_Pan",from:="AGB"]
edges[to=="AGB_Feld_Pan",to:="AGB"]

# Groupes de variables
climatiques    <- c("MAT", "TAP", "PS")
autres_exp     <- c("Org. C ", "pH", "Sand ", "Slope")
explicatives   <- c(climatiques, autres_exp)
structurelles  <- c("WDba", "BA", "SD", "DBHqm")
agb            <- "AGB"

# Initialisation layout
all_nodes <- unique(c(edges$from, edges$to))        
layout_mat <- matrix(NA, nrow = length(all_nodes), ncol = 2)
rownames(layout_mat) <- all_nodes

# Position manuelle
layout_mat["MAT", ]               <- c(0, 2.7)
layout_mat["TAP", ]               <- c(0, 2.5)
layout_mat["PS", ]                <- c(0, 2.3)
layout_mat["Org. C ", ]    <- c(0, 1.9)
layout_mat["pH", ]                <- c(0, 1.7)
layout_mat["Sand ", ]      <- c(0, 1.5)
layout_mat["Slope", ]             <- c(0, 1.3)

# Variables structurelles
y_agb <- 1.6
layout_mat["WDba", ]  <- c(1, y_agb + 1.1)
layout_mat["BA",   ]  <- c(0.8, y_agb + 0.5)
layout_mat["SD",   ]  <- c(1, y_agb - 0.3)
layout_mat["DBHqm", ] <- c(1.3,y_agb + 0.2 )
layout_mat["AGB", ]   <- c(2, 2.1)

# Mise en forme
df_layout <- as_tibble(layout_mat, rownames = "name")
colnames(df_layout) <- c("name", "x", "y")

# RMSE / R²
rmse_vals <- c(
  WDba  = rmse_mean_all_all[area=="north_america"&sub_rep=="WDba",rmse][[1]],
  BA    = rmse_mean_ba[area=="north_america"&sub_rep=="BA",rmse][[1]],
  SD    = rmse_mean_all_all[area=="north_america"&sub_rep=="SD",rmse][[1]],
  DBHqm = rmse_mean_dbh[area=="north_america"&sub_rep=="DBH_qm",rmse][[1]],
  AGB   = rmse_mean_agb_all[area=="north_america"&sub_rep=="AGB_Feld_Pan",rmse][[1]]
)

rsq_vals <- c(
  WDba  = rmse_mean_all_all[area=="north_america" & sub_rep=="WDba", rsquared][[1]],
  BA    = rmse_mean_ba[area=="north_america" & sub_rep=="BA", rsquared][[1]],
  SD    = rmse_mean_all_all[area=="north_america" & sub_rep=="SD", rsquared][[1]],
  DBHqm = rmse_mean_dbh[area=="north_america" & sub_rep=="DBH_qm", rsquared][[1]],
  AGB   = rmse_mean_agb_all[area=="north_america" & sub_rep=="AGB_Feld_Pan", rsquared][[1]]
)

# Graphe
edges_plot <- edges %>% filter(!is.na(coef_sd))
graph <- graph_from_data_frame(edges_plot, directed = TRUE)
E(graph)$weight <- edges_plot$coef_sd
E(graph)$color  <- ifelse(E(graph)$weight > 0, "forestgreen", "firebrick3")

df_layout <- df_layout %>%
  filter(name %in% V(graph)$name) %>%
  arrange(match(name, V(graph)$name))

edge_df <- igraph::as_data_frame(graph, what = "edges") %>%
  mutate(
    x = (df_layout$x[match(from, df_layout$name)] + df_layout$x[match(to, df_layout$name)]) / 2,
    y = (df_layout$y[match(from, df_layout$name)] + df_layout$y[match(to, df_layout$name)]) / 2,
    label = round(weight, 2),
    text_color = ifelse(weight > 0, "forestgreen", "firebrick3")
  )

E(graph)$edge_width <- case_when(
  abs(E(graph)$weight) < 0.1   ~ "< 0.1",
  abs(E(graph)$weight) < 0.25  ~ "0.1 ≤ coef < 0.25",
  abs(E(graph)$weight) < 0.5   ~ "0.25 ≤ coef < 0.5",
  abs(E(graph)$weight) < 0.75  ~ "0.5 ≤ coef < 0.75",
  TRUE                         ~ "coef ≥ 0.75"
)

# Labels riches avec ggtext
library(ggtext)
labels_rmse_rsq <- sapply(df_layout$name, function(var) {
  if (var %in% names(rmse_vals)) {
    paste0("<b>", var, "</b><br><span style='font-size:9pt;'>",
           "RMSE = ", round(rmse_vals[[var]], 2), "<br>",
           "R² = ", round(rsq_vals[[var]], 2), "</span>")
  } else if (var %in% explicatives) {
    paste0("<b>", var, "</b>")
  } else {
    var
  }
})

df_layout <- df_layout %>%
  mutate(label = ifelse(name %in% names(labels_rmse_rsq), labels_rmse_rsq[name], name))

# Tracé final
library(ggraph)
library(shadowtext)

three<-ggraph(graph, layout = "manual", x = df_layout$x, y = df_layout$y) +
  geom_edge_link(aes(color = I(color), width = edge_width),
                 arrow = arrow(length = unit(3, 'mm')),
                 end_cap = circle(13, 'mm'),
                 lineend = "round") +
  shadowtext::geom_shadowtext(
    data = edge_df,
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = label, color = text_color),
    size = 4,
    fontface = "bold",
    bg.colour = "white",
    bg.r = 0.15
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("forestgreen" = "forestgreen", "firebrick3" = "firebrick3"), guide = "none") +
  scale_edge_width_manual(
    values = c("< 0.1" = 0.5, "0.1 ≤ coef < 0.25" = 1, "0.25 ≤ coef < 0.5" = 1.5, "0.5 ≤ coef < 0.75" = 2, "coef ≥ 0.75" = 2.5),
    name = "Standardized coefficient (sd)",
    guide = guide_legend(override.aes = list(color = "grey1"))
  ) +
  geom_node_point(size = 32, shape = 21, fill = "white", color = "grey1", stroke = 1.5) +
  ggtext::geom_richtext(data = df_layout, aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
                        fill = NA, label.color = NA, size = 5, lineheight = 1.1) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(1.1, 2.8)) +  # 🔧 Ajuste ici selon ton layout
  theme_void() +
  ggtitle("Central America") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 20))

three



##################################################################################################################################
#Pourc
#################################################################################################################################

################################################################################################################################### 
edges<-edges_brut[!to=="AGB_Feld_Reg"&!to=="AGB_Feld_Cont"] 
# Harmonisation des noms
edges[from=="bio1",from:="MAT"]
edges[from=="bio12",from:="TAP"]
edges[from=="bio15",from:="PS"]
edges[from=="ph",from:="pH"]
edges[from=="sand",from:="Sand "]
edges[from=="org",from:="Org. C "]
edges[from=="slope",from:="Slope"]
edges[from=="AGB_Feld_Pan",from:="AGB"]
edges[to=="AGB_Feld_Pan",to:="AGB"]

# Groupes de variables
climatiques    <- c("MAT", "TAP", "PS")
autres_exp     <- c("Org. C ", "pH", "Sand ", "Slope")
explicatives   <- c(climatiques, autres_exp)
structurelles  <- c("WDba", "BA", "SD", "DBHqm")
agb            <- "AGB"

# Initialisation layout
all_nodes <- unique(c(edges$from, edges$to))        
layout_mat <- matrix(NA, nrow = length(all_nodes), ncol = 2)
rownames(layout_mat) <- all_nodes

# Position manuelle
layout_mat["MAT", ]               <- c(0, 2.7)
layout_mat["TAP", ]               <- c(0, 2.5)
layout_mat["PS", ]                <- c(0, 2.3)
layout_mat["Org. C ", ]    <- c(0, 1.9)
layout_mat["pH", ]                <- c(0, 1.7)
layout_mat["Sand ", ]      <- c(0, 1.5)
layout_mat["Slope", ]             <- c(0, 1.3)

# Variables structurelles
y_agb <- 1.6
layout_mat["WDba", ]  <- c(1, y_agb + 1.1)
layout_mat["BA",   ]  <- c(0.8, y_agb + 0.5)
layout_mat["SD",   ]  <- c(1, y_agb - 0.3)
layout_mat["DBHqm", ] <- c(1.3,y_agb + 0.2 )
layout_mat["AGB", ]   <- c(2, 2.1)

# Mise en forme
df_layout <- as_tibble(layout_mat, rownames = "name")
colnames(df_layout) <- c("name", "x", "y")

# RMSE / R²
rmse_vals <- c(
  WDba  = rmse_mean_all_all[area=="north_america"&sub_rep=="WDba",rmse][[1]],
  BA    = rmse_mean_ba[area=="north_america"&sub_rep=="BA",rmse][[1]],
  SD    = rmse_mean_all_all[area=="north_america"&sub_rep=="SD",rmse][[1]],
  DBHqm = rmse_mean_dbh[area=="north_america"&sub_rep=="DBH_qm",rmse][[1]],
  AGB   = rmse_mean_agb_all[area=="north_america"&sub_rep=="AGB_Feld_Pan",rmse][[1]]
)

rsq_vals <- c(
  WDba  = rmse_mean_all_all[area=="north_america" & sub_rep=="WDba", rsquared][[1]],
  BA    = rmse_mean_ba[area=="north_america" & sub_rep=="BA", rsquared][[1]],
  SD    = rmse_mean_all_all[area=="north_america" & sub_rep=="SD", rsquared][[1]],
  DBHqm = rmse_mean_dbh[area=="north_america" & sub_rep=="DBH_qm", rsquared][[1]],
  AGB   = rmse_mean_agb_all[area=="north_america" & sub_rep=="AGB_Feld_Pan", rsquared][[1]]
)

# Graphe
edges_plot <- edges %>% filter(!is.na(coef_pourc))
graph <- graph_from_data_frame(edges_plot, directed = TRUE)
E(graph)$weight <- edges_plot$coef_pourc
E(graph)$color  <- ifelse(E(graph)$weight > 0, "forestgreen", "firebrick3")

df_layout <- df_layout %>%
  filter(name %in% V(graph)$name) %>%
  arrange(match(name, V(graph)$name))

edge_df <- igraph::as_data_frame(graph, what = "edges") %>%
  mutate(
    x = (df_layout$x[match(from, df_layout$name)] + df_layout$x[match(to, df_layout$name)]) / 2,
    y = (df_layout$y[match(from, df_layout$name)] + df_layout$y[match(to, df_layout$name)]) / 2,
    label = round(weight, 2),
    text_color = ifelse(weight > 0, "forestgreen", "firebrick3")
  )


E(graph)$edge_width <- case_when(
  abs(E(graph)$weight) < 1   ~ "< 1",
  abs(E(graph)$weight) < 5  ~ "1 ≤ coef < 5",
  abs(E(graph)$weight) < 10   ~ "5 ≤ coef < 10",
  abs(E(graph)$weight) < 20  ~ "10 ≤ coef < 20",
  TRUE                         ~ "coef ≥ 20"
)
E(graph)$edge_width <- factor(E(graph)$edge_width,
                              levels = c("< 1",
                                         "1 ≤ coef < 5",
                                         "5 ≤ coef < 10",
                                         "10 ≤ coef < 20",
                                         "coef ≥ 20"))
# Labels riches avec ggtext
library(ggtext)
labels_rmse_rsq <- sapply(df_layout$name, function(var) {
  if (var %in% names(rmse_vals)) {
    paste0("<b>", var, "</b><br><span style='font-size:9pt;'>",
           "RMSE = ", round(rmse_vals[[var]], 2), "<br>",
           "R² = ", round(rsq_vals[[var]], 2), "</span>")
  } else if (var %in% explicatives) {
    paste0("<b>", var, "</b>")
  } else {
    var
  }
})

df_layout <- df_layout %>%
  mutate(label = ifelse(name %in% names(labels_rmse_rsq), labels_rmse_rsq[name], name))

# Tracé final
library(ggraph)
library(shadowtext)

four<-ggraph(graph, layout = "manual", x = df_layout$x, y = df_layout$y) +
  geom_edge_link(aes(color = I(color), width = edge_width),
                 arrow = arrow(length = unit(3, 'mm')),
                 end_cap = circle(13, 'mm'),
                 lineend = "round") +
  shadowtext::geom_shadowtext(
    data = edge_df,
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = label, color = text_color),
    size = 4,
    fontface = "bold",
    bg.colour = "white",
    bg.r = 0.15
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("forestgreen" = "forestgreen", "firebrick3" = "firebrick3"), guide = "none") +
  scale_edge_width_manual(
      values = c("< 1" = 0.5, "1 ≤ coef < 5" = 1, "5 ≤ coef < 10" = 1.5, "10 ≤ coef < 20" = 2, "coef ≥ 20" = 2.5),
    name = "Standardized coefficient (%)",
    guide = guide_legend(override.aes = list(color = "grey1"))
  ) +
  geom_node_point(size = 32, shape = 21, fill = "white", color = "grey1", stroke = 1.5) +
  ggtext::geom_richtext(data = df_layout, aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
                        fill = NA, label.color = NA, size = 5, lineheight = 1.1) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(1.1, 2.8)) +  # 🔧 Ajuste ici selon ton layout
  theme_void() +
  ggtitle("Central America") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 20))

four


```

###South America
```{r }
brut<-fread("C:/Users/u237004/Documents/1_Boulot_SC/2_Papier Pan/Work/MM/7_Modele_AGB_sans_montane/Pantropical_dataset_2023plots_V2_N_55_1_SOIL.csv")
brut<-brut[!elevation.y>=1000]
mean_ba<-brut[Continent=="South America"][!is.na(BA),mean(BA)]
sd_ba<-brut[Continent=="South America"][!is.na(BA),sd(BA)]

mean_dbh<-brut[Continent=="South America"][!is.na(DBHqm),mean(DBHqm)]
sd_dbh<-brut[Continent=="South America"][!is.na(DBHqm),sd(DBHqm)]

mean_sd<-brut[Continent=="South America"][!is.na(SD),mean(SD)]
sd_sd<-brut[Continent=="South America"][!is.na(SD),sd(SD)]

mean_wd<-brut[Continent=="South America"][!is.na(WDba),mean(WDba)]
sd_wd<-brut[Continent=="South America"][!is.na(WDba),sd(WDba)]

mean_agb<-brut[Continent=="South America"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Pan),mean(AGB_Feld_Pan)]
sd_agb<-brut[Continent=="South America"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Pan),sd(AGB_Feld_Pan)]

mean_agbcont<-brut[Continent=="South America"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Cont),mean(AGB_Feld_Cont)]
sd_agbcont<-brut[Continent=="South America"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Cont),sd(AGB_Feld_Cont)]

mean_agbreg<-brut[Continent=="South America"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Reg),mean(AGB_Feld_Reg)]
sd_agbreg<-brut[Continent=="South America"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Reg),sd(AGB_Feld_Reg)]



a<-essais2[area=="south_america",.(from=var,to=sub_rep,coef=estimate)]#env sur att D et att sur att D
b<-essais3[area=="south_america",.(from=var,to=sub_rep,coef=estimate)]#env sur att D et att sur att D
c<-essais2bis[area=="south_america",.(from=var,to=sub_rep,coef=estimate)]#env sur att D et att sur att D
d<-essais[area=="south_america",.(from=var,to=sub_rep,coef=estimate)][to=="SD"]#j'ai toutes els directes vers attributs et entre ttributs
e<-essais4[area=="south_america",.(from=var,to=sub_rep,coef=estimate)][from=="DBHqm"]#DBHqm et SD sur AGB
h<-essais4[area=="south_america",.(from=var,to=sub_rep,coef=estimate)][from=="SD"]#DBHqm et SD sur AGB
g<-essais4bis[area=="south_america",.(from=var,to=sub_rep,coef=estimate)][!from=="DBHqm"&!from=="SD"&!from=="WDba"]#BA et env sur AGB
f<-essais7[area=="south_america",.(from=var,to=sub_rep,coef=estimate)][from=="WDba"]

edges<-rbind(a,b,c,d,e,f,g,h)
edges[to=="DBH_qm",to:="DBHqm"]

#je standardise les coefs (en ecart type et en %)
edges[to=="BA",coef_sd:=coef/sd_ba]
edges[to=="BA",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean_ba)*100]

edges[to=="SD",coef_sd:=coef/sd_sd]
edges[to=="SD",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean_sd)*100]

edges[to=="DBHqm",coef_sd:=coef/sd_dbh]
edges[to=="DBHqm",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean_dbh)*100]


edges[to=="WDba",coef_sd:=coef/sd_wd]
edges[to=="WDba",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean_wd)*100]


edges[to=="AGB_Feld_Pan",coef_sd:=coef/sd_agb]
edges[to=="AGB_Feld_Pan",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean_agb)*100]


edges[to=="AGB_Feld_Reg",coef_sd:=coef/sd_agbreg]
edges[to=="AGB_Feld_Reg",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean_agbreg)*100]


edges[to=="AGB_Feld_Cont",coef_sd:=coef/sd_agbcont]
edges[to=="AGB_Feld_Cont",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean_agbcont)*100]

edges_brut<-edges
edges_brut2<-edges
data<-edges_brut2[,area:="South America"]
data[,coef_brut:=NA]
data2<-rbind(data2,data)

###coef non stand

sd_bio1<-brut[Continent=="South America"][,.(Bio1_WC,Bio1_CHELSA,Bio1_CRU,Bio1_ERA5,Bio1_TC,Bio1_MODIS)]
sd_bio1[, row_mean := rowMeans(.SD, na.rm = TRUE)]
sd_bio1<-sd_bio1[,sd(row_mean)]
data2[from=="bio1"&area=="South America",coef_brut:=(coef/sd_bio1)]

sd_bio12<-brut[Continent=="South America"][,.(Bio12_WC,Bio12_CHELSA,Bio12_CRU,Bio12_ERA5,Bio12_TC,Bio12_IMERG,Bio12_CHIRPS)]
sd_bio12[, row_mean := rowMeans(.SD, na.rm = TRUE)]
sd_bio12<-sd_bio12[,sd(row_mean)]
data2[from=="bio12"&area=="South America",coef_brut:=(coef/sd_bio12)]

sd_bio15<-brut[Continent=="South America"][,.(Bio15_WC,Bio15_CHELSA,Bio15_CRU,Bio15_ERA5,Bio15_TC,Bio15_IMERG,Bio15_CHIRPS)]
sd_bio15[, row_mean := rowMeans(.SD, na.rm = TRUE)]
sd_bio15<-sd_bio15[,sd(row_mean)]
data2[from=="bio15"&area=="South America",coef_brut:=(coef/sd_bio15)]

sd<-brut[Continent=="South America",sd(slope)]
data2[from=="slope"&area=="South America",coef_brut:=(coef/sd)]

sd<-brut[Continent=="South America",sd(sand)]
data2[from=="sand"&area=="South America",coef_brut:=(coef/sd)]

sd<-brut[Continent=="South America",sd(org)]
data2[from=="org"&area=="South America",coef_brut:=(coef/sd)]

sd<-brut[Continent=="South America",sd(ph)]
data2[from=="ph"&area=="South America",coef_brut:=(coef/sd)]

sd<-brut[Continent=="South America",sd(DBHqm)]
data2[from=="DBHqm"&area=="South America",coef_brut:=(coef/sd)]

sd<-brut[Continent=="South America",sd(SD)]
data2[from=="SD"&area=="South America",coef_brut:=(coef/sd)]


sd<-brut[Continent=="South America",sd(BA)]
data2[from=="BA"&area=="South America",coef_brut:=(coef/sd)]

sd<-brut[Continent=="South America",sd(WDba)]
data2[from=="WDba"&area=="South America",coef_brut:=(coef/sd)]
```


```{r }
###################################################################################################################################
###################################################################################################################################
###################################################################################################################################
#South America
###################################################################################################################################
###################################################################################################################################
###################################################################################################################################


###################################################################################################################################
###################################################################################################################################
##AGB_Feld_pan
###################################################################################################################################
###################################################################################################################################
################################################################################################################################### 
edges<-edges_brut[!to=="AGB_Feld_Reg"&!to=="AGB_Feld_Cont"] 
# Harmonisation des noms
edges[from=="bio1",from:="MAT"]
edges[from=="bio12",from:="TAP"]
edges[from=="bio15",from:="PS"]
edges[from=="ph",from:="pH"]
edges[from=="sand",from:="Sand "]
edges[from=="org",from:="Org. C "]
edges[from=="slope",from:="Slope"]
edges[from=="AGB_Feld_Pan",from:="AGB"]
edges[to=="AGB_Feld_Pan",to:="AGB"]

# Groupes de variables
climatiques    <- c("MAT", "TAP", "PS")
autres_exp     <- c("Org. C ", "pH", "Sand ", "Slope")
explicatives   <- c(climatiques, autres_exp)
structurelles  <- c("WDba", "BA", "SD", "DBHqm")
agb            <- "AGB"

# Initialisation layout
all_nodes <- unique(c(edges$from, edges$to))        
layout_mat <- matrix(NA, nrow = length(all_nodes), ncol = 2)
rownames(layout_mat) <- all_nodes

# Position manuelle
layout_mat["MAT", ]               <- c(0, 2.7)
layout_mat["TAP", ]               <- c(0, 2.5)
layout_mat["PS", ]                <- c(0, 2.3)
layout_mat["Org. C ", ]    <- c(0, 1.9)
layout_mat["pH", ]                <- c(0, 1.7)
layout_mat["Sand ", ]      <- c(0, 1.5)
layout_mat["Slope", ]             <- c(0, 1.3)

# Variables structurelles
y_agb <- 1.6
layout_mat["WDba", ]  <- c(1, y_agb + 1.1)
layout_mat["BA",   ]  <- c(0.8, y_agb + 0.5)
layout_mat["SD",   ]  <- c(1, y_agb - 0.3)
layout_mat["DBHqm", ] <- c(1.3,y_agb + 0.2 )
layout_mat["AGB", ]   <- c(2, 2.1)

# Mise en forme
df_layout <- as_tibble(layout_mat, rownames = "name")
colnames(df_layout) <- c("name", "x", "y")

# RMSE / R²
rmse_vals <- c(
  WDba  = rmse_mean_all_all[area=="south_america"&sub_rep=="WDba",rmse][[1]],
  BA    = rmse_mean_ba[area=="south_america"&sub_rep=="BA",rmse][[1]],
  SD    = rmse_mean_all_all[area=="south_america"&sub_rep=="SD",rmse][[1]],
  DBHqm = rmse_mean_dbh[area=="south_america"&sub_rep=="DBH_qm",rmse][[1]],
  AGB   = rmse_mean_agb_all[area=="south_america"&sub_rep=="AGB_Feld_Pan",rmse][[1]]
)

rsq_vals <- c(
  WDba  = rmse_mean_all_all[area=="south_america" & sub_rep=="WDba", rsquared][[1]],
  BA    = rmse_mean_ba[area=="south_america" & sub_rep=="BA", rsquared][[1]],
  SD    = rmse_mean_all_all[area=="south_america" & sub_rep=="SD", rsquared][[1]],
  DBHqm = rmse_mean_dbh[area=="south_america" & sub_rep=="DBH_qm", rsquared][[1]],
  AGB   = rmse_mean_agb_all[area=="south_america" & sub_rep=="AGB_Feld_Pan", rsquared][[1]]
)

# Graphe
edges_plot <- edges %>% filter(!is.na(coef_sd))
graph <- graph_from_data_frame(edges_plot, directed = TRUE)
E(graph)$weight <- edges_plot$coef_sd
E(graph)$color  <- ifelse(E(graph)$weight > 0, "forestgreen", "firebrick3")

df_layout <- df_layout %>%
  filter(name %in% V(graph)$name) %>%
  arrange(match(name, V(graph)$name))

edge_df <- igraph::as_data_frame(graph, what = "edges") %>%
  mutate(
    x = (df_layout$x[match(from, df_layout$name)] + df_layout$x[match(to, df_layout$name)]) / 2,
    y = (df_layout$y[match(from, df_layout$name)] + df_layout$y[match(to, df_layout$name)]) / 2,
    label = round(weight, 2),
    text_color = ifelse(weight > 0, "forestgreen", "firebrick3")
  )

E(graph)$edge_width <- case_when(
  abs(E(graph)$weight) < 0.1   ~ "< 0.1",
  abs(E(graph)$weight) < 0.25  ~ "0.1 ≤ coef < 0.25",
  abs(E(graph)$weight) < 0.5   ~ "0.25 ≤ coef < 0.5",
  abs(E(graph)$weight) < 0.75  ~ "0.5 ≤ coef < 0.75",
  TRUE                         ~ "coef ≥ 0.75"
)

# Labels riches avec ggtext
library(ggtext)
labels_rmse_rsq <- sapply(df_layout$name, function(var) {
  if (var %in% names(rmse_vals)) {
    paste0("<b>", var, "</b><br><span style='font-size:9pt;'>",
           "RMSE = ", round(rmse_vals[[var]], 2), "<br>",
           "R² = ", round(rsq_vals[[var]], 2), "</span>")
  } else if (var %in% explicatives) {
    paste0("<b>", var, "</b>")
  } else {
    var
  }
})

df_layout <- df_layout %>%
  mutate(label = ifelse(name %in% names(labels_rmse_rsq), labels_rmse_rsq[name], name))

# Tracé final
library(ggraph)
library(shadowtext)

five<-ggraph(graph, layout = "manual", x = df_layout$x, y = df_layout$y) +
  geom_edge_link(aes(color = I(color), width = edge_width),
                 arrow = arrow(length = unit(3, 'mm')),
                 end_cap = circle(13, 'mm'),
                 lineend = "round") +
  shadowtext::geom_shadowtext(
    data = edge_df,
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = label, color = text_color),
    size = 4,
    fontface = "bold",
    bg.colour = "white",
    bg.r = 0.15
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("forestgreen" = "forestgreen", "firebrick3" = "firebrick3"), guide = "none") +
  scale_edge_width_manual(
    values = c("< 0.1" = 0.5, "0.1 ≤ coef < 0.25" = 1, "0.25 ≤ coef < 0.5" = 1.5, "0.5 ≤ coef < 0.75" = 2, "coef ≥ 0.75" = 2.5),
    name = "Standardized coefficient (sd)",
    guide = guide_legend(override.aes = list(color = "grey1"))
  ) +
  geom_node_point(size = 32, shape = 21, fill = "white", color = "grey1", stroke = 1.5) +
  ggtext::geom_richtext(data = df_layout, aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
                        fill = NA, label.color = NA, size = 5, lineheight = 1.1) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(1.1, 2.8)) +
  theme_void() +
  ggtitle("South America") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 20))

five




##################################################################################################################################
#Pourc
#################################################################################################################################

################################################################################################################################### 
edges<-edges_brut[!to=="AGB_Feld_Reg"&!to=="AGB_Feld_Cont"] 
# Harmonisation des noms
edges[from=="bio1",from:="MAT"]
edges[from=="bio12",from:="TAP"]
edges[from=="bio15",from:="PS"]
edges[from=="ph",from:="pH"]
edges[from=="sand",from:="Sand "]
edges[from=="org",from:="Org. C "]
edges[from=="slope",from:="Slope"]
edges[from=="AGB_Feld_Pan",from:="AGB"]
edges[to=="AGB_Feld_Pan",to:="AGB"]

# Groupes de variables
climatiques    <- c("MAT", "TAP", "PS")
autres_exp     <- c("Org. C ", "pH", "Sand ", "Slope")
explicatives   <- c(climatiques, autres_exp)
structurelles  <- c("WDba", "BA", "SD", "DBHqm")
agb            <- "AGB"

# Initialisation layout
all_nodes <- unique(c(edges$from, edges$to))        
layout_mat <- matrix(NA, nrow = length(all_nodes), ncol = 2)
rownames(layout_mat) <- all_nodes

# Position manuelle
layout_mat["MAT", ]               <- c(0, 2.7)
layout_mat["TAP", ]               <- c(0, 2.5)
layout_mat["PS", ]                <- c(0, 2.3)
layout_mat["Org. C ", ]    <- c(0, 1.9)
layout_mat["pH", ]                <- c(0, 1.7)
layout_mat["Sand ", ]      <- c(0, 1.5)
layout_mat["Slope", ]             <- c(0, 1.3)

# Variables structurelles
y_agb <- 1.6
layout_mat["WDba", ]  <- c(1, y_agb + 1.1)
layout_mat["BA",   ]  <- c(0.8, y_agb + 0.5)
layout_mat["SD",   ]  <- c(1, y_agb - 0.3)
layout_mat["DBHqm", ] <- c(1.3,y_agb + 0.2 )
layout_mat["AGB", ]   <- c(2, 2.1)

# Mise en forme
df_layout <- as_tibble(layout_mat, rownames = "name")
colnames(df_layout) <- c("name", "x", "y")

# RMSE / R²
rmse_vals <- c(
  WDba  = rmse_mean_all_all[area=="south_america"&sub_rep=="WDba",rmse][[1]],
  BA    = rmse_mean_ba[area=="south_america"&sub_rep=="BA",rmse][[1]],
  SD    = rmse_mean_all_all[area=="south_america"&sub_rep=="SD",rmse][[1]],
  DBHqm = rmse_mean_dbh[area=="south_america"&sub_rep=="DBH_qm",rmse][[1]],
  AGB   = rmse_mean_agb_all[area=="south_america"&sub_rep=="AGB_Feld_Pan",rmse][[1]]
)

rsq_vals <- c(
  WDba  = rmse_mean_all_all[area=="south_america" & sub_rep=="WDba", rsquared][[1]],
  BA    = rmse_mean_ba[area=="south_america" & sub_rep=="BA", rsquared][[1]],
  SD    = rmse_mean_all_all[area=="south_america" & sub_rep=="SD", rsquared][[1]],
  DBHqm = rmse_mean_dbh[area=="south_america" & sub_rep=="DBH_qm", rsquared][[1]],
  AGB   = rmse_mean_agb_all[area=="south_america" & sub_rep=="AGB_Feld_Pan", rsquared][[1]]
)

# Graphe
edges_plot <- edges %>% filter(!is.na(coef_pourc))
graph <- graph_from_data_frame(edges_plot, directed = TRUE)
E(graph)$weight <- edges_plot$coef_pourc
E(graph)$color  <- ifelse(E(graph)$weight > 0, "forestgreen", "firebrick3")

df_layout <- df_layout %>%
  filter(name %in% V(graph)$name) %>%
  arrange(match(name, V(graph)$name))

edge_df <- igraph::as_data_frame(graph, what = "edges") %>%
  mutate(
    x = (df_layout$x[match(from, df_layout$name)] + df_layout$x[match(to, df_layout$name)]) / 2,
    y = (df_layout$y[match(from, df_layout$name)] + df_layout$y[match(to, df_layout$name)]) / 2,
    label = round(weight, 2),
    text_color = ifelse(weight > 0, "forestgreen", "firebrick3")
  )


E(graph)$edge_width <- case_when(
  abs(E(graph)$weight) < 1   ~ "< 1",
  abs(E(graph)$weight) < 5  ~ "1 ≤ coef < 5",
  abs(E(graph)$weight) < 10   ~ "5 ≤ coef < 10",
  abs(E(graph)$weight) < 20  ~ "10 ≤ coef < 20",
  TRUE                         ~ "coef ≥ 20"
)
E(graph)$edge_width <- factor(E(graph)$edge_width,
                              levels = c("< 1",
                                         "1 ≤ coef < 5",
                                         "5 ≤ coef < 10",
                                         "10 ≤ coef < 20",
                                         "coef ≥ 20"))
# Labels riches avec ggtext
library(ggtext)
labels_rmse_rsq <- sapply(df_layout$name, function(var) {
  if (var %in% names(rmse_vals)) {
    paste0("<b>", var, "</b><br><span style='font-size:9pt;'>",
           "RMSE = ", round(rmse_vals[[var]], 2), "<br>",
           "R² = ", round(rsq_vals[[var]], 2), "</span>")
  } else if (var %in% explicatives) {
    paste0("<b>", var, "</b>")
  } else {
    var
  }
})

df_layout <- df_layout %>%
  mutate(label = ifelse(name %in% names(labels_rmse_rsq), labels_rmse_rsq[name], name))

# Tracé final
library(ggraph)
library(shadowtext)

q<-ggraph(graph, layout = "manual", x = df_layout$x, y = df_layout$y) +
  geom_edge_link(aes(color = I(color), width = edge_width),
                 arrow = arrow(length = unit(3, 'mm')),
                 end_cap = circle(13, 'mm'),
                 lineend = "round") +
  shadowtext::geom_shadowtext(
    data = edge_df,
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = label, color = text_color),
    size = 4,
    fontface = "bold",
    bg.colour = "white",
    bg.r = 0.15
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("forestgreen" = "forestgreen", "firebrick3" = "firebrick3"), guide = "none") +
  scale_edge_width_manual(
   values = c("< 1" = 0.5, "1 ≤ coef < 5" = 1, "5 ≤ coef < 10" = 1.5, "10 ≤ coef < 20" = 2, "coef ≥ 20" = 2.5),
    name = "Standardized coefficient (%)",
    guide = guide_legend(override.aes = list(color = "grey1"))
  ) +
  geom_node_point(size = 32, shape = 21, fill = "white", color = "grey1", stroke = 1.5) +
  ggtext::geom_richtext(data = df_layout, aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
                        fill = NA, label.color = NA, size = 5, lineheight = 1.1) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(1.1, 2.8)) +
  theme_void() +
  ggtitle("South America") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 20))

q




```

###Asia
```{r }
brut<-fread("C:/Users/u237004/Documents/1_Boulot_SC/2_Papier Pan/Work/MM/7_Modele_AGB_sans_montane/Pantropical_dataset_2023plots_V2_N_55_1_SOIL.csv")
brut<-brut[!elevation.y>=1000]
mean_ba<-brut[Continent=="Eurasia"][!is.na(BA),mean(BA)]
sd_ba<-brut[Continent=="Eurasia"][!is.na(BA),sd(BA)]

mean_dbh<-brut[Continent=="Eurasia"][!is.na(DBHqm),mean(DBHqm)]
sd_dbh<-brut[Continent=="Eurasia"][!is.na(DBHqm),sd(DBHqm)]

mean_sd<-brut[Continent=="Eurasia"][!is.na(SD),mean(SD)]
sd_sd<-brut[Continent=="Eurasia"][!is.na(SD),sd(SD)]

mean_wd<-brut[Continent=="Eurasia"][!is.na(WDba),mean(WDba)]
sd_wd<-brut[Continent=="Eurasia"][!is.na(WDba),sd(WDba)]

mean_agb<-brut[Continent=="Eurasia"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Pan),mean(AGB_Feld_Pan)]
sd_agb<-brut[Continent=="Eurasia"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Pan),sd(AGB_Feld_Pan)]

mean_agbcont<-brut[Continent=="Eurasia"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Cont),mean(AGB_Feld_Cont)]
sd_agbcont<-brut[Continent=="Eurasia"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Cont),sd(AGB_Feld_Cont)]

mean_agbreg<-brut[Continent=="Eurasia"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Reg),mean(AGB_Feld_Reg)]
sd_agbreg<-brut[Continent=="Eurasia"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Reg),sd(AGB_Feld_Reg)]


a<-essais2[area=="asia",.(from=var,to=sub_rep,coef=estimate)]#env sur att D et att sur att D
b<-essais3[area=="asia",.(from=var,to=sub_rep,coef=estimate)]#env sur att D et att sur att D
c<-essais2bis[area=="asia",.(from=var,to=sub_rep,coef=estimate)]#env sur att D et att sur att D
d<-essais[area=="asia",.(from=var,to=sub_rep,coef=estimate)][to=="SD"]#j'ai toutes els directes vers attributs et entre ttributs
e<-essais4[area=="asia",.(from=var,to=sub_rep,coef=estimate)][from=="DBHqm"]#DBHqm et SD sur AGB
h<-essais4[area=="asia",.(from=var,to=sub_rep,coef=estimate)][from=="SD"]#DBHqm et SD sur AGB
g<-essais4bis[area=="asia",.(from=var,to=sub_rep,coef=estimate)][!from=="DBHqm"&!from=="SD"&!from=="WDba"]#BA et env sur AGB
f<-essais7[area=="asia",.(from=var,to=sub_rep,coef=estimate)][from=="WDba"]

edges<-rbind(a,b,c,d,e,f,g,h)
edges[to=="DBH_qm",to:="DBHqm"]

#je standardise les coefs (en ecart type et en %)
edges[to=="BA",coef_sd:=coef/sd_ba]
edges[to=="BA",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean_ba)*100]

edges[to=="SD",coef_sd:=coef/sd_sd]
edges[to=="SD",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean_sd)*100]

edges[to=="DBHqm",coef_sd:=coef/sd_dbh]
edges[to=="DBHqm",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean_dbh)*100]


edges[to=="WDba",coef_sd:=coef/sd_wd]
edges[to=="WDba",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean_wd)*100]


edges[to=="AGB_Feld_Pan",coef_sd:=coef/sd_agb]
edges[to=="AGB_Feld_Pan",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean_agb)*100]


edges[to=="AGB_Feld_Reg",coef_sd:=coef/sd_agbreg]
edges[to=="AGB_Feld_Reg",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean_agbreg)*100]


edges[to=="AGB_Feld_Cont",coef_sd:=coef/sd_agbcont]
edges[to=="AGB_Feld_Cont",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean_agbcont)*100]

edges_brut<-edges
edges_brut2<-edges
data<-edges_brut2[,area:="Asia"]
data[,coef_brut:=NA]
data2<-rbind(data2,data)

###coef non stand

sd_bio1<-brut[Continent=="Eurasia"][,.(Bio1_WC,Bio1_CHELSA,Bio1_CRU,Bio1_ERA5,Bio1_TC,Bio1_MODIS)]
sd_bio1[, row_mean := rowMeans(.SD, na.rm = TRUE)]
sd_bio1<-sd_bio1[,sd(row_mean)]
data2[from=="bio1"&area=="Asia",coef_brut:=(coef/sd_bio1)]

sd_bio12<-brut[Continent=="Eurasia"][,.(Bio12_WC,Bio12_CHELSA,Bio12_CRU,Bio12_ERA5,Bio12_TC,Bio12_IMERG,Bio12_CHIRPS)]
sd_bio12[, row_mean := rowMeans(.SD, na.rm = TRUE)]
sd_bio12<-sd_bio12[,sd(row_mean)]
data2[from=="bio12"&area=="Asia",coef_brut:=(coef/sd_bio12)]

sd_bio15<-brut[Continent=="Eurasia"][,.(Bio15_WC,Bio15_CHELSA,Bio15_CRU,Bio15_ERA5,Bio15_TC,Bio15_IMERG,Bio15_CHIRPS)]
sd_bio15[, row_mean := rowMeans(.SD, na.rm = TRUE)]
sd_bio15<-sd_bio15[,sd(row_mean)]
data2[from=="bio15"&area=="Asia",coef_brut:=(coef/sd_bio15)]

sd<-brut[Continent=="Eurasia",sd(slope)]
data2[from=="slope"&area=="Asia",coef_brut:=(coef/sd)]

sd<-brut[Continent=="Eurasia",sd(sand)]
data2[from=="sand"&area=="Asia",coef_brut:=(coef/sd)]

sd<-brut[Continent=="Eurasia",sd(org)]
data2[from=="org"&area=="Asia",coef_brut:=(coef/sd)]

sd<-brut[Continent=="Eurasia",sd(ph)]
data2[from=="ph"&area=="Asia",coef_brut:=(coef/sd)]

sd<-brut[Continent=="Eurasia",sd(DBHqm)]
data2[from=="DBHqm"&area=="Asia",coef_brut:=(coef/sd)]

sd<-brut[Continent=="Eurasia",sd(SD)]
data2[from=="SD"&area=="Asia",coef_brut:=(coef/sd)]

sd<-brut[Continent=="Eurasia",sd(BA)]
data2[from=="BA"&area=="Asia",coef_brut:=(coef/sd)]

sd<-brut[Continent=="Eurasia",sd(WDba)]
data2[from=="WDba"&area=="Asia",coef_brut:=(coef/sd)]
```


```{r }
###################################################################################################################################
###################################################################################################################################
###################################################################################################################################
#Asia
###################################################################################################################################
###################################################################################################################################
###################################################################################################################################


###################################################################################################################################
###################################################################################################################################
##AGB_Feld_pan
###################################################################################################################################
###################################################################################################################################
###################################################################################################################################
edges<-edges_brut[!to=="AGB_Feld_Reg"&!to=="AGB_Feld_Cont"] 
# Harmonisation des noms
edges[from=="bio1",from:="MAT"]
edges[from=="bio12",from:="TAP"]
edges[from=="bio15",from:="PS"]
edges[from=="ph",from:="pH"]
edges[from=="sand",from:="Sand "]
edges[from=="org",from:="Org. C "]
edges[from=="slope",from:="Slope"]
edges[from=="AGB_Feld_Pan",from:="AGB"]
edges[to=="AGB_Feld_Pan",to:="AGB"]

# Groupes de variables
climatiques    <- c("MAT", "TAP", "PS")
autres_exp     <- c("Org. C ", "pH", "Sand ", "Slope")
explicatives   <- c(climatiques, autres_exp)
structurelles  <- c("WDba", "BA", "SD", "DBHqm")
agb            <- "AGB"

# Initialisation layout
all_nodes <- unique(c(edges$from, edges$to))        
layout_mat <- matrix(NA, nrow = length(all_nodes), ncol = 2)
rownames(layout_mat) <- all_nodes

# Position manuelle
layout_mat["MAT", ]               <- c(0, 2.7)
layout_mat["TAP", ]               <- c(0, 2.5)
layout_mat["PS", ]                <- c(0, 2.3)
layout_mat["Org. C ", ]    <- c(0, 1.9)
layout_mat["pH", ]                <- c(0, 1.7)
layout_mat["Sand ", ]      <- c(0, 1.5)
layout_mat["Slope", ]             <- c(0, 1.3)

# Variables structurelles
y_agb <- 1.6
layout_mat["WDba", ]  <- c(1, y_agb + 1.1)
layout_mat["BA",   ]  <- c(0.8, y_agb + 0.5)
layout_mat["SD",   ]  <- c(1, y_agb - 0.3)
layout_mat["DBHqm", ] <- c(1.3,y_agb + 0.2 )
layout_mat["AGB", ]   <- c(2, 2.1)

# Mise en forme
df_layout <- as_tibble(layout_mat, rownames = "name")
colnames(df_layout) <- c("name", "x", "y")

# RMSE / R²
rmse_vals <- c(
  WDba  = rmse_mean_all_all[area=="asia"&sub_rep=="WDba",rmse][[1]],
  BA    = rmse_mean_ba[area=="asia"&sub_rep=="BA",rmse][[1]],
  SD    = rmse_mean_all_all[area=="asia"&sub_rep=="SD",rmse][[1]],
  DBHqm = rmse_mean_dbh[area=="asia"&sub_rep=="DBH_qm",rmse][[1]],
  AGB   = rmse_mean_agb_all[area=="asia"&sub_rep=="AGB_Feld_Pan",rmse][[1]]
)

rsq_vals <- c(
  WDba  = rmse_mean_all_all[area=="asia" & sub_rep=="WDba", rsquared][[1]],
  BA    = rmse_mean_ba[area=="asia" & sub_rep=="BA", rsquared][[1]],
  SD    = rmse_mean_all_all[area=="asia" & sub_rep=="SD", rsquared][[1]],
  DBHqm = rmse_mean_dbh[area=="asia" & sub_rep=="DBH_qm", rsquared][[1]],
  AGB   = rmse_mean_agb_all[area=="asia" & sub_rep=="AGB_Feld_Pan", rsquared][[1]]
)

# Graphe
edges_plot <- edges %>% filter(!is.na(coef_sd))
graph <- graph_from_data_frame(edges_plot, directed = TRUE)
E(graph)$weight <- edges_plot$coef_sd
E(graph)$color  <- ifelse(E(graph)$weight > 0, "forestgreen", "firebrick3")

df_layout <- df_layout %>%
  filter(name %in% V(graph)$name) %>%
  arrange(match(name, V(graph)$name))

edge_df <- igraph::as_data_frame(graph, what = "edges") %>%
  mutate(
    x = (df_layout$x[match(from, df_layout$name)] + df_layout$x[match(to, df_layout$name)]) / 2,
    y = (df_layout$y[match(from, df_layout$name)] + df_layout$y[match(to, df_layout$name)]) / 2,
    label = round(weight, 2),
    text_color = ifelse(weight > 0, "forestgreen", "firebrick3")
  )

E(graph)$edge_width <- case_when(
  abs(E(graph)$weight) < 0.1   ~ "< 0.1",
  abs(E(graph)$weight) < 0.25  ~ "0.1 ≤ coef < 0.25",
  abs(E(graph)$weight) < 0.5   ~ "0.25 ≤ coef < 0.5",
  abs(E(graph)$weight) < 0.75  ~ "0.5 ≤ coef < 0.75",
  TRUE                         ~ "coef ≥ 0.75"
)

# Labels riches avec ggtext
library(ggtext)
labels_rmse_rsq <- sapply(df_layout$name, function(var) {
  if (var %in% names(rmse_vals)) {
    paste0("<b>", var, "</b><br><span style='font-size:9pt;'>",
           "RMSE = ", round(rmse_vals[[var]], 2), "<br>",
           "R² = ", round(rsq_vals[[var]], 2), "</span>")
  } else if (var %in% explicatives) {
    paste0("<b>", var, "</b>")
  } else {
    var
  }
})

df_layout <- df_layout %>%
  mutate(label = ifelse(name %in% names(labels_rmse_rsq), labels_rmse_rsq[name], name))

# Tracé final
library(ggraph)
library(shadowtext)

o<-ggraph(graph, layout = "manual", x = df_layout$x, y = df_layout$y) +
  geom_edge_link(aes(color = I(color), width = edge_width),
                 arrow = arrow(length = unit(3, 'mm')),
                 end_cap = circle(13, 'mm'),
                 lineend = "round") +
  shadowtext::geom_shadowtext(
    data = edge_df,
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = label, color = text_color),
    size = 4,
    fontface = "bold",
    bg.colour = "white",
    bg.r = 0.15
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("forestgreen" = "forestgreen", "firebrick3" = "firebrick3"), guide = "none") +
  scale_edge_width_manual(
    values = c("< 0.1" = 0.5, "0.1 ≤ coef < 0.25" = 1, "0.25 ≤ coef < 0.5" = 1.5, "0.5 ≤ coef < 0.75" = 2, "coef ≥ 0.75" = 2.5),
    name = "Standardized coefficient (sd)",
    guide = guide_legend(override.aes = list(color = "grey1"))
  ) +
  geom_node_point(size = 32, shape = 21, fill = "white", color = "grey1", stroke = 1.5) +
  ggtext::geom_richtext(data = df_layout, aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
                        fill = NA, label.color = NA, size = 5, lineheight = 1.1) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(1.1, 2.8)) +
  theme_void() +
  ggtitle("Asia") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 20))

o



##################################################################################################################################
#Pourc
#################################################################################################################################

################################################################################################################################### 
edges<-edges_brut[!to=="AGB_Feld_Reg"&!to=="AGB_Feld_Cont"] 
# Harmonisation des noms
edges[from=="bio1",from:="MAT"]
edges[from=="bio12",from:="TAP"]
edges[from=="bio15",from:="PS"]
edges[from=="ph",from:="pH"]
edges[from=="sand",from:="Sand "]
edges[from=="org",from:="Org. C "]
edges[from=="slope",from:="Slope"]
edges[from=="AGB_Feld_Pan",from:="AGB"]
edges[to=="AGB_Feld_Pan",to:="AGB"]

# Groupes de variables
climatiques    <- c("MAT", "TAP", "PS")
autres_exp     <- c("Org. C ", "pH", "Sand ", "Slope")
explicatives   <- c(climatiques, autres_exp)
structurelles  <- c("WDba", "BA", "SD", "DBHqm")
agb            <- "AGB"

# Initialisation layout
all_nodes <- unique(c(edges$from, edges$to))        
layout_mat <- matrix(NA, nrow = length(all_nodes), ncol = 2)
rownames(layout_mat) <- all_nodes

# Position manuelle
layout_mat["MAT", ]               <- c(0, 2.7)
layout_mat["TAP", ]               <- c(0, 2.5)
layout_mat["PS", ]                <- c(0, 2.3)
layout_mat["Org. C ", ]    <- c(0, 1.9)
layout_mat["pH", ]                <- c(0, 1.7)
layout_mat["Sand ", ]      <- c(0, 1.5)
layout_mat["Slope", ]             <- c(0, 1.3)

# Variables structurelles
y_agb <- 1.6
layout_mat["WDba", ]  <- c(1, y_agb + 1.1)
layout_mat["BA",   ]  <- c(0.8, y_agb + 0.5)
layout_mat["SD",   ]  <- c(1, y_agb - 0.3)
layout_mat["DBHqm", ] <- c(1.3,y_agb + 0.2 )
layout_mat["AGB", ]   <- c(2, 2.1)

# Mise en forme
df_layout <- as_tibble(layout_mat, rownames = "name")
colnames(df_layout) <- c("name", "x", "y")

# RMSE / R²
rmse_vals <- c(
  WDba  = rmse_mean_all_all[area=="asia"&sub_rep=="WDba",rmse][[1]],
  BA    = rmse_mean_ba[area=="asia"&sub_rep=="BA",rmse][[1]],
  SD    = rmse_mean_all_all[area=="asia"&sub_rep=="SD",rmse][[1]],
  DBHqm = rmse_mean_dbh[area=="asia"&sub_rep=="DBH_qm",rmse][[1]],
  AGB   = rmse_mean_agb_all[area=="asia"&sub_rep=="AGB_Feld_Pan",rmse][[1]]
)

rsq_vals <- c(
  WDba  = rmse_mean_all_all[area=="asia" & sub_rep=="WDba", rsquared][[1]],
  BA    = rmse_mean_ba[area=="asia" & sub_rep=="BA", rsquared][[1]],
  SD    = rmse_mean_all_all[area=="asia" & sub_rep=="SD", rsquared][[1]],
  DBHqm = rmse_mean_dbh[area=="asia" & sub_rep=="DBH_qm", rsquared][[1]],
  AGB   = rmse_mean_agb_all[area=="asia" & sub_rep=="AGB_Feld_Pan", rsquared][[1]]
)

# Graphe
edges_plot <- edges %>% filter(!is.na(coef_pourc))
graph <- graph_from_data_frame(edges_plot, directed = TRUE)
E(graph)$weight <- edges_plot$coef_pourc
E(graph)$color  <- ifelse(E(graph)$weight > 0, "forestgreen", "firebrick3")

df_layout <- df_layout %>%
  filter(name %in% V(graph)$name) %>%
  arrange(match(name, V(graph)$name))

edge_df <- igraph::as_data_frame(graph, what = "edges") %>%
  mutate(
    x = (df_layout$x[match(from, df_layout$name)] + df_layout$x[match(to, df_layout$name)]) / 2,
    y = (df_layout$y[match(from, df_layout$name)] + df_layout$y[match(to, df_layout$name)]) / 2,
    label = round(weight, 2),
    text_color = ifelse(weight > 0, "forestgreen", "firebrick3")
  )


E(graph)$edge_width <- case_when(
  abs(E(graph)$weight) < 1   ~ "< 1",
  abs(E(graph)$weight) < 5  ~ "1 ≤ coef < 5",
```
