```{r }
  abs(E(graph)$weight) < 10   ~ "5 ≤ coef < 10",
  abs(E(graph)$weight) < 20  ~ "10 ≤ coef < 20",
  TRUE                         ~ "coef ≥ 20"
)
E(graph)$edge_width <- factor(E(graph)$edge_width,
                              levels = c("< 1",
                                         "1 ≤ coef < 5",
                                         "5 ≤ coef < 10",
                                         "10 ≤ coef < 20",
                                         "coef ≥ 20"))
# Labels riches avec ggtext
library(ggtext)
labels_rmse_rsq <- sapply(df_layout$name, function(var) {
  if (var %in% names(rmse_vals)) {
    paste0("<b>", var, "</b><br><span style='font-size:9pt;'>",
           "RMSE = ", round(rmse_vals[[var]], 2), "<br>",
           "R² = ", round(rsq_vals[[var]], 2), "</span>")
  } else if (var %in% explicatives) {
    paste0("<b>", var, "</b>")
  } else {
    var
  }
})

df_layout <- df_layout %>%
  mutate(label = ifelse(name %in% names(labels_rmse_rsq), labels_rmse_rsq[name], name))

# Tracé final
library(ggraph)
library(shadowtext)

p<-ggraph(graph, layout = "manual", x = df_layout$x, y = df_layout$y) +
  geom_edge_link(aes(color = I(color), width = edge_width),
                 arrow = arrow(length = unit(3, 'mm')),
                 end_cap = circle(13, 'mm'),
                 lineend = "round") +
  shadowtext::geom_shadowtext(
    data = edge_df,
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = label, color = text_color),
    size = 4,
    fontface = "bold",
    bg.colour = "white",
    bg.r = 0.15
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("forestgreen" = "forestgreen", "firebrick3" = "firebrick3"), guide = "none") +
  scale_edge_width_manual(
    values = c("< 1" = 0.5, "1 ≤ coef < 5" = 1, "5 ≤ coef < 10" = 1.5, "10 ≤ coef < 20" = 2, "coef ≥ 20" = 2.5),
    name = "Standardized coefficient (%)",
    guide = guide_legend(override.aes = list(color = "grey1"))
  ) +
  geom_node_point(size = 32, shape = 21, fill = "white", color = "grey1", stroke = 1.5) +
  ggtext::geom_richtext(data = df_layout, aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
                        fill = NA, label.color = NA, size = 5, lineheight = 1.1) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(1.1, 2.8)) +
  theme_void() +
  ggtitle("Asia") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 20))

p




```

###Africa
```{r }
brut<-fread("C:/Users/u237004/Documents/1_Boulot_SC/2_Papier Pan/Work/MM/7_Modele_AGB_sans_montane/Pantropical_dataset_2023plots_V2_N_55_1_SOIL.csv")
brut<-brut[!elevation.y>=1000]
mean_ba<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(BA),mean(BA)]
sd_ba<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(BA),sd(BA)]

mean_dbh<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(DBHqm),mean(DBHqm)]
sd_dbh<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(DBHqm),sd(DBHqm)]

mean_sd<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(SD),mean(SD)]
sd_sd<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(SD),sd(SD)]

mean_wd<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(WDba),mean(WDba)]
sd_wd<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(WDba),sd(WDba)]

mean_agb<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Pan),mean(AGB_Feld_Pan)]
sd_agb<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Pan),sd(AGB_Feld_Pan)]

mean_agbcont<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Cont),mean(AGB_Feld_Cont)]
sd_agbcont<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Cont),sd(AGB_Feld_Cont)]

mean_agbreg<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Reg),mean(AGB_Feld_Reg)]
sd_agbreg<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Reg),sd(AGB_Feld_Reg)]



a<-essais2[area=="africa",.(from=var,to=sub_rep,coef=estimate)]#env sur att D et att sur att D
b<-essais3[area=="africa",.(from=var,to=sub_rep,coef=estimate)]#env sur att D et att sur att D
c<-essais2bis[area=="africa",.(from=var,to=sub_rep,coef=estimate)]#env sur att D et att sur att D
d<-essais[area=="africa",.(from=var,to=sub_rep,coef=estimate)][to=="SD"]#j'ai toutes els directes vers attributs et entre ttributs
e<-essais4[area=="africa",.(from=var,to=sub_rep,coef=estimate)][from=="DBHqm"]#DBHqm et SD sur AGB
h<-essais4[area=="africa",.(from=var,to=sub_rep,coef=estimate)][from=="SD"]#DBHqm et SD sur AGB
g<-essais4bis[area=="africa",.(from=var,to=sub_rep,coef=estimate)][!from=="DBHqm"&!from=="SD"&!from=="WDba"]#BA et env sur AGB
f<-essais7[area=="africa",.(from=var,to=sub_rep,coef=estimate)][from=="WDba"]

edges<-rbind(a,b,c,d,e,f,g,h)
edges[to=="DBH_qm",to:="DBHqm"]

#je standardise les coefs (en ecart type et en %)
edges[to=="BA",coef_sd:=coef/sd_ba]
edges[to=="BA",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean_ba)*100]

edges[to=="SD",coef_sd:=coef/sd_sd]
edges[to=="SD",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean_sd)*100]

edges[to=="DBHqm",coef_sd:=coef/sd_dbh]
edges[to=="DBHqm",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean_dbh)*100]


edges[to=="WDba",coef_sd:=coef/sd_wd]
edges[to=="WDba",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean_wd)*100]


edges[to=="AGB_Feld_Pan",coef_sd:=coef/sd_agb]
edges[to=="AGB_Feld_Pan",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean_agb)*100]


edges[to=="AGB_Feld_Reg",coef_sd:=coef/sd_agbreg]
edges[to=="AGB_Feld_Reg",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean_agbreg)*100]


edges[to=="AGB_Feld_Cont",coef_sd:=coef/sd_agbcont]
edges[to=="AGB_Feld_Cont",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean_agbcont)*100]

edges_brut<-edges
edges_brut2<-edges
data<-edges_brut2[,area:="Africa"]
data[,coef_brut:=NA]
data2<-rbind(data2,data)

###coef non stand

sd_bio1<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][,.(Bio1_WC,Bio1_CHELSA,Bio1_CRU,Bio1_ERA5,Bio1_TC,Bio1_MODIS)]
sd_bio1[, row_mean := rowMeans(.SD, na.rm = TRUE)]
sd_bio1<-sd_bio1[,sd(row_mean)]
data2[from=="bio1"&area=="Africa",coef_brut:=(coef/sd_bio1)]

sd_bio12<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][,.(Bio12_WC,Bio12_CHELSA,Bio12_CRU,Bio12_ERA5,Bio12_TC,Bio12_IMERG,Bio12_CHIRPS)]
sd_bio12[, row_mean := rowMeans(.SD, na.rm = TRUE)]
sd_bio12<-sd_bio12[,sd(row_mean)]
data2[from=="bio12"&area=="Africa",coef_brut:=(coef/sd_bio12)]

sd_bio15<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][,.(Bio15_WC,Bio15_CHELSA,Bio15_CRU,Bio15_ERA5,Bio15_TC,Bio15_IMERG,Bio15_CHIRPS)]
sd_bio15[, row_mean := rowMeans(.SD, na.rm = TRUE)]
sd_bio15<-sd_bio15[,sd(row_mean)]
data2[from=="bio15"&area=="Africa",coef_brut:=(coef/sd_bio15)]

sd<-brut[Continent=="Africa",sd(slope)]
data2[from=="slope"&area=="Africa",coef_brut:=(coef/sd)]

sd<-brut[Continent=="Africa",sd(sand)]
data2[from=="sand"&area=="Africa",coef_brut:=(coef/sd)]

sd<-brut[Continent=="Africa",sd(org)]
data2[from=="org"&area=="Africa",coef_brut:=(coef/sd)]

sd<-brut[Continent=="Africa",sd(ph)]
data2[from=="ph"&area=="Africa",coef_brut:=(coef/sd)]

sd<-brut[Continent=="Africa",sd(DBHqm)]
data2[from=="DBHqm"&area=="Africa",coef_brut:=(coef/sd)]

sd<-brut[Continent=="Africa",sd(SD)]
data2[from=="SD"&area=="Africa",coef_brut:=(coef/sd)]

sd<-brut[Continent=="Africa",sd(BA)]
data2[from=="BA"&area=="Africa",coef_brut:=(coef/sd)]

sd<-brut[Continent=="Africa",sd(WDba)]
data2[from=="WDba"&area=="Africa",coef_brut:=(coef/sd)]
```


```{r }
###################################################################################################################################
###################################################################################################################################
###################################################################################################################################
#Africa
###################################################################################################################################
###################################################################################################################################
###################################################################################################################################


###################################################################################################################################
###################################################################################################################################
##AGB_Feld_pan
###################################################################################################################################
###################################################################################################################################
################################################################################################################################### 
edges<-edges_brut[!to=="AGB_Feld_Reg"&!to=="AGB_Feld_Cont"] 
# Harmonisation des noms
edges[from=="bio1",from:="MAT"]
edges[from=="bio12",from:="TAP"]
edges[from=="bio15",from:="PS"]
edges[from=="ph",from:="pH"]
edges[from=="sand",from:="Sand "]
edges[from=="org",from:="Org. C "]
edges[from=="slope",from:="Slope"]
edges[from=="AGB_Feld_Pan",from:="AGB"]
edges[to=="AGB_Feld_Pan",to:="AGB"]

# Groupes de variables
climatiques    <- c("MAT", "TAP", "PS")
autres_exp     <- c("Org. C ", "pH", "Sand ", "Slope")
explicatives   <- c(climatiques, autres_exp)
structurelles  <- c("WDba", "BA", "SD", "DBHqm")
agb            <- "AGB"

# Initialisation layout
all_nodes <- unique(c(edges$from, edges$to))        
layout_mat <- matrix(NA, nrow = length(all_nodes), ncol = 2)
rownames(layout_mat) <- all_nodes

# Position manuelle
layout_mat["MAT", ]               <- c(0, 2.7)
layout_mat["TAP", ]               <- c(0, 2.5)
layout_mat["PS", ]                <- c(0, 2.3)
layout_mat["Org. C ", ]    <- c(0, 1.9)
layout_mat["pH", ]                <- c(0, 1.7)
layout_mat["Sand ", ]      <- c(0, 1.5)
layout_mat["Slope", ]             <- c(0, 1.3)

# Variables structurelles
y_agb <- 1.6
layout_mat["WDba", ]  <- c(1, y_agb + 1.1)
layout_mat["BA",   ]  <- c(0.8, y_agb + 0.5)
layout_mat["SD",   ]  <- c(1, y_agb - 0.3)
layout_mat["DBHqm", ] <- c(1.3,y_agb + 0.2 )
layout_mat["AGB", ]   <- c(2, 2.1)

# Mise en forme
df_layout <- as_tibble(layout_mat, rownames = "name")
colnames(df_layout) <- c("name", "x", "y")

# RMSE / R²
rmse_vals <- c(
  WDba  = rmse_mean_all_all[area=="africa"&sub_rep=="WDba",rmse][[1]],
  BA    = rmse_mean_ba[area=="africa"&sub_rep=="BA",rmse][[1]],
  SD    = rmse_mean_all_all[area=="africa"&sub_rep=="SD",rmse][[1]],
  DBHqm = rmse_mean_dbh[area=="africa"&sub_rep=="DBH_qm",rmse][[1]],
  AGB   = rmse_mean_agb_all[area=="africa"&sub_rep=="AGB_Feld_Pan",rmse][[1]]
)

rsq_vals <- c(
  WDba  = rmse_mean_all_all[area=="africa" & sub_rep=="WDba", rsquared][[1]],
  BA    = rmse_mean_ba[area=="africa" & sub_rep=="BA", rsquared][[1]],
  SD    = rmse_mean_all_all[area=="africa" & sub_rep=="SD", rsquared][[1]],
  DBHqm = rmse_mean_dbh[area=="africa" & sub_rep=="DBH_qm", rsquared][[1]],
  AGB   = rmse_mean_agb_all[area=="africa" & sub_rep=="AGB_Feld_Pan", rsquared][[1]]
)

# Graphe
edges_plot <- edges %>% filter(!is.na(coef_sd))
graph <- graph_from_data_frame(edges_plot, directed = TRUE)
E(graph)$weight <- edges_plot$coef_sd
E(graph)$color  <- ifelse(E(graph)$weight > 0, "forestgreen", "firebrick3")

df_layout <- df_layout %>%
  filter(name %in% V(graph)$name) %>%
  arrange(match(name, V(graph)$name))

edge_df <- igraph::as_data_frame(graph, what = "edges") %>%
  mutate(
    x = (df_layout$x[match(from, df_layout$name)] + df_layout$x[match(to, df_layout$name)]) / 2,
    y = (df_layout$y[match(from, df_layout$name)] + df_layout$y[match(to, df_layout$name)]) / 2,
    label = round(weight, 2),
    text_color = ifelse(weight > 0, "forestgreen", "firebrick3")
  )

E(graph)$edge_width <- case_when(
  abs(E(graph)$weight) < 0.1   ~ "< 0.1",
  abs(E(graph)$weight) < 0.25  ~ "0.1 ≤ coef < 0.25",
  abs(E(graph)$weight) < 0.5   ~ "0.25 ≤ coef < 0.5",
  abs(E(graph)$weight) < 0.75  ~ "0.5 ≤ coef < 0.75",
  TRUE                         ~ "coef ≥ 0.75"
)

# Labels riches avec ggtext
library(ggtext)
labels_rmse_rsq <- sapply(df_layout$name, function(var) {
  if (var %in% names(rmse_vals)) {
    paste0("<b>", var, "</b><br><span style='font-size:9pt;'>",
           "RMSE = ", round(rmse_vals[[var]], 2), "<br>",
           "R² = ", round(rsq_vals[[var]], 2), "</span>")
  } else if (var %in% explicatives) {
    paste0("<b>", var, "</b>")
  } else {
    var
  }
})

df_layout <- df_layout %>%
  mutate(label = ifelse(name %in% names(labels_rmse_rsq), labels_rmse_rsq[name], name))

# Tracé final
library(ggraph)
library(shadowtext)

i<-ggraph(graph, layout = "manual", x = df_layout$x, y = df_layout$y) +
  geom_edge_link(aes(color = I(color), width = edge_width),
                 arrow = arrow(length = unit(3, 'mm')),
                 end_cap = circle(13, 'mm'),
                 lineend = "round") +
  shadowtext::geom_shadowtext(
    data = edge_df,
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = label, color = text_color),
    size = 4,
    fontface = "bold",
    bg.colour = "white",
    bg.r = 0.15
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("forestgreen" = "forestgreen", "firebrick3" = "firebrick3"), guide = "none") +
  scale_edge_width_manual(
    values = c("< 0.1" = 0.5, "0.1 ≤ coef < 0.25" = 1, "0.25 ≤ coef < 0.5" = 1.5, "0.5 ≤ coef < 0.75" = 2, "coef ≥ 0.75" = 2.5),
    name = "Standardized coefficient (sd)",
    guide = guide_legend(override.aes = list(color = "grey1"))
  ) +
  geom_node_point(size = 32, shape = 21, fill = "white", color = "grey1", stroke = 1.5) +
  ggtext::geom_richtext(data = df_layout, aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
                        fill = NA, label.color = NA, size = 5, lineheight = 1.1) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(1.1, 2.8)) +
  theme_void() +
  ggtitle("Africa") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 20))

i



##################################################################################################################################
#Pourc
#################################################################################################################################

################################################################################################################################### 
edges<-edges_brut[!to=="AGB_Feld_Reg"&!to=="AGB_Feld_Cont"] 
# Harmonisation des noms
edges[from=="bio1",from:="MAT"]
edges[from=="bio12",from:="TAP"]
edges[from=="bio15",from:="PS"]
edges[from=="ph",from:="pH"]
edges[from=="sand",from:="Sand "]
edges[from=="org",from:="Org. C "]
edges[from=="slope",from:="Slope"]
edges[from=="AGB_Feld_Pan",from:="AGB"]
edges[to=="AGB_Feld_Pan",to:="AGB"]

# Groupes de variables
climatiques    <- c("MAT", "TAP", "PS")
autres_exp     <- c("Org. C ", "pH", "Sand ", "Slope")
explicatives   <- c(climatiques, autres_exp)
structurelles  <- c("WDba", "BA", "SD", "DBHqm")
agb            <- "AGB"

# Initialisation layout
all_nodes <- unique(c(edges$from, edges$to))        
layout_mat <- matrix(NA, nrow = length(all_nodes), ncol = 2)
rownames(layout_mat) <- all_nodes

# Position manuelle
layout_mat["MAT", ]               <- c(0, 2.7)
layout_mat["TAP", ]               <- c(0, 2.5)
layout_mat["PS", ]                <- c(0, 2.3)
layout_mat["Org. C ", ]    <- c(0, 1.9)
layout_mat["pH", ]                <- c(0, 1.7)
layout_mat["Sand ", ]      <- c(0, 1.5)
layout_mat["Slope", ]             <- c(0, 1.3)

# Variables structurelles
y_agb <- 1.6
layout_mat["WDba", ]  <- c(1, y_agb + 1.1)
layout_mat["BA",   ]  <- c(0.8, y_agb + 0.5)
layout_mat["SD",   ]  <- c(1, y_agb - 0.3)
layout_mat["DBHqm", ] <- c(1.3,y_agb + 0.2 )
layout_mat["AGB", ]   <- c(2, 2.1)

# Mise en forme
df_layout <- as_tibble(layout_mat, rownames = "name")
colnames(df_layout) <- c("name", "x", "y")

# RMSE / R²
rmse_vals <- c(
  WDba  = rmse_mean_all_all[area=="africa"&sub_rep=="WDba",rmse][[1]],
  BA    = rmse_mean_ba[area=="africa"&sub_rep=="BA",rmse][[1]],
  SD    = rmse_mean_all_all[area=="africa"&sub_rep=="SD",rmse][[1]],
  DBHqm = rmse_mean_dbh[area=="africa"&sub_rep=="DBH_qm",rmse][[1]],
  AGB   = rmse_mean_agb_all[area=="africa"&sub_rep=="AGB_Feld_Pan",rmse][[1]]
)

rsq_vals <- c(
  WDba  = rmse_mean_all_all[area=="africa" & sub_rep=="WDba", rsquared][[1]],
  BA    = rmse_mean_ba[area=="africa" & sub_rep=="BA", rsquared][[1]],
  SD    = rmse_mean_all_all[area=="africa" & sub_rep=="SD", rsquared][[1]],
  DBHqm = rmse_mean_dbh[area=="africa" & sub_rep=="DBH_qm", rsquared][[1]],
  AGB   = rmse_mean_agb_all[area=="africa" & sub_rep=="AGB_Feld_Pan", rsquared][[1]]
)

# Graphe
edges_plot <- edges %>% filter(!is.na(coef_pourc))
graph <- graph_from_data_frame(edges_plot, directed = TRUE)
E(graph)$weight <- edges_plot$coef_pourc
E(graph)$color  <- ifelse(E(graph)$weight > 0, "forestgreen", "firebrick3")

df_layout <- df_layout %>%
  filter(name %in% V(graph)$name) %>%
  arrange(match(name, V(graph)$name))

edge_df <- igraph::as_data_frame(graph, what = "edges") %>%
  mutate(
    x = (df_layout$x[match(from, df_layout$name)] + df_layout$x[match(to, df_layout$name)]) / 2,
    y = (df_layout$y[match(from, df_layout$name)] + df_layout$y[match(to, df_layout$name)]) / 2,
    label = round(weight, 2),
    text_color = ifelse(weight > 0, "forestgreen", "firebrick3")
  )


E(graph)$edge_width <- case_when(
  abs(E(graph)$weight) < 1   ~ "< 1",
  abs(E(graph)$weight) < 5  ~ "1 ≤ coef < 5",
  abs(E(graph)$weight) < 10   ~ "5 ≤ coef < 10",
  abs(E(graph)$weight) < 20  ~ "10 ≤ coef < 20",
  TRUE                         ~ "coef ≥ 20"
)
E(graph)$edge_width <- factor(E(graph)$edge_width,
                              levels = c("< 1",
                                         "1 ≤ coef < 5",
                                         "5 ≤ coef < 10",
                                         "10 ≤ coef < 20",
                                         "coef ≥ 20"))
# Labels riches avec ggtext
library(ggtext)
labels_rmse_rsq <- sapply(df_layout$name, function(var) {
  if (var %in% names(rmse_vals)) {
    paste0("<b>", var, "</b><br><span style='font-size:9pt;'>",
           "RMSE = ", round(rmse_vals[[var]], 2), "<br>",
           "R² = ", round(rsq_vals[[var]], 2), "</span>")
  } else if (var %in% explicatives) {
    paste0("<b>", var, "</b>")
  } else {
    var
  }
})

df_layout <- df_layout %>%
  mutate(label = ifelse(name %in% names(labels_rmse_rsq), labels_rmse_rsq[name], name))

# Tracé final
library(ggraph)
library(shadowtext)

j<-ggraph(graph, layout = "manual", x = df_layout$x, y = df_layout$y) +
  geom_edge_link(aes(color = I(color), width = edge_width),
                 arrow = arrow(length = unit(3, 'mm')),
                 end_cap = circle(13, 'mm'),
                 lineend = "round") +
  shadowtext::geom_shadowtext(
    data = edge_df,
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = label, color = text_color),
    size = 4,
    fontface = "bold",
    bg.colour = "white",
    bg.r = 0.15
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("forestgreen" = "forestgreen", "firebrick3" = "firebrick3"), guide = "none") +
  scale_edge_width_manual(
     values = c("< 1" = 0.5, "1 ≤ coef < 5" = 1, "5 ≤ coef < 10" = 1.5, "10 ≤ coef < 20" = 2, "coef ≥ 20" = 2.5),
    name = "Standardized coefficient (%)",
    guide = guide_legend(override.aes = list(color = "grey1"))
  ) +
  geom_node_point(size = 32, shape = 21, fill = "white", color = "grey1", stroke = 1.5) +
  ggtext::geom_richtext(data = df_layout, aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
                        fill = NA, label.color = NA, size = 5, lineheight = 1.1) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(1.1, 2.8)) +
  theme_void() +
  ggtitle("Africa") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 20))

j




```

###Africa controlée 

#####a) global
```{r }
brut<-fread("C:/Users/u237004/Documents/1_Boulot_SC/2_Papier Pan/Work/MM/7_Modele_AGB_sans_montane/Pantropical_dataset_2023plots_V2_N_55_1_SOIL.csv")
brut<-brut[!elevation.y>=1000]
pion<-fread("C:/Users/u237004/Documents/1_Boulot_SC/2_Papier Pan/Work/MM/7_Modele_AGB_sans_montane/pourc_pionnier_Af.csv")

result <- merge(brut, pion[, .(plot, Proportion)], by.x = "PLT_trois_bis", by.y = "plot", all.x = TRUE)
result[is.na(Proportion)&Continent=="Africa",uniqueN(PLT_trois_bis)]#28 plots ont pas

result<-result[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(Proportion)]
result<-result[!elevation.y>=1000]

mean_ba<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(BA),mean(BA)]
sd_ba<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(BA),sd(BA)]

mean_dbh<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(DBHqm),mean(DBHqm)]
sd_dbh<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(DBHqm),sd(DBHqm)]

mean_sd<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(SD),mean(SD)]
sd_sd<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(SD),sd(SD)]

mean_wd<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(WDba),mean(WDba)]
sd_wd<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(WDba),sd(WDba)]

mean_agb<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Pan),mean(AGB_Feld_Pan)]
sd_agb<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Pan),sd(AGB_Feld_Pan)]

mean_agbcont<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Cont),mean(AGB_Feld_Cont)]
sd_agbcont<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Cont),sd(AGB_Feld_Cont)]

mean_agbreg<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Reg),mean(AGB_Feld_Reg)]
sd_agbreg<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Reg),sd(AGB_Feld_Reg)]

mean_prop<-result[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(Proportion),mean(Proportion)]
sd_prop<-result[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(Proportion),sd(Proportion)]


a<-essais2_af[area=="africa",.(from=var,to=sub_rep,coef=estimate)]#env sur att D et att sur att D
b<-essais3_af[area=="africa",.(from=var,to=sub_rep,coef=estimate)]#env sur att D et att sur att D
c<-essais2bis_af[area=="africa",.(from=var,to=sub_rep,coef=estimate)]#env sur att D et att sur att D
d<-essais_af[area=="africa",.(from=var,to=sub_rep,coef=estimate)][to=="SD"]#j'ai toutes els directes vers attributs et entre ttributs
e<-essais4_af[area=="africa",.(from=var,to=sub_rep,coef=estimate)][from=="DBHqm"]#DBHqm et SD sur AGB
h<-essais4_af[area=="africa",.(from=var,to=sub_rep,coef=estimate)][from=="SD"]#DBHqm et SD sur AGB
g<-essais4bis_af[area=="africa",.(from=var,to=sub_rep,coef=estimate)][!from=="DBHqm"&!from=="SD"&!from=="WDba"]#BA et env sur AGB
f<-essais7_af[area=="africa",.(from=var,to=sub_rep,coef=estimate)][from=="WDba"]

edges<-rbind(a,b,c,d,e,f,g,h)
edges[to=="DBH_qm",to:="DBHqm"]

#je standardise les coefs (en ecart type et en %)
edges[to=="BA",coef_sd:=coef/sd_ba]
edges[to=="BA",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean_ba)*100]

edges[to=="SD",coef_sd:=coef/sd_sd]
edges[to=="SD",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean_sd)*100]

edges[to=="DBHqm",coef_sd:=coef/sd_dbh]
edges[to=="DBHqm",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean_dbh)*100]


edges[to=="WDba",coef_sd:=coef/sd_wd]
edges[to=="WDba",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean_wd)*100]


edges[to=="AGB_Feld_Pan",coef_sd:=coef/sd_agb]
edges[to=="AGB_Feld_Pan",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean_agb)*100]


edges[to=="AGB_Feld_Reg",coef_sd:=coef/sd_agbreg]
edges[to=="AGB_Feld_Reg",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean_agbreg)*100]


edges[to=="AGB_Feld_Cont",coef_sd:=coef/sd_agbcont]
edges[to=="AGB_Feld_Cont",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean_agbcont)*100]

edges[to=="Proportion",coef_sd:=coef/sd_prop]
edges[to=="Proportion",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean_prop)*100]

edges_brut<-edges
edges_brut2<-edges
data<-edges_brut2[,area:="Africa_bis"]
data[,coef_brut:=NA]
data2<-rbind(data2,data)

###coef non stand

sd_bio1<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][,.(Bio1_WC,Bio1_CHELSA,Bio1_CRU,Bio1_ERA5,Bio1_TC,Bio1_MODIS)]
sd_bio1[, row_mean := rowMeans(.SD, na.rm = TRUE)]
sd_bio1<-sd_bio1[,sd(row_mean)]
data2[from=="bio1"&area=="Africa_bis",coef_brut:=(coef/sd_bio1)]

sd_bio12<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][,.(Bio12_WC,Bio12_CHELSA,Bio12_CRU,Bio12_ERA5,Bio12_TC,Bio12_IMERG,Bio12_CHIRPS)]
sd_bio12[, row_mean := rowMeans(.SD, na.rm = TRUE)]
sd_bio12<-sd_bio12[,sd(row_mean)]
data2[from=="bio12"&area=="Africa_bis",coef_brut:=(coef/sd_bio12)]

sd_bio15<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][,.(Bio15_WC,Bio15_CHELSA,Bio15_CRU,Bio15_ERA5,Bio15_TC,Bio15_IMERG,Bio15_CHIRPS)]
sd_bio15[, row_mean := rowMeans(.SD, na.rm = TRUE)]
sd_bio15<-sd_bio15[,sd(row_mean)]
data2[from=="bio15"&area=="Africa_bis",coef_brut:=(coef/sd_bio15)]

sd<-brut[Continent=="Africa",sd(slope)]
data2[from=="slope"&area=="Africa_bis",coef_brut:=(coef/sd)]

sd<-brut[Continent=="Africa",sd(sand)]
data2[from=="sand"&area=="Africa_bis",coef_brut:=(coef/sd)]

sd<-brut[Continent=="Africa",sd(org)]
data2[from=="org"&area=="Africa_bis",coef_brut:=(coef/sd)]

sd<-brut[Continent=="Africa",sd(ph)]
data2[from=="ph"&area=="Africa_bis",coef_brut:=(coef/sd)]

sd<-brut[Continent=="Africa",sd(DBHqm)]
data2[from=="DBHqm"&area=="Africa_bis",coef_brut:=(coef/sd)]

sd<-brut[Continent=="Africa",sd(SD)]
data2[from=="SD"&area=="Africa_bis",coef_brut:=(coef/sd)]

sd<-result[Continent=="Africa",sd(Proportion)]
data2[from=="Proportion"&area=="Africa_bis",coef_brut:=(coef/sd)]
```

```{r }
###################################################################################################################################
###################################################################################################################################
###################################################################################################################################
#Africa
###################################################################################################################################
###################################################################################################################################
###################################################################################################################################


###################################################################################################################################
###################################################################################################################################
##AGB_Feld_pan
###################################################################################################################################
###################################################################################################################################
################################################################################################################################### 
# Harmonisation des noms
edges <- edges_brut[!to=="AGB_Feld_Reg" & !to=="AGB_Feld_Cont"] 
edges[from=="bio1", from := "MAT"]
edges[from=="bio12", from := "TAP"]
edges[from=="bio15", from := "PS"]
edges[from=="ph", from := "pH"]
edges[from=="sand", from := "Sand "]
edges[from=="org", from := "Org. C "]
edges[from=="slope", from := "Slope"]
edges[from=="AGB_Feld_Pan", from := "AGB"]
edges[to=="AGB_Feld_Pan", to := "AGB"]

# Groupes de variables
climatiques    <- c("MAT", "TAP", "PS")
autres_exp     <- c("Org. C ", "pH", "Sand ", "Slope")
explicatives   <- c(climatiques, autres_exp, "Proportion")
structurelles  <- c("WDba", "BA", "SD", "DBHqm")
agb            <- "AGB"

# Initialisation layout
all_nodes <- unique(c(edges$from, edges$to))        
layout_mat <- matrix(NA, nrow = length(all_nodes), ncol = 2)
rownames(layout_mat) <- all_nodes

# Position manuelle
layout_mat["MAT", ]         <- c(0, 2.7)
layout_mat["TAP", ]         <- c(0, 2.5)
layout_mat["PS", ]          <- c(0, 2.3)
layout_mat["Org. C ", ]     <- c(0, 1.9)
layout_mat["pH", ]          <- c(0, 1.7)
layout_mat["Sand ", ]       <- c(0, 1.5)
layout_mat["Slope", ]       <- c(0, 1.3)
layout_mat["Proportion", ]  <- c(0, 1.1)

# Variables structurelles
y_agb <- 1.6
layout_mat["WDba", ]   <- c(1, y_agb + 1.1)
layout_mat["BA", ]     <- c(0.8, y_agb + 0.5)
layout_mat["SD", ]     <- c(1, y_agb - 0.3)
layout_mat["DBHqm", ]  <- c(1.3, y_agb + 0.2)
layout_mat["AGB", ]    <- c(2, 2.1)

# Mise en forme layout
df_layout <- as_tibble(layout_mat, rownames = "name")
colnames(df_layout) <- c("name", "x", "y")

# RMSE / R²
rmse_vals <- c(
  WDba  = rmse_mean_all_all_af[area=="africa" & sub_rep=="WDba", rmse][[1]],
  BA    = rmse_mean_ba_af[area=="africa" & sub_rep=="BA", rmse][[1]],
  SD    = rmse_mean_all_all_af[area=="africa" & sub_rep=="SD", rmse][[1]],
  DBHqm = rmse_mean_dbh_af[area=="africa" & sub_rep=="DBH_qm", rmse][[1]],
  AGB   = rmse_mean_agb_all_af[area=="africa" & sub_rep=="AGB_Feld_Pan", rmse][[1]]
)

rsq_vals <- c(
  WDba  = rmse_mean_all_all_af[area=="africa" & sub_rep=="WDba", rsquared][[1]],
  BA    = rmse_mean_ba_af[area=="africa" & sub_rep=="BA", rsquared][[1]],
  SD    = rmse_mean_all_all_af[area=="africa" & sub_rep=="SD", rsquared][[1]],
  DBHqm = rmse_mean_dbh_af[area=="africa" & sub_rep=="DBH_qm", rsquared][[1]],
  AGB   = rmse_mean_agb_all_af[area=="africa" & sub_rep=="AGB_Feld_Pan", rsquared][[1]]
)

# Graphe
graph <- graph_from_data_frame(edges[!is.na(coef_sd)], directed = TRUE)
E(graph)$weight <- edges[!is.na(coef_sd), coef_sd]
E(graph)$color  <- ifelse(E(graph)$weight > 0, "forestgreen", "firebrick3")

# Positions
df_layout <- df_layout %>%
  filter(name %in% V(graph)$name) %>%
  arrange(match(name, V(graph)$name))

# Étiquettes sur les arêtes
edge_df <- igraph::as_data_frame(graph, what = "edges") %>%
  mutate(
    x = (df_layout$x[match(from, df_layout$name)] + df_layout$x[match(to, df_layout$name)]) / 2,
    y = (df_layout$y[match(from, df_layout$name)] + df_layout$y[match(to, df_layout$name)]) / 2,
    label = round(weight, 2),
    text_color = ifelse(weight > 0, "forestgreen", "firebrick3")
  )

# Épaisseurs
E(graph)$edge_width <- case_when(
  abs(E(graph)$weight) < 0.1   ~ "< 0.1",
  abs(E(graph)$weight) < 0.25  ~ "0.1 ≤ coef < 0.25",
  abs(E(graph)$weight) < 0.5   ~ "0.25 ≤ coef < 0.5",
  abs(E(graph)$weight) < 0.75  ~ "0.5 ≤ coef < 0.75",
  TRUE                         ~ "coef ≥ 0.75"
)

# Labels riches avec ggtext
library(ggtext)
labels_rmse_rsq <- sapply(df_layout$name, function(var) {
  if (var %in% names(rmse_vals)) {
    paste0("<b>", var, "</b><br><span style='font-size:9pt;'>",
           "RMSE = ", round(rmse_vals[[var]], 2), "<br>",
           "R² = ", round(rsq_vals[[var]], 2), "</span>")
  } else if (var %in% explicatives) {
    paste0("<b>", var, "</b>")
  } else {
    var
  }
})

df_layout <- df_layout %>%
  mutate(label = ifelse(name %in% names(labels_rmse_rsq), labels_rmse_rsq[name], name))

# Tracé final
k <- ggraph(graph, layout = "manual", x = df_layout$x, y = df_layout$y) +
  geom_edge_link(aes(color = I(color), width = edge_width),
                 arrow = arrow(length = unit(3, 'mm')),
                 end_cap = circle(13, 'mm'),
                 lineend = "round") +
  shadowtext::geom_shadowtext(
    data = edge_df,
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = label, color = text_color),
    size = 4,
    fontface = "bold",
    bg.colour = "white",
    bg.r = 0.15
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("forestgreen" = "forestgreen", "firebrick3" = "firebrick3"), guide = "none") +
  scale_edge_width_manual(
    values = c("< 0.1" = 0.5, "0.1 ≤ coef < 0.25" = 1, "0.25 ≤ coef < 0.5" = 1.5, "0.5 ≤ coef < 0.75" = 2, "coef ≥ 0.75" = 2.5),
    name = "Standardized coefficient (sd)",
    guide = guide_legend(override.aes = list(color = "grey1"))
  ) +
  geom_node_point(size = 32, shape = 21, fill = "white", color = "grey1", stroke = 1.5) +
  ggtext::geom_richtext(data = df_layout, aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
                        fill = NA, label.color = NA, size = 5, lineheight = 1.1) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(1.1, 2.8)) +
  theme_void() +
  ggtitle("Africa") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 20))

k


##################################################################################################################################
#Pourc
#################################################################################################################################

# Harmonisation des noms
edges <- edges_brut[!to=="AGB_Feld_Reg" & !to=="AGB_Feld_Cont"] 
edges[from=="bio1", from := "MAT"]
edges[from=="bio12", from := "TAP"]
edges[from=="bio15", from := "PS"]
edges[from=="ph", from := "pH"]
edges[from=="sand", from := "Sand "]
edges[from=="org", from := "Org. C "]
edges[from=="slope", from := "Slope"]
edges[from=="AGB_Feld_Pan", from := "AGB"]
edges[to=="AGB_Feld_Pan", to := "AGB"]

# Groupes de variables
climatiques    <- c("MAT", "TAP", "PS")
autres_exp     <- c("Org. C ", "pH", "Sand ", "Slope")
explicatives   <- c(climatiques, autres_exp, "Proportion")
structurelles  <- c("WDba", "BA", "SD", "DBHqm")
agb            <- "AGB"

# Initialisation layout
all_nodes <- unique(c(edges$from, edges$to))        
layout_mat <- matrix(NA, nrow = length(all_nodes), ncol = 2)
rownames(layout_mat) <- all_nodes

# Position manuelle
layout_mat["MAT", ]         <- c(0, 2.7)
layout_mat["TAP", ]         <- c(0, 2.5)
layout_mat["PS", ]          <- c(0, 2.3)
layout_mat["Org. C ", ]     <- c(0, 1.9)
layout_mat["pH", ]          <- c(0, 1.7)
layout_mat["Sand ", ]       <- c(0, 1.5)
layout_mat["Slope", ]       <- c(0, 1.3)
layout_mat["Proportion", ]  <- c(0, 1.1)

# Variables structurelles
y_agb <- 1.6
layout_mat["WDba", ]   <- c(1, y_agb + 1.1)
layout_mat["BA", ]     <- c(0.8, y_agb + 0.5)
layout_mat["SD", ]     <- c(1, y_agb - 0.3)
layout_mat["DBHqm", ]  <- c(1.3, y_agb + 0.2)
layout_mat["AGB", ]    <- c(2, 2.1)

# Mise en forme layout
df_layout <- as_tibble(layout_mat, rownames = "name")
colnames(df_layout) <- c("name", "x", "y")

# RMSE / R²
rmse_vals <- c(
  WDba  = rmse_mean_all_all_af[area=="africa" & sub_rep=="WDba", rmse][[1]],
  BA    = rmse_mean_ba_af[area=="africa" & sub_rep=="BA", rmse][[1]],
  SD    = rmse_mean_all_all_af[area=="africa" & sub_rep=="SD", rmse][[1]],
  DBHqm = rmse_mean_dbh_af[area=="africa" & sub_rep=="DBH_qm", rmse][[1]],
  AGB   = rmse_mean_agb_all_af[area=="africa" & sub_rep=="AGB_Feld_Pan", rmse][[1]]
)

rsq_vals <- c(
  WDba  = rmse_mean_all_all_af[area=="africa" & sub_rep=="WDba", rsquared][[1]],
  BA    = rmse_mean_ba_af[area=="africa" & sub_rep=="BA", rsquared][[1]],
  SD    = rmse_mean_all_all_af[area=="africa" & sub_rep=="SD", rsquared][[1]],
  DBHqm = rmse_mean_dbh_af[area=="africa" & sub_rep=="DBH_qm", rsquared][[1]],
  AGB   = rmse_mean_agb_all_af[area=="africa" & sub_rep=="AGB_Feld_Pan", rsquared][[1]]
)

# Graphe
graph <- graph_from_data_frame(edges %>% filter(!is.na(coef_pourc)), directed = TRUE)
E(graph)$weight <- edges[!is.na(coef_pourc), coef_pourc]
E(graph)$color  <- ifelse(E(graph)$weight > 0, "forestgreen", "firebrick3")

df_layout <- df_layout %>%
  filter(name %in% V(graph)$name) %>%
  arrange(match(name, V(graph)$name))

edge_df <- igraph::as_data_frame(graph, what = "edges") %>%
  mutate(
    x = (df_layout$x[match(from, df_layout$name)] + df_layout$x[match(to, df_layout$name)]) / 2,
    y = (df_layout$y[match(from, df_layout$name)] + df_layout$y[match(to, df_layout$name)]) / 2,
    label = round(weight, 2),
    text_color = ifelse(weight > 0, "forestgreen", "firebrick3")
  )

E(graph)$edge_width <- case_when(
  abs(E(graph)$weight) < 1   ~ "< 1",
  abs(E(graph)$weight) < 5   ~ "1 ≤ coef < 5",
  abs(E(graph)$weight) < 10  ~ "5 ≤ coef < 10",
  abs(E(graph)$weight) < 20  ~ "10 ≤ coef < 20",
  TRUE                       ~ "coef ≥ 20"
)

E(graph)$edge_width <- factor(E(graph)$edge_width,
                              levels = c("< 1", "1 ≤ coef < 5", "5 ≤ coef < 10", "10 ≤ coef < 20", "coef ≥ 20"))

# Labels riches avec ggtext
library(ggtext)
labels_rmse_rsq <- sapply(df_layout$name, function(var) {
  if (var %in% names(rmse_vals)) {
    paste0("<b>", var, "</b><br><span style='font-size:9pt;'>",
           "RMSE = ", round(rmse_vals[[var]], 2), "<br>",
           "R² = ", round(rsq_vals[[var]], 2), "</span>")
  } else if (var %in% explicatives) {
    paste0("<b>", var, "</b>")
  } else {
    var
  }
})

df_layout <- df_layout %>%
  mutate(label = ifelse(name %in% names(labels_rmse_rsq), labels_rmse_rsq[name], name))

# Tracé final
library(ggraph)
library(shadowtext)

l <- ggraph(graph, layout = "manual", x = df_layout$x, y = df_layout$y) +
  geom_edge_link(aes(color = I(color), width = edge_width),
                 arrow = arrow(length = unit(3, 'mm')),
                 end_cap = circle(13, 'mm'),
                 lineend = "round") +
  shadowtext::geom_shadowtext(
    data = edge_df,
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = label, color = text_color),
    size = 4,
    fontface = "bold",
    bg.colour = "white",
    bg.r = 0.15
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("forestgreen" = "forestgreen", "firebrick3" = "firebrick3"), guide = "none") +
  scale_edge_width_manual(
    values = c("< 1" = 0.5, "1 ≤ coef < 5" = 1, "5 ≤ coef < 10" = 1.5, "10 ≤ coef < 20" = 2, "coef ≥ 20" = 2.5),
    name = "Standardized coefficient (%)",
    guide = guide_legend(override.aes = list(color = "grey1"))
  ) +
  geom_node_point(size = 32, shape = 21, fill = "white", color = "grey1", stroke = 1.5) +
  ggtext::geom_richtext(data = df_layout, aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
                        fill = NA, label.color = NA, size = 5, lineheight = 1.1) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(1.1, 2.8)) +
  theme_void() +
  ggtitle("Africa") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 20))

l





```

#####b) avec proportion
```{r }
brut<-fread("C:/Users/u237004/Documents/1_Boulot_SC/2_Papier Pan/Work/MM/7_Modele_AGB_sans_montane/Pantropical_dataset_2023plots_V2_N_55_1_SOIL.csv")
brut<-brut[!elevation.y>=1000]
pion<-fread("C:/Users/u237004/Documents/1_Boulot_SC/2_Papier Pan/Work/MM/7_Modele_AGB_sans_montane/pourc_pionnier_Af.csv")

result <- merge(brut, pion[, .(plot, Proportion)], by.x = "PLT_trois_bis", by.y = "plot", all.x = TRUE)
result[is.na(Proportion)&Continent=="Africa",uniqueN(PLT_trois_bis)]#28 plots ont pas

result<-result[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(Proportion)]
result<-result[!elevation.y>=1000]

mean_ba<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(BA),mean(BA)]
sd_ba<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(BA),sd(BA)]

mean_dbh<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(DBHqm),mean(DBHqm)]
sd_dbh<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(DBHqm),sd(DBHqm)]

mean_sd<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(SD),mean(SD)]
sd_sd<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(SD),sd(SD)]

mean_wd<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(WDba),mean(WDba)]
sd_wd<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(WDba),sd(WDba)]

mean_agb<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Pan),mean(AGB_Feld_Pan)]
sd_agb<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Pan),sd(AGB_Feld_Pan)]

mean_agbcont<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Cont),mean(AGB_Feld_Cont)]
sd_agbcont<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Cont),sd(AGB_Feld_Cont)]

mean_agbreg<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Reg),mean(AGB_Feld_Reg)]
sd_agbreg<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Reg),sd(AGB_Feld_Reg)]

mean_prop<-result[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(Proportion),mean(Proportion)]
sd_prop<-result[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(Proportion),sd(Proportion)]


a<-essais2_af[area=="africa",.(from=var,to=sub_rep,coef=estimate)]
b<-essais3_af[area=="africa",.(from=var,to=sub_rep,coef=estimate)]
c<-essais_af[area=="africa",.(from=var,to=sub_rep,coef=estimate)][to=="WDba"]
d<-essais_af[area=="africa",.(from=var,to=sub_rep,coef=estimate)][to=="SD"]#j'ai toutes els directes vers attributs et entre ttributs
e<-essais4_af[area=="africa",.(from=var,to=sub_rep,coef=estimate)]
f<-essais7_af[area=="africa",.(from=var,to=sub_rep,coef=estimate)][from=="WDba"]
g<-essais8_af[area=="africa",.(from=var,to=sub_rep,coef=estimate)]

edges<-rbind(a,b,c,d,e,f,g)
edges[to=="DBH_qm",to:="DBHqm"]

#je standardise les coefs (en ecart type et en %)
edges[to=="BA",coef_sd:=coef/sd_ba]
edges[to=="BA",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean_ba)*100]

edges[to=="SD",coef_sd:=coef/sd_sd]
edges[to=="SD",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean_sd)*100]

edges[to=="DBHqm",coef_sd:=coef/sd_dbh]
edges[to=="DBHqm",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean_dbh)*100]


edges[to=="WDba",coef_sd:=coef/sd_wd]
edges[to=="WDba",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean_wd)*100]


edges[to=="AGB_Feld_Pan",coef_sd:=coef/sd_agb]
edges[to=="AGB_Feld_Pan",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean_agb)*100]


edges[to=="AGB_Feld_Reg",coef_sd:=coef/sd_agbreg]
edges[to=="AGB_Feld_Reg",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean_agbreg)*100]


edges[to=="AGB_Feld_Cont",coef_sd:=coef/sd_agbcont]
edges[to=="AGB_Feld_Cont",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean_agbcont)*100]

edges[to=="Proportion",coef_sd:=coef/sd_prop]
edges[to=="Proportion",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean_prop)*100]

edges_brut<-edges
edges_brut2<-edges
#data<-edges_brut2[,area:="Africa_bis"]
#data[,coef_brut:=NA]
#data2<-rbind(data2,data)

###coef non stand

sd_bio1<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][,.(Bio1_WC,Bio1_CHELSA,Bio1_CRU,Bio1_ERA5,Bio1_TC,Bio1_MODIS)]
sd_bio1[, row_mean := rowMeans(.SD, na.rm = TRUE)]
sd_bio1<-sd_bio1[,sd(row_mean)]
data2[from=="bio1"&area=="Africa_bis",coef_brut:=(coef/sd_bio1)]

sd_bio12<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][,.(Bio12_WC,Bio12_CHELSA,Bio12_CRU,Bio12_ERA5,Bio12_TC,Bio12_IMERG,Bio12_CHIRPS)]
sd_bio12[, row_mean := rowMeans(.SD, na.rm = TRUE)]
sd_bio12<-sd_bio12[,sd(row_mean)]
data2[from=="bio12"&area=="Africa_bis",coef_brut:=(coef/sd_bio12)]

sd_bio15<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][,.(Bio15_WC,Bio15_CHELSA,Bio15_CRU,Bio15_ERA5,Bio15_TC,Bio15_IMERG,Bio15_CHIRPS)]
sd_bio15[, row_mean := rowMeans(.SD, na.rm = TRUE)]
sd_bio15<-sd_bio15[,sd(row_mean)]
data2[from=="bio15"&area=="Africa_bis",coef_brut:=(coef/sd_bio15)]

sd<-brut[Continent=="Africa",sd(slope)]
data2[from=="slope"&area=="Africa_bis",coef_brut:=(coef/sd)]

sd<-brut[Continent=="Africa",sd(sand)]
data2[from=="sand"&area=="Africa_bis",coef_brut:=(coef/sd)]

sd<-brut[Continent=="Africa",sd(org)]
data2[from=="org"&area=="Africa_bis",coef_brut:=(coef/sd)]

sd<-brut[Continent=="Africa",sd(ph)]
data2[from=="ph"&area=="Africa_bis",coef_brut:=(coef/sd)]

sd<-brut[Continent=="Africa",sd(DBHqm)]
data2[from=="DBHqm"&area=="Africa_bis",coef_brut:=(coef/sd)]

sd<-brut[Continent=="Africa",sd(SD)]
data2[from=="SD"&area=="Africa_bis",coef_brut:=(coef/sd)]

sd<-result[Continent=="Africa",sd(Proportion)]
data2[from=="Proportion"&area=="Africa_bis",coef_brut:=(coef/sd)]
```

```{r }
###################################################################################################################################
###################################################################################################################################
###################################################################################################################################
#Africa
###################################################################################################################################
###################################################################################################################################
###################################################################################################################################

edges <- edges_brut[!to == "AGB_Feld_Reg" & !to == "AGB_Feld_Cont"]

# Harmonisation des noms
edges[from == "bio1", from := "MAT"]
edges[from == "bio12", from := "TAP"]
edges[from == "bio15", from := "PS"]
edges[from == "ph", from := "pH"]
edges[from == "sand", from := "Sand "]
edges[from == "org", from := "Org. C "]
edges[from == "slope", from := "Slope"]
edges[from == "AGB_Feld_Pan", from := "AGB"]
edges[to == "AGB_Feld_Pan", to := "AGB"]

# Groupes de variables
climatiques    <- c("MAT", "TAP", "PS")
autres_exp     <- c("Org. C ", "pH", "Sand ", "Slope")
explicatives   <- c(climatiques, autres_exp, "Proportion")  # <- Proportion ajoutée ici
structurelles  <- c("WDba", "BA", "SD", "DBHqm")
agb            <- "AGB"

# Initialisation layout
all_nodes <- unique(c(edges$from, edges$to))        
layout_mat <- matrix(NA, nrow = length(all_nodes), ncol = 2)
rownames(layout_mat) <- all_nodes

# Position manuelle
layout_mat["MAT", ]        <- c(0, 2.7)
layout_mat["TAP", ]        <- c(0, 2.5)
layout_mat["PS", ]         <- c(0, 2.3)
layout_mat["Proportion", ] <- c(0.4, 1.7)  # <- décalée vers la droite
layout_mat["Org. C ", ]    <- c(0, 1.9)
layout_mat["pH", ]         <- c(0, 1.7)
layout_mat["Sand ", ]      <- c(0, 1.5)
layout_mat["Slope", ]      <- c(0, 1.3)

# Variables structurelles
y_agb <- 1.6
layout_mat["WDba", ]  <- c(1, y_agb + 1.1)
layout_mat["BA",   ]  <- c(0.8, y_agb + 0.5)
layout_mat["SD",   ]  <- c(1, y_agb - 0.3)
layout_mat["DBHqm", ] <- c(1.3, y_agb + 0.2)
layout_mat["AGB", ]   <- c(2, 2.1)

# Mise en forme
df_layout <- as_tibble(layout_mat, rownames = "name")
colnames(df_layout) <- c("name", "x", "y")

# RMSE / R²
rmse_vals <- c(
  WDba  = rmse_mean_all_all_af[area == "africa" & sub_rep == "WDba", rmse][[1]],
  BA    = rmse_mean_ba_af[area == "africa" & sub_rep == "BA", rmse][[1]],
  SD    = rmse_mean_all_all_af[area == "africa" & sub_rep == "SD", rmse][[1]],
  DBHqm = rmse_mean_dbh_af[area == "africa" & sub_rep == "DBH_qm", rmse][[1]],
  AGB   = rmse_mean_agb_all_af[area == "africa" & sub_rep == "AGB_Feld_Pan", rmse][[1]]
)

rsq_vals <- c(
  WDba  = rmse_mean_all_all_af[area == "africa" & sub_rep == "WDba", rsquared][[1]],
  BA    = rmse_mean_ba_af[area == "africa" & sub_rep == "BA", rsquared][[1]],
  SD    = rmse_mean_all_all_af[area == "africa" & sub_rep == "SD", rsquared][[1]],
  DBHqm = rmse_mean_dbh_af[area == "africa" & sub_rep == "DBH_qm", rsquared][[1]],
  AGB   = rmse_mean_agb_all_af[area == "africa" & sub_rep == "AGB_Feld_Pan", rsquared][[1]]
)

# Graphe
edges_plot <- edges %>% filter(!is.na(coef_sd))
graph <- graph_from_data_frame(edges_plot, directed = TRUE)
E(graph)$weight <- edges_plot$coef_sd
E(graph)$color  <- ifelse(E(graph)$weight > 0, "forestgreen", "firebrick3")

df_layout <- df_layout %>%
  filter(name %in% V(graph)$name) %>%
  arrange(match(name, V(graph)$name))

edge_df <- igraph::as_data_frame(graph, what = "edges") %>%
  mutate(
    x = (df_layout$x[match(from, df_layout$name)] + df_layout$x[match(to, df_layout$name)]) / 2,
    y = (df_layout$y[match(from, df_layout$name)] + df_layout$y[match(to, df_layout$name)]) / 2,
    label = round(weight, 2),
    text_color = ifelse(weight > 0, "forestgreen", "firebrick3")
  )

E(graph)$edge_width <- case_when(
  abs(E(graph)$weight) < 0.1   ~ "< 0.1",
  abs(E(graph)$weight) < 0.25  ~ "0.1 ≤ coef < 0.25",
  abs(E(graph)$weight) < 0.5   ~ "0.25 ≤ coef < 0.5",
  abs(E(graph)$weight) < 0.75  ~ "0.5 ≤ coef < 0.75",
  TRUE                         ~ "coef ≥ 0.75"
)

# Labels riches avec ggtext
library(ggtext)
labels_rmse_rsq <- sapply(df_layout$name, function(var) {
  if (var %in% names(rmse_vals)) {
    paste0("<b>", var, "</b><br><span style='font-size:9pt;'>",
           "RMSE = ", round(rmse_vals[[var]], 2), "<br>",
           "R² = ", round(rsq_vals[[var]], 2), "</span>")
  } else if (var %in% explicatives) {
    paste0("<b>", var, "</b>")
  } else {
    var
  }
})

df_layout <- df_layout %>%
  mutate(label = ifelse(name %in% names(labels_rmse_rsq), labels_rmse_rsq[name], name))

# Tracé final
library(ggraph)
library(shadowtext)

m <- ggraph(graph, layout = "manual", x = df_layout$x, y = df_layout$y) +
  geom_edge_link(aes(color = I(color), width = edge_width),
                 arrow = arrow(length = unit(3, 'mm')),
                 end_cap = circle(13, 'mm'),
                 lineend = "round") +
  shadowtext::geom_shadowtext(
    data = edge_df,
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = label, color = text_color),
    size = 4,
    fontface = "bold",
    bg.colour = "white",
    bg.r = 0.15
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("forestgreen" = "forestgreen", "firebrick3" = "firebrick3"), guide = "none") +
  scale_edge_width_manual(
    values = c("< 0.1" = 0.5, "0.1 ≤ coef < 0.25" = 1, "0.25 ≤ coef < 0.5" = 1.5, "0.5 ≤ coef < 0.75" = 2, "coef ≥ 0.75" = 2.5),
    name = "Standardized coefficient (sd)",
    guide = guide_legend(override.aes = list(color = "grey1"))
  ) +
  geom_node_point(size = 32, shape = 21, fill = "white", color = "grey1", stroke = 1.5) +
  ggtext::geom_richtext(data = df_layout, aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
                        fill = NA, label.color = NA, size = 5, lineheight = 1.1) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(1.1, 2.8)) +
  theme_void() +
  ggtitle("Africa") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 20))

m



##################################################################################################################################
#Pourc
#################################################################################################################################

################################################################################################################################### 

edges <- edges_brut[!to == "AGB_Feld_Reg" & !to == "AGB_Feld_Cont"]

# Harmonisation des noms
edges[from == "bio1", from := "MAT"]
edges[from == "bio12", from := "TAP"]
edges[from == "bio15", from := "PS"]
edges[from == "ph", from := "pH"]
edges[from == "sand", from := "Sand "]
edges[from == "org", from := "Org. C "]
edges[from == "slope", from := "Slope"]
edges[from == "AGB_Feld_Pan", from := "AGB"]
edges[to == "AGB_Feld_Pan", to := "AGB"]

# Groupes de variables
climatiques    <- c("MAT", "TAP", "PS")
autres_exp     <- c("Org. C ", "pH", "Sand ", "Slope")
explicatives   <- c(climatiques, autres_exp, "Proportion")
structurelles  <- c("WDba", "BA", "SD", "DBHqm")
agb            <- "AGB"

# Initialisation layout
all_nodes <- unique(c(edges$from, edges$to))        
layout_mat <- matrix(NA, nrow = length(all_nodes), ncol = 2)
rownames(layout_mat) <- all_nodes

# Position manuelle
layout_mat["MAT", ]        <- c(0, 2.7)
layout_mat["TAP", ]        <- c(0, 2.5)
layout_mat["PS", ]         <- c(0, 2.3)
layout_mat["Proportion", ] <- c(0.4, 1.7)
layout_mat["Org. C ", ]    <- c(0, 1.9)
layout_mat["pH", ]         <- c(0, 1.7)
layout_mat["Sand ", ]      <- c(0, 1.5)
layout_mat["Slope", ]      <- c(0, 1.3)

# Variables structurelles
y_agb <- 1.6
layout_mat["WDba", ]  <- c(1, y_agb + 1.1)
layout_mat["BA",   ]  <- c(0.8, y_agb + 0.5)
layout_mat["SD",   ]  <- c(1, y_agb - 0.3)
layout_mat["DBHqm", ] <- c(1.3, y_agb + 0.2)
layout_mat["AGB", ]   <- c(2, 2.1)

# Mise en forme
df_layout <- as_tibble(layout_mat, rownames = "name")
colnames(df_layout) <- c("name", "x", "y")

# RMSE / R²
rmse_vals <- c(
  WDba  = rmse_mean_all_all_af[area == "africa" & sub_rep == "WDba", rmse][[1]],
  BA    = rmse_mean_ba_af[area == "africa" & sub_rep == "BA", rmse][[1]],
  SD    = rmse_mean_all_all_af[area == "africa" & sub_rep == "SD", rmse][[1]],
  DBHqm = rmse_mean_dbh_af[area == "africa" & sub_rep == "DBH_qm", rmse][[1]],
  AGB   = rmse_mean_agb_all_af[area == "africa" & sub_rep == "AGB_Feld_Pan", rmse][[1]]
)

rsq_vals <- c(
  WDba  = rmse_mean_all_all_af[area == "africa" & sub_rep == "WDba", rsquared][[1]],
  BA    = rmse_mean_ba_af[area == "africa" & sub_rep == "BA", rsquared][[1]],
  SD    = rmse_mean_all_all_af[area == "africa" & sub_rep == "SD", rsquared][[1]],
  DBHqm = rmse_mean_dbh_af[area == "africa" & sub_rep == "DBH_qm", rsquared][[1]],
  AGB   = rmse_mean_agb_all_af[area == "africa" & sub_rep == "AGB_Feld_Pan", rsquared][[1]]
)

# 🔄 MODIF pour coef_pourc
edges_plot <- edges %>% filter(!is.na(coef_pourc))
graph <- graph_from_data_frame(edges_plot, directed = TRUE)
E(graph)$weight <- edges_plot$coef_pourc  # 🔄 MODIF
E(graph)$color  <- ifelse(E(graph)$weight > 0, "forestgreen", "firebrick3")

df_layout <- df_layout %>%
  filter(name %in% V(graph)$name) %>%
  arrange(match(name, V(graph)$name))

edge_df <- igraph::as_data_frame(graph, what = "edges") %>%
  mutate(
    x = (df_layout$x[match(from, df_layout$name)] + df_layout$x[match(to, df_layout$name)]) / 2,
    y = (df_layout$y[match(from, df_layout$name)] + df_layout$y[match(to, df_layout$name)]) / 2,
    label = round(weight, 2),
    text_color = ifelse(weight > 0, "forestgreen", "firebrick3")
  )

# 🔄 MODIF pour % : nouvelle classification
E(graph)$edge_width <- case_when(
  abs(E(graph)$weight) < 1    ~ "< 1",
  abs(E(graph)$weight) < 5    ~ "1 ≤ coef < 5",
  abs(E(graph)$weight) < 10   ~ "5 ≤ coef < 10",
  abs(E(graph)$weight) < 20   ~ "10 ≤ coef < 20",
  TRUE                        ~ "coef ≥ 20"
)
E(graph)$edge_width <- factor(E(graph)$edge_width,
                              levels = c("< 1",
                                         "1 ≤ coef < 5",
                                         "5 ≤ coef < 10",
                                         "10 ≤ coef < 20",
                                         "coef ≥ 20"))

# Labels riches avec ggtext
library(ggtext)
labels_rmse_rsq <- sapply(df_layout$name, function(var) {
  if (var %in% names(rmse_vals)) {
    paste0("<b>", var, "</b><br><span style='font-size:9pt;'>",
           "RMSE = ", round(rmse_vals[[var]], 2), "<br>",
           "R² = ", round(rsq_vals[[var]], 2), "</span>")
  } else if (var %in% explicatives) {
    paste0("<b>", var, "</b>")
  } else {
    var
  }
})

df_layout <- df_layout %>%
  mutate(label = ifelse(name %in% names(labels_rmse_rsq), labels_rmse_rsq[name], name))

# Tracé final
library(ggraph)
library(shadowtext)

n <- ggraph(graph, layout = "manual", x = df_layout$x, y = df_layout$y) +
  geom_edge_link(aes(color = I(color), width = edge_width),
                 arrow = arrow(length = unit(3, 'mm')),
                 end_cap = circle(13, 'mm'),
                 lineend = "round") +
  shadowtext::geom_shadowtext(
    data = edge_df,
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = label, color = text_color),
    size = 4,
    fontface = "bold",
    bg.colour = "white",
    bg.r = 0.15
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("forestgreen" = "forestgreen", "firebrick3" = "firebrick3"), guide = "none") +
  scale_edge_width_manual(  # 🔄 MODIF
    values = c("< 1" = 0.5,
               "1 ≤ coef < 5" = 1,
               "5 ≤ coef < 10" = 1.5,
               "10 ≤ coef < 20" = 2,
               "coef ≥ 20" = 2.5),
    name = "Standardized coefficient (%)",  # 🔄 MODIF
    guide = guide_legend(override.aes = list(color = "grey1"))
  ) +
  geom_node_point(size = 32, shape = 21, fill = "white", color = "grey1", stroke = 1.5) +
  ggtext::geom_richtext(data = df_layout, aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
                        fill = NA, label.color = NA, size = 5, lineheight = 1.1) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(1.1, 2.8)) +
  theme_void() +
  ggtitle("Africa") +  # 🔄 MODIF titre
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 20))

n




```

#Le graphique

```{r }
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# --- Exemple de données à adapter à ton propre tableau ---
mydata<-data2[!to=="AGB_Feld_Reg"&!to=="AGB_Feld_Cont"&!from=="Proportion"&!from=="BA"&!from=="DBHqm"&!from=="SD"&!from=="WDba"&!from=="slope"&!from=="sand"&!from=="org"&!from=="ph"&!area=="Africa"]

# --- Créer le tableau avec les relations ---
mydata <- mydata[,.(from, to, area, coef_pourc)]
mydata$from_to <- paste(mydata$from, mydata$to, sep = "_") # ✅ ne pas nommer cette colonne 'relation'

# --- Réordonner selon 'from' d'abord (bio1 → bio12 → bio15), puis 'to'
ordre_from <- c("bio1", "bio12", "bio15")
ordre_to   <- c("WDba", "BA", "DBHqm", "SD", "AGB_Feld_Pan")

mydata <- mydata %>%
  filter(from %in% ordre_from, to %in% ordre_to) %>%
  mutate(
    from = factor(from, levels = ordre_from),
    to   = factor(to, levels = ordre_to),
    from_to = paste(from, to, sep = "_")
  ) %>%
  arrange(from, to)  # ✅ trie d’abord sur 'from', puis sur 'to'

# --- Réordonner l’axe Y
mydata$from_to <- factor(mydata$from_to, levels = rev(unique(mydata$from_to)))

# --- Ordonner les axes si besoin ---
mydata$area <- factor(mydata$area, levels = c("North America","South America", "Africa", "Africa_bis", "Asia", "Oceania"))
mydata$from_to <- factor(mydata$from_to, levels = rev(unique(mydata$from_to)))  # ordre inversé pour affichage vertical


# --- Graphe final ---
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(mydata, aes(x = area, y = from_to)) +
  geom_tile(color = "black", fill = "white", linewidth = 0.3, linetype = "dashed")+
  geom_point(
    aes(
      size = abs(coef_pourc),
      color = coef_pourc > 0  # TRUE = vert, FALSE = rouge
    ),
    alpha = 1  # pleine opacité
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("FALSE" = "firebrick3", "TRUE" = "forestgreen"),
    guide = "none"  # ❌ pas de légende couleur
  ) +
 scale_size_continuous(
  range = c(1, 18),
  name = "(%)",
  breaks = c(0.1, 1, 5, 10, 15, 20,  30),
  limits = c(0, 31)
)+
  scale_x_discrete(position = "top") +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x.top = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 0),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold", color = "black"),
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_blank()
  )

```
#Export DAG direct
```{r }


#Export DAG direct
#ggsave("SEM_Oceania.pdf", plot = one, device = cairo_pdf)
#ggsave("SEM_NA.pdf", plot = three, device = cairo_pdf)
#ggsave("SEM_SA.pdf", plot = five, device = cairo_pdf)
#ggsave("SEM_Asia.pdf", plot = o, device = cairo_pdf)
#ggsave("SEM_Africa.pdf", plot = i, device = cairo_pdf)
#ggsave("SEM_Africacont.pdf", plot = k, device = cairo_pdf)
#ggsave("SEM_Africacont2.pdf", plot = m, device = cairo_pdf)

#ggsave("SEM_Oceania_pourc.pdf", plot = two, device = cairo_pdf)
#ggsave("SEM_NA_pourc.pdf", plot = four, device = cairo_pdf)
#ggsave("SEM_SA_pourc.pdf", plot = q, device = cairo_pdf)
#ggsave("SEM_Asia_pourc.pdf", plot = p, device = cairo_pdf)
#ggsave("SEM_Africa_pourc.pdf", plot = j, device = cairo_pdf)
#ggsave("SEM_Africacont_pourc.pdf", plot = l, device = cairo_pdf)
#ggsave("SEM_Africacont2_pourc.pdf", plot = n, device = cairo_pdf)

```
#Export tables coef direct
```{r }
#fwrite(data2[,.(from,to,area,coef_brut,coef,coef_sd,coef_pourc)],"direct_model_coef.csv")
```


#Camemberts
```{r }
#fwrite(rmse_mean_all_all_bis,"rmse_mean_all_all_bis.csv")
#pour att sur agb
tab1<-mean_coef_wdba[!var=="BA"&!area=="africa"]#enelver ba
tab2<-mean_coef_wdba_af[!var=="BA"]#enelver ba
wdba<-rbind(tab1,tab2)

tab1<-mean_coef_ba[!var=="SD"&!var=="DBHqm"&!area=="africa"]#enlever dbh et sd
tab2<-mean_coef_ba_af[!var=="SD"&!var=="DBHqm"]#
ba<-rbind(tab1,tab2)

tab1<-mean_coef_all_all[sub_rep=="SD"&!area=="africa"]
tab2<-mean_coef_all_all_af[sub_rep=="SD"]
sd<-rbind(tab1,tab2)

tab1<-mean_coef_dbh[!var=="SD"&!area=="africa"]#enlever sd
tab2<-mean_coef_dbh_af[!var=="SD"]
dbh<-rbind(tab1,tab2)

att<-rbind(dbh,sd,wdba,ba)
att[area=="north America",area:="North America"]
att<-att[!var=="ph"&!var=="sand"&!var=="org"&!var=="slope"&!var=="Proportion"]

tab1<-mean_coef_agb_all[!var=="SD"&!var=="DBHqm"&!var=="BA"&!var=="WDba"&!area=="africa"]
tab2<-mean_coef_agb_all_af[!var=="SD"&!var=="DBHqm"&!var=="BA"&!var=="WDba"]
agb<-rbind(tab1,tab2)
agb<-agb[!var=="ph"&!var=="sand"&!var=="org"&!var=="slope"&!var=="Proportion"]
```

```{r }
# Charger les packages nécessaires
library(tidyverse)

library(tidyverse)
# Charger les packages nécessaires
library(tidyverse)

library(tidyverse)

att[area=="Oceania",area:="oceania"]
att<-att[est=="estimate"]
df<-att

# Étape 1 : exclure les contradictions
df_no_contradiction <- df %>%
  mutate(contradiction = has_positive & has_negative) %>%
  filter(!contradiction)

df_contradiction <- df %>%
  mutate(contradiction = has_positive & has_negative) %>%
  filter(contradiction)

# Étape 2 : ajouter la catégorie N = 0
df_no_contradiction <- df_no_contradiction %>%
  mutate(
    N_group = case_when(
      N == 0 ~ "No signficant relationship",
      N < 4 ~ "<4/7 climate datasets",
      N >= 4 ~ "≥4/7 climate datasets"
    )
  )

# Étape 3 : compter les cas par groupe
df_no_contradiction <- df_no_contradiction[ ,.N, by = "N_group"]

# Étape 4 : calculer les pourcentages
df_summary1 <- df_no_contradiction %>%
  mutate(percentage = round(100 * N / sum(60), 1))

# Étape 5 : ligne pour contradiction
df_summary2 <- data.table(
  N_group = "Contradiction",
  N = nrow(df_contradiction)
)
df_summary2[, percentage := round(100 * N / sum(60))]

# Étape 6 : combiner
df_summary <- rbind(df_summary1, df_summary2)

# Étape 7 : camembert
a <- ggplot(df_summary, aes(x = "", y = percentage, fill = N_group)) +
  geom_col(width = 1, color = "white") +
  coord_polar("y") +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(percentage, "%")),
            position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
            color = "black") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "≥4/7 climate datasets" = "darkolivegreen3",
    "<4/7 climate datasets" = "#d3d3d3",
    "Contradiction" = "antiquewhite4",
    "No signficant relationship" = "grey60"
  )) +
  labs(
    title = "A",
    fill = "Agreement between climate datasets \n on the direction of relationships"
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0),
    plot.title.position = "plot"
  )


agb<-agb[est=="estimate"]
df<-agb

# Étape 1 : exclure les contradictions
df_no_contradiction <- df %>%
  mutate(contradiction = has_positive & has_negative) %>%
  filter(!contradiction)

df_contradiction <- df %>%
  mutate(contradiction = has_positive & has_negative) %>%
  filter(contradiction)

# Étape 2 : créer la colonne N_group
df_no_contradiction <- df_no_contradiction %>%
  mutate(N_group = case_when(
    N == 0 ~ "No signficant relationship",
    N < 4 ~ "<4/7 climate datasets",
    TRUE ~ "≥4/7 climate datasets"
  ))

# Étape 3 : compter les cas par groupe
df_no_contradiction <- df_no_contradiction[ ,.N,by="N_group"]

# Étape 4 : calculer les pourcentages
df_summary1 <- df_no_contradiction %>%
  mutate(percentage = round(100 * N / sum(39), 1))

# Étape 5 : ligne pour contradiction
df_summary2 <- data.table(
  N_group = "Contradiction",
  N = nrow(df_contradiction)
)
df_summary2[,percentage:=round(100 * N / sum(39))]

# Étape 6 : combiner
df_summary <- rbind(df_summary1, df_summary2)

# Étape 7 : faire un camembert
b <- ggplot(df_summary, aes(x = "", y = percentage, fill = N_group)) +
  geom_col(width = 1, color = "white") +
  coord_polar("y") +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(percentage, "%")),
            position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
            color = "black") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "≥4/7 climate datasets" = "darkolivegreen3",
    "<4/7 climate datasets" = "#d3d3d3",
    "Contradiction" = "antiquewhite4",
    "No signficant relationship" = "grey60"
  )) +
  labs(
    title = "B",
    fill = "Agreement between climate datasets \n on the direction of relationships"
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0),
    plot.title.position = "plot"
  )

library(gridExtra)

figure<-grid.arrange(a,b,
             nrow =1 )

ggsave("camemberts.png", plot = figure, width = 10, height = 10, dpi = 300)


```
#Importation
```{r }
rm(list=ls()) 

setwd("C:/Users/u237004/Documents/1_Boulot_SC/2_Papier Pan/Work/MM/8_Graph/")
brut<-fread("C:/Users/u237004/Documents/1_Boulot_SC/2_Papier Pan/Work/MM/7_Modele_AGB_sans_montane/Pantropical_dataset_2023plots_V2_N_55_1_SOIL.csv")
brut<-brut[!elevation.y>=1000]
#Libraries
library(data.table) #is used to import and manipulate tables
library(ggplot2)
library(qgraph)
library(igraph)

library(ggraph)
library(tidyverse)
#Tableau,pour tous les continents, toutes les variables réponse, effet total env sur chaque variable réponse (attributs et AGBs)
mean_coef_all_all<-fread("mean_coef_all_all.csv")
rmse_mean_all_all<-fread("rmse_mean_all_all.csv")
rmse_mean_all_all<-rmse_mean_all_all[,.(rmse=mean(rmse),rsquared=mean(r_squared)),by=c("sub_rep","area")]
#je dois encore inverser pour avoir est en colonne, avec meancoef2
essais<-dcast(mean_coef_all_all,sub_rep + area + var~est,value.var="mean_coef2")

#Effet direct Env sur BA
mean_coef_ba<-fread("mean_coef_ba_dbh_sd.csv")
rmse_mean_ba<-fread("rmse_mean_ba_dbh_sd.csv")
rmse_mean_ba<-rmse_mean_ba[,.(rmse=mean(rmse),rsquared=mean(r_squared)),by=c("sub_rep","area")]
#je dois encore inverser pour avoir est en colonne, avec meancoef2
essais2<-dcast(mean_coef_ba,sub_rep + area + var~est,value.var="mean_coef2")

#Effet direct env sur DBHqm
mean_coef_dbh<-fread("mean_coef_dbh_sd.csv")
rmse_mean_dbh<-fread("rmse_mean_dbh_sd.csv")
rmse_mean_dbh<-rmse_mean_dbh[,.(rmse=mean(rmse),rsquared=mean(r_squared)),by=c("sub_rep","area")]
#je dois encore inverser pour avoir est en colonne, avec meancoef2
essais3<-dcast(mean_coef_dbh,sub_rep + area + var~est,value.var="mean_coef2")


#Effet direct env sur DBHqm
mean_coef_wdba<-fread("mean_coef_wdba_ba.csv")
rmse_mean_wdba<-fread("rmse_mean_wdba_ba.csv")
rmse_mean_wdba<-rmse_mean_wdba[,.(rmse=mean(rmse),rsquared=mean(r_squared)),by=c("sub_rep","area")]
#je dois encore inverser pour avoir est en colonne, avec meancoef2
essais2bis<-dcast(mean_coef_wdba,sub_rep + area + var~est,value.var="mean_coef2")

#Effet direct attributs sur AGB
mean_coef_agb<-fread("mean_coef_agb.csv")
rmse_mean_agb<-fread("rmse_mean_agb.csv")
rmse_mean_agb<-rmse_mean_agb[,.(rmse=mean(rmse),rsquared=mean(r_squared)),by=c("sub_rep","area")]
#je dois encore inverser pour avoir est en colonne, avec meancoef2
essais4<-dcast(mean_coef_agb,sub_rep + area + var~est,value.var="mean_coef2")


#Effet direct attributs sur AGB
mean_coef_agb_all<-fread("mean_coef_agb_all.csv")
rmse_mean_agb_all<-fread("rmse_mean_agb_all.csv")
rmse_mean_agb_all<-rmse_mean_agb_all[,.(rmse=mean(rmse),rsquared=mean(r_squared)),by=c("sub_rep","area")]
#je dois encore inverser pour avoir est en colonne, avec meancoef2
essais4bis<-dcast(mean_coef_agb_all,sub_rep + area + var~est,value.var="mean_coef2")

#Effet total attributs sur AGB
mean_coef_agb_sd<-fread("mean_coef_agb_sd.csv")
rmse_mean_agb_sd<-fread("rmse_mean_agb_sd.csv")
rmse_mean_agb_sd<-rmse_mean_agb_sd[,.(rmse=mean(rmse),rsquared=mean(r_squared)),by=c("sub_rep","area")]
#je dois encore inverser pour avoir est en colonne, avec meancoef2
essais5<-dcast(mean_coef_agb_sd,sub_rep + area + var~est,value.var="mean_coef2")

mean_coef_agb_dbh_sd<-fread("mean_coef_agb_dbh_sd.csv")
rmse_mean_agb_dbh_sd<-fread("rmse_mean_agb_dbh_sd.csv")
rmse_mean_agb_dbh_sd<-rmse_mean_agb_dbh_sd[,.(rmse=mean(rmse),rsquared=mean(r_squared)),by=c("sub_rep","area")]
#je dois encore inverser pour avoir est en colonne, avec meancoef2
essais6<-dcast(mean_coef_agb_dbh_sd,sub_rep + area + var~est,value.var="mean_coef2")

mean_coef_agb_wdba<-fread("mean_coef_agb_wdba.csv")
rmse_mean_agb_wdba<-fread("rmse_mean_agb_wdba.csv")
rmse_mean_agb_wdba<-rmse_mean_agb_wdba[,.(rmse=mean(rmse),rsquared=mean(r_squared)),by=c("sub_rep","area")]
#je dois encore inverser pour avoir est en colonne, avec meancoef2
essais7<-dcast(mean_coef_agb_wdba,sub_rep + area + var~est,value.var="mean_coef2")


##Africa avec Proportion####################################################################################################################################################

#Tableau,pour tous les continents, toutes les variables réponse, effet total env sur chaque variable réponse (attributs et AGBs)
mean_coef_all_all_af<-fread("mean_coef_all_all_af.csv")
rmse_mean_all_all_af<-fread("rmse_mean_all_all_af.csv")
rmse_mean_all_all_af<-rmse_mean_all_all_af[,.(rmse=mean(rmse),rsquared=mean(r_squared)),by=c("sub_rep","area")]
#je dois encore inverser pour avoir est en colonne, avec meancoef2
essais_af<-dcast(mean_coef_all_all_af,sub_rep + area + var~est,value.var="mean_coef2")

#Effet direct Env sur BA
mean_coef_ba_af<-fread("mean_coef_ba_dbh_sd_af.csv")
rmse_mean_ba_af<-fread("rmse_mean_ba_dbh_sd_af.csv")
rmse_mean_ba_af<-rmse_mean_ba_af[,.(rmse=mean(rmse),rsquared=mean(r_squared)),by=c("sub_rep","area")]
#je dois encore inverser pour avoir est en colonne, avec meancoef2
essais2_af<-dcast(mean_coef_ba_af,sub_rep + area + var~est,value.var="mean_coef2")

#Effet direct env sur DBHqm
mean_coef_dbh_af<-fread("mean_coef_dbh_sd_af.csv")
rmse_mean_dbh_af<-fread("rmse_mean_dbh_sd_af.csv")
rmse_mean_dbh_af<-rmse_mean_dbh_af[,.(rmse=mean(rmse),rsquared=mean(r_squared)),by=c("sub_rep","area")]
#je dois encore inverser pour avoir est en colonne, avec meancoef2
essais3_af<-dcast(mean_coef_dbh_af,sub_rep + area + var~est,value.var="mean_coef2")


#Effet direct env sur DBHqm
mean_coef_wdba_af<-fread("mean_coef_wdba_ba_af.csv")
rmse_mean_wdba_af<-fread("rmse_mean_wdba_ba_af.csv")
rmse_mean_wdba_af<-rmse_mean_wdba_af[,.(rmse=mean(rmse),rsquared=mean(r_squared)),by=c("sub_rep","area")]
#je dois encore inverser pour avoir est en colonne, avec meancoef2
essais2bis_af<-dcast(mean_coef_wdba_af,sub_rep + area + var~est,value.var="mean_coef2")


#Effet direct attributs sur AGB
mean_coef_agb_af<-fread("mean_coef_agb_af.csv")
rmse_mean_agb_af<-fread("rmse_mean_agb_af.csv")
rmse_mean_agb_af<-rmse_mean_agb_af[,.(rmse=mean(rmse),rsquared=mean(r_squared)),by=c("sub_rep","area")]
#je dois encore inverser pour avoir est en colonne, avec meancoef2
essais4_af<-dcast(mean_coef_agb_af,sub_rep + area + var~est,value.var="mean_coef2")


#Effet direct attributs sur AGB
mean_coef_agb_all_af<-fread("mean_coef_agb_all_af.csv")
rmse_mean_agb_all_af<-fread("rmse_mean_agb_all_af.csv")
rmse_mean_agb_all_af<-rmse_mean_agb_all_af[,.(rmse=mean(rmse),rsquared=mean(r_squared)),by=c("sub_rep","area")]
#je dois encore inverser pour avoir est en colonne, avec meancoef2
essais4bis_af<-dcast(mean_coef_agb_all_af,sub_rep + area + var~est,value.var="mean_coef2")

#Effet total attributs sur AGB
mean_coef_agb_sd_af<-fread("mean_coef_agb_sd_af.csv")
rmse_mean_agb_sd_af<-fread("rmse_mean_agb_sd_af.csv")
rmse_mean_agb_sd_af<-rmse_mean_agb_sd_af[,.(rmse=mean(rmse),rsquared=mean(r_squared)),by=c("sub_rep","area")]
#je dois encore inverser pour avoir est en colonne, avec meancoef2
essais5_af<-dcast(mean_coef_agb_sd_af,sub_rep + area + var~est,value.var="mean_coef2")

mean_coef_agb_dbh_sd_af<-fread("mean_coef_agb_dbh_sd_af.csv")
rmse_mean_agb_dbh_sd_af<-fread("rmse_mean_agb_dbh_sd_af.csv")
rmse_mean_agb_dbh_sd_af<-rmse_mean_agb_dbh_sd_af[,.(rmse=mean(rmse),rsquared=mean(r_squared)),by=c("sub_rep","area")]
#je dois encore inverser pour avoir est en colonne, avec meancoef2
essais6_af<-dcast(mean_coef_agb_dbh_sd_af,sub_rep + area + var~est,value.var="mean_coef2")

mean_coef_agb_wdba_af<-fread("mean_coef_agb_wdba_af.csv")
rmse_mean_agb_wdba_af<-fread("rmse_mean_agb_wdba_af.csv")
rmse_mean_agb_wdba_af<-rmse_mean_agb_wdba_af[,.(rmse=mean(rmse),rsquared=mean(r_squared)),by=c("sub_rep","area")]
#je dois encore inverser pour avoir est en colonne, avec meancoef2
essais7_af<-dcast(mean_coef_agb_wdba_af,sub_rep + area + var~est,value.var="mean_coef2")

mean_coef_agb_prop_af<-fread("mean_coef_agb_prop_af.csv")
rmse_mean_agb_prop_af<-fread("rmse_mean_agb_prop_af.csv")
rmse_mean_agb_prop_af<-rmse_mean_agb_prop_af[,.(rmse=mean(rmse),rsquared=mean(r_squared)),by=c("sub_rep","area")]
#je dois encore inverser pour avoir est en colonne, avec meancoef2
essais8_af<-dcast(mean_coef_agb_prop_af,sub_rep + area + var~est,value.var="mean_coef2")

#############################################################################################################################################################################

essais[,unique(area)]
essais[area=="north America",area:="north_america"]
essais[area=="Oceania",area:="oceania"]

essais2[,unique(area)]
essais2[area=="North America",area:="north_america"]
essais2[area=="Oceania",area:="oceania"]

essais2bis[,unique(area)]
essais2bis[area=="North America",area:="north_america"]
essais2bis[area=="Oceania",area:="oceania"]

essais3[area=="North America",area:="north_america"]
essais3[area=="Oceania",area:="oceania"]


essais4[,unique(area)]
essais4[area=="North America",area:="north_america"]
essais4[area=="Oceania",area:="oceania"]

essais4bis[area=="North America",area:="north_america"]
essais4bis[area=="Oceania",area:="oceania"]

essais5[area=="North America",area:="north_america"]
essais5[area=="Oceania",area:="oceania"]

essais6[area=="Oceania",area:="oceania"]

essais7[area=="North America",area:="north_america"]
essais7[area=="Oceania",area:="oceania"]

rmse_mean_agb_all[area=="North America",area:="north_america"]
rmse_mean_agb_all_af[area=="North America",area:="north_america"]
rmse_mean_agb[area=="North America",area:="north_america"]
rmse_mean_agb_af[area=="North America",area:="north_america"]
rmse_mean_agb_dbh_sd[area=="North America",area:="north_america"]
rmse_mean_agb_dbh_sd_af[area=="North America",area:="north_america"]
rmse_mean_agb_sd[area=="North America",area:="north_america"]
rmse_mean_agb_sd_af[area=="North America",area:="north_america"]
rmse_mean_all_all[area=="north America",area:="north_america"]
rmse_mean_all_all_af[area=="North America",area:="north_america"]
rmse_mean_ba[area=="North America",area:="north_america"]
rmse_mean_ba_af[area=="North America",area:="north_america"]
rmse_mean_dbh[area=="North America",area:="north_america"]
rmse_mean_dbh_af[area=="North America",area:="north_america"]
rmse_mean_wdba[area=="North America",area:="north_america"]
rmse_mean_wdba_af[area=="North America",area:="north_america"]
rmse_mean_agb_wdba[area=="North America",area:="north_america"]
rmse_mean_agb_wdba_af[area=="North America",area:="north_america"]

rmse_mean_agb_all[area=="Oceania",area:="oceania"]
rmse_mean_agb_all_af[area=="Oceania",area:="oceania"]
rmse_mean_agb[area=="Oceania",area:="oceania"]
rmse_mean_agb_af[area=="Oceania",area:="oceania"]
rmse_mean_agb_dbh_sd[area=="Oceania",area:="oceania"]
rmse_mean_agb_dbh_sd_af[area=="Oceania",area:="oceania"]
rmse_mean_agb_sd[area=="Oceania",area:="oceania"]
rmse_mean_agb_sd_af[area=="Oceania",area:="oceania"]
rmse_mean_all_all[area=="Oceania",area:="oceania"]
rmse_mean_all_all_af[area=="Oceania",area:="oceania"]
rmse_mean_ba[area=="Oceania",area:="oceania"]
rmse_mean_ba_af[area=="Oceania",area:="oceania"]
rmse_mean_dbh[area=="Oceania",area:="oceania"]
rmse_mean_dbh_af[area=="Oceania",area:="oceania"]
rmse_mean_wdba[area=="Oceania",area:="oceania"]
rmse_mean_wdba_af[area=="Oceania",area:="oceania"]
rmse_mean_agb_wdba[area=="Oceania",area:="oceania"]
rmse_mean_agb_wdba_af[area=="Oceania",area:="oceania"]

rmse_mean_agb_all_af[,unique(area)]

essais4bis_af[,unique(area)]

essais2[,unique(area)]
essais3[,unique(area)]
essais4[,unique(area)]

essais7[,unique(area)]
essais2bis[,unique(area)]
essais4bis[,unique(area)]
```
