##Tables coef global
```{r }

essais[sub_rep=="DBH_qm",sub_rep:="DBHqm"]
essais5[sub_rep=="DBH_qm",sub_rep:="DBHqm"]
essais6[sub_rep=="DBH_qm",sub_rep:="DBHqm"]
essais7[sub_rep=="DBH_qm",sub_rep:="DBHqm"]

all_env_glob<-essais

a<-essais6[var=="DBHqm"]
b<-essais5[var=="SD"]
c<-essais7[var=="WDba"]
d<-essais4[var=="BA"]

agb_att_glob<-rbind(a,b,c,d)

agb_att_glob<-agb_att_glob[,.(from=var,to=sub_rep,coef=estimate,area)]
all_env_glob<-all_env_glob[,.(from=var,to=sub_rep,coef=estimate,area)]

#Oceania###################################################################################################################

mean<-brut[Continent=="Oceania"][!is.na(BA),mean(BA)]
sd<-brut[Continent=="Oceania"][!is.na(BA),sd(BA)]

all_env_glob[to=="BA"&area=="oceania",coef_sd:=coef/sd]
all_env_glob[to=="BA"&area=="oceania",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean)*100]

agb_att_glob[from=="BA"&area=="oceania",coef_brut:=coef/sd]

mean<-brut[Continent=="Oceania"][!is.na(DBHqm),mean(DBHqm)]
sd<-brut[Continent=="Oceania"][!is.na(DBHqm),sd(DBHqm)]

all_env_glob[to=="DBHqm"&area=="oceania",coef_sd:=coef/sd]
all_env_glob[to=="DBHqm"&area=="oceania",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean)*100]

agb_att_glob[from=="DBHqm"&area=="oceania",coef_brut:=coef/sd]

mean-brut[Continent=="Oceania"][!is.na(SD),mean(SD)]
sd<-brut[Continent=="Oceania"][!is.na(SD),sd(SD)]

all_env_glob[to=="SD"&area=="oceania",coef_sd:=coef/sd]
all_env_glob[to=="SD"&area=="oceania",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean)*100]

agb_att_glob[from=="SD"&area=="oceania",coef_brut:=coef/sd]

mean<-brut[Continent=="Oceania"][!is.na(WDba),mean(WDba)]
sd<-brut[Continent=="Oceania"][!is.na(WDba),sd(WDba)]

all_env_glob[to=="WDba"&area=="oceania",coef_sd:=coef/sd]
all_env_glob[to=="WDba"&area=="oceania",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean)*100]

agb_att_glob[from=="WDba"&area=="oceania",coef_brut:=coef/sd]

mean<-brut[Continent=="Oceania"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Pan),mean(AGB_Feld_Pan)]
sd<-brut[Continent=="Oceania"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Pan),sd(AGB_Feld_Pan)]

all_env_glob[to=="AGB_Feld_Pan"&area=="oceania",coef_sd:=coef/sd]
all_env_glob[to=="AGB_Feld_Pan"&area=="oceania",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean)*100]

agb_att_glob[to=="AGB_Feld_Pan"&area=="oceania",coef_sd:=coef/sd]
agb_att_glob[to=="AGB_Feld_Pan"&area=="oceania",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean)*100]

mean<-brut[Continent=="Oceania"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Cont),mean(AGB_Feld_Cont)]
sd<-brut[Continent=="Oceania"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Cont),sd(AGB_Feld_Cont)]

all_env_glob[to=="AGB_Feld_Cont"&area=="oceania",coef_sd:=coef/sd]
all_env_glob[to=="AGB_Feld_Cont"&area=="oceania",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean)*100]

agb_att_glob[to=="AGB_Feld_Cont"&area=="oceania",coef_sd:=coef/sd]
agb_att_glob[to=="AGB_Feld_Cont"&area=="oceania",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean)*100]

mean<-brut[Continent=="Oceania"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Reg),mean(AGB_Feld_Reg)]
sd<-brut[Continent=="Oceania"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Reg),sd(AGB_Feld_Reg)]

all_env_glob[to=="AGB_Feld_Reg"&area=="oceania",coef_sd:=coef/sd]
all_env_glob[to=="AGB_Feld_Reg"&area=="oceania",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean)*100]

agb_att_glob[to=="AGB_Feld_Reg"&area=="oceania",coef_sd:=coef/sd]
agb_att_glob[to=="AGB_Feld_Reg"&area=="oceania",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean)*100]



sd<-brut[Continent=="Oceania"][,.(Bio1_WC,Bio1_CHELSA,Bio1_CRU,Bio1_ERA5,Bio1_TC,Bio1_MODIS)]
sd[, row_mean := rowMeans(.SD, na.rm = TRUE)]
sd<-sd[,sd(row_mean)]

all_env_glob[from=="bio1"&area=="oceania",coef_brut:=coef/sd]

sd<-brut[Continent=="Oceania"][,.(Bio12_WC,Bio12_CHELSA,Bio12_CRU,Bio12_ERA5,Bio12_TC,Bio12_IMERG,Bio12_CHIRPS)]
sd[, row_mean := rowMeans(.SD, na.rm = TRUE)]
sd<-sd[,sd(row_mean)]

all_env_glob[from=="bio12"&area=="oceania",coef_brut:=coef/sd]

sd<-brut[Continent=="Oceania"][,.(Bio15_WC,Bio15_CHELSA,Bio15_CRU,Bio15_ERA5,Bio15_TC,Bio15_IMERG,Bio15_CHIRPS)]
sd[, row_mean := rowMeans(.SD, na.rm = TRUE)]
sd<-sd[,sd(row_mean)]

all_env_glob[from=="bio15"&area=="oceania",coef_brut:=coef/sd]

sd<-brut[Continent=="Oceania",sd(slope)]

all_env_glob[from=="slope"&area=="oceania",coef_brut:=coef/sd]

sd<-brut[Continent=="Oceania",sd(sand)]

all_env_glob[from=="sand"&area=="oceania",coef_brut:=coef/sd]

sd<-brut[Continent=="Oceania",sd(org)]

all_env_glob[from=="org"&area=="oceania",coef_brut:=coef/sd]

sd<-brut[Continent=="Oceania",sd(ph)]

all_env_glob[from=="ph"&area=="oceania",coef_brut:=coef/sd]


#North America###################################################################################################################

mean<-brut[Continent=="North America"][!is.na(BA),mean(BA)]
sd<-brut[Continent=="North America"][!is.na(BA),sd(BA)]

all_env_glob[to=="BA"&area=="north_america",coef_sd:=coef/sd]
all_env_glob[to=="BA"&area=="north_america",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean)*100]
agb_att_glob[from=="BA"&area=="north_america",coef_brut:=coef/sd]

mean<-brut[Continent=="North America"][!is.na(DBHqm),mean(DBHqm)]
sd<-brut[Continent=="North America"][!is.na(DBHqm),sd(DBHqm)]

all_env_glob[to=="DBHqm"&area=="north_america",coef_sd:=coef/sd]
all_env_glob[to=="DBHqm"&area=="north_america",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean)*100]
agb_att_glob[from=="DBHqm"&area=="north_america",coef_brut:=coef/sd]

mean-brut[Continent=="North America"][!is.na(SD),mean(SD)]
sd<-brut[Continent=="North America"][!is.na(SD),sd(SD)]

all_env_glob[to=="SD"&area=="north_america",coef_sd:=coef/sd]
all_env_glob[to=="SD"&area=="north_america",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean)*100]
agb_att_glob[from=="SD"&area=="north_america",coef_brut:=coef/sd]

mean<-brut[Continent=="North America"][!is.na(WDba),mean(WDba)]
sd<-brut[Continent=="North America"][!is.na(WDba),sd(WDba)]

all_env_glob[to=="WDba"&area=="north_america",coef_sd:=coef/sd]
all_env_glob[to=="WDba"&area=="north_america",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean)*100]
agb_att_glob[from=="WDba"&area=="north_america",coef_brut:=coef/sd]

mean<-brut[Continent=="North America"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Pan),mean(AGB_Feld_Pan)]
sd<-brut[Continent=="North America"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Pan),sd(AGB_Feld_Pan)]

all_env_glob[to=="AGB_Feld_Pan"&area=="north_america",coef_sd:=coef/sd]
all_env_glob[to=="AGB_Feld_Pan"&area=="north_america",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean)*100]
agb_att_glob[to=="AGB_Feld_Pan"&area=="north_america",coef_sd:=coef/sd]
agb_att_glob[to=="AGB_Feld_Pan"&area=="north_america",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean)*100]

mean<-brut[Continent=="North America"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Cont),mean(AGB_Feld_Cont)]
sd<-brut[Continent=="North America"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Cont),sd(AGB_Feld_Cont)]

all_env_glob[to=="AGB_Feld_Cont"&area=="north_america",coef_sd:=coef/sd]
all_env_glob[to=="AGB_Feld_Cont"&area=="north_america",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean)*100]
agb_att_glob[to=="AGB_Feld_Cont"&area=="north_america",coef_sd:=coef/sd]
agb_att_glob[to=="AGB_Feld_Cont"&area=="north_america",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean)*100]

mean<-brut[Continent=="North America"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Reg),mean(AGB_Feld_Reg)]
sd<-brut[Continent=="North America"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Reg),sd(AGB_Feld_Reg)]

all_env_glob[to=="AGB_Feld_Reg"&area=="north_america",coef_sd:=coef/sd]
all_env_glob[to=="AGB_Feld_Reg"&area=="north_america",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean)*100]
agb_att_glob[to=="AGB_Feld_Reg"&area=="north_america",coef_sd:=coef/sd]
agb_att_glob[to=="AGB_Feld_Reg"&area=="north_america",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean)*100]



sd<-brut[Continent=="North America"][,.(Bio1_WC,Bio1_CHELSA,Bio1_CRU,Bio1_ERA5,Bio1_TC,Bio1_MODIS)]
sd[, row_mean := rowMeans(.SD, na.rm = TRUE)]
sd<-sd[,sd(row_mean)]

all_env_glob[from=="bio1"&area=="north_america",coef_brut:=coef/sd]

sd<-brut[Continent=="North America"][,.(Bio12_WC,Bio12_CHELSA,Bio12_CRU,Bio12_ERA5,Bio12_TC,Bio12_IMERG,Bio12_CHIRPS)]
sd[, row_mean := rowMeans(.SD, na.rm = TRUE)]
sd<-sd[,sd(row_mean)]

sd[, row_mean := rowMeans(.SD, na.rm = TRUE)]
sd<-sd[,sd(row_mean)]

all_env_glob[from=="bio15"&area=="north_america",coef_brut:=coef/sd]

sd<-brut[Continent=="North America",sd(slope)]
all_env_glob[from=="slope"&area=="north_america",coef_brut:=coef/sd]

sd<-brut[Continent=="North America",sd(sand)]
all_env_glob[from=="sand"&area=="north_america",coef_brut:=coef/sd]

sd<-brut[Continent=="North America",sd(org)]

sd<-brut[Continent=="North America",sd(ph)]

#South America###################################################################################################################

mean<-brut[Continent=="South America"][!is.na(BA),mean(BA)]
sd<-brut[Continent=="South America"][!is.na(BA),sd(BA)]

all_env_glob[to=="BA"&area=="south_america",coef_sd:=coef/sd]
all_env_glob[to=="BA"&area=="south_america",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean)*100]
agb_att_glob[from=="BA"&area=="south_america",coef_brut:=coef/sd]

mean<-brut[Continent=="South America"][!is.na(DBHqm),mean(DBHqm)]
sd<-brut[Continent=="South America"][!is.na(DBHqm),sd(DBHqm)]

all_env_glob[to=="DBHqm"&area=="south_america",coef_sd:=coef/sd]
all_env_glob[to=="DBHqm"&area=="south_america",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean)*100]
agb_att_glob[from=="DBHqm"&area=="south_america",coef_brut:=coef/sd]

mean-brut[Continent=="South America"][!is.na(SD),mean(SD)]
sd<-brut[Continent=="South America"][!is.na(SD),sd(SD)]

all_env_glob[to=="SD"&area=="south_america",coef_sd:=coef/sd]
all_env_glob[to=="SD"&area=="south_america",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean)*100]
agb_att_glob[from=="SD"&area=="south_america",coef_brut:=coef/sd]

mean<-brut[Continent=="South America"][!is.na(WDba),mean(WDba)]
sd<-brut[Continent=="South America"][!is.na(WDba),sd(WDba)]

all_env_glob[to=="WDba"&area=="south_america",coef_sd:=coef/sd]
all_env_glob[to=="WDba"&area=="south_america",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean)*100]
agb_att_glob[from=="WDba"&area=="south_america",coef_brut:=coef/sd]

sd<-brut[Continent=="South America"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Pan),sd(AGB_Feld_Pan)]

agb_att_glob[to=="AGB_Feld_Pan"&area=="south_america",coef_sd:=coef/sd]
agb_att_glob[to=="AGB_Feld_Pan"&area=="south_america",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean)*100]

sd<-brut[Continent=="South America"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Cont),sd(AGB_Feld_Cont)]

all_env_glob[to=="AGB_Feld_Cont"&area=="south_america",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean)*100]
agb_att_glob[to=="AGB_Feld_Cont"&area=="south_america",coef_sd:=coef/sd]
agb_att_glob[to=="AGB_Feld_Cont"&area=="south_america",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean)*100]

sd<-brut[Continent=="South America"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Reg),sd(AGB_Feld_Reg)]

all_env_glob[to=="AGB_Feld_Reg"&area=="south_america",coef_sd:=coef/sd]
all_env_glob[to=="AGB_Feld_Reg"&area=="south_america",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean)*100]
agb_att_glob[to=="AGB_Feld_Reg"&area=="south_america",coef_sd:=coef/sd]
agb_att_glob[to=="AGB_Feld_Reg"&area=="south_america",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean)*100]



sd<-brut[Continent=="South America"][,.(Bio1_WC,Bio1_CHELSA,Bio1_CRU,Bio1_ERA5,Bio1_TC,Bio1_MODIS)]
sd[, row_mean := rowMeans(.SD, na.rm = TRUE)]
sd<-sd[,sd(row_mean)]

all_env_glob[from=="bio1"&area=="south_america",coef_brut:=coef/sd]

sd<-brut[Continent=="South America"][,.(Bio12_WC,Bio12_CHELSA,Bio12_CRU,Bio12_ERA5,Bio12_TC,Bio12_IMERG,Bio12_CHIRPS)]
sd[, row_mean := rowMeans(.SD, na.rm = TRUE)]
sd<-sd[,sd(row_mean)]

sd[, row_mean := rowMeans(.SD, na.rm = TRUE)]
sd<-sd[,sd(row_mean)]

all_env_glob[from=="bio15"&area=="south_america",coef_brut:=coef/sd]

sd<-brut[Continent=="South America",sd(slope)]
all_env_glob[from=="slope"&area=="south_america",coef_brut:=coef/sd]

sd<-brut[Continent=="South America",sd(sand)]
all_env_glob[from=="sand"&area=="south_america",coef_brut:=coef/sd]

sd<-brut[Continent=="South America",sd(org)]
all_env_glob[from=="org"&area=="south_america",coef_brut:=coef/sd]

sd<-brut[Continent=="South America",sd(ph)]

#Asia###################################################################################################################

mean<-brut[Continent=="Eurasia"][!is.na(BA),mean(BA)]
sd<-brut[Continent=="Eurasia"][!is.na(BA),sd(BA)]

all_env_glob[to=="BA"&area=="asia",coef_sd:=coef/sd]
all_env_glob[to=="BA"&area=="asia",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean)*100]
agb_att_glob[from=="BA"&area=="asia",coef_brut:=coef/sd]

mean<-brut[Continent=="Eurasia"][!is.na(DBHqm),mean(DBHqm)]
sd<-brut[Continent=="Eurasia"][!is.na(DBHqm),sd(DBHqm)]

all_env_glob[to=="DBHqm"&area=="asia",coef_sd:=coef/sd]
all_env_glob[to=="DBHqm"&area=="asia",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean)*100]
agb_att_glob[from=="DBHqm"&area=="asia",coef_brut:=coef/sd]

mean-brut[Continent=="Eurasia"][!is.na(SD),mean(SD)]
sd<-brut[Continent=="Eurasia"][!is.na(SD),sd(SD)]

all_env_glob[to=="SD"&area=="asia",coef_sd:=coef/sd]
all_env_glob[to=="SD"&area=="asia",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean)*100]
agb_att_glob[from=="SD"&area=="asia",coef_brut:=coef/sd]

mean<-brut[Continent=="Eurasia"][!is.na(WDba),mean(WDba)]
sd<-brut[Continent=="Eurasia"][!is.na(WDba),sd(WDba)]

all_env_glob[to=="WDba"&area=="asia",coef_sd:=coef/sd]
all_env_glob[to=="WDba"&area=="asia",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean)*100]
agb_att_glob[from=="WDba"&area=="asia",coef_brut:=coef/sd]

mean<-brut[Continent=="Eurasia"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Pan),mean(AGB_Feld_Pan)]
sd<-brut[Continent=="Eurasia"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Pan),sd(AGB_Feld_Pan)]

all_env_glob[to=="AGB_Feld_Pan"&area=="asia",coef_sd:=coef/sd]
all_env_glob[to=="AGB_Feld_Pan"&area=="asia",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean)*100]
agb_att_glob[to=="AGB_Feld_Pan"&area=="asia",coef_sd:=coef/sd]
agb_att_glob[to=="AGB_Feld_Pan"&area=="asia",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean)*100]

mean<-brut[Continent=="Eurasia"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Cont),mean(AGB_Feld_Cont)]
sd<-brut[Continent=="Eurasia"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Cont),sd(AGB_Feld_Cont)]

all_env_glob[to=="AGB_Feld_Cont"&area=="asia",coef_sd:=coef/sd]
all_env_glob[to=="AGB_Feld_Cont"&area=="asia",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean)*100]
agb_att_glob[to=="AGB_Feld_Cont"&area=="asia",coef_sd:=coef/sd]
agb_att_glob[to=="AGB_Feld_Cont"&area=="asia",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean)*100]

mean<-brut[Continent=="Eurasia"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Reg),mean(AGB_Feld_Reg)]
sd<-brut[Continent=="Eurasia"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Reg),sd(AGB_Feld_Reg)]

all_env_glob[to=="AGB_Feld_Reg"&area=="asia",coef_sd:=coef/sd]
all_env_glob[to=="AGB_Feld_Reg"&area=="asia",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean)*100]
agb_att_glob[to=="AGB_Feld_Reg"&area=="asia",coef_sd:=coef/sd]
agb_att_glob[to=="AGB_Feld_Reg"&area=="asia",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean)*100]



sd<-brut[Continent=="Eurasia"][,.(Bio1_WC,Bio1_CHELSA,Bio1_CRU,Bio1_ERA5,Bio1_TC,Bio1_MODIS)]
sd[, row_mean := rowMeans(.SD, na.rm = TRUE)]
sd<-sd[,sd(row_mean)]

all_env_glob[from=="bio1"&area=="asia",coef_brut:=coef/sd]

sd<-brut[Continent=="Eurasia"][,.(Bio12_WC,Bio12_CHELSA,Bio12_CRU,Bio12_ERA5,Bio12_TC,Bio12_IMERG,Bio12_CHIRPS)]
sd[, row_mean := rowMeans(.SD, na.rm = TRUE)]
sd<-sd[,sd(row_mean)]

all_env_glob[from=="bio12"&area=="asia",coef_brut:=coef/sd]
sd<-brut[Continent=="Eurasia"][,.(Bio15_WC,Bio15_CHELSA,Bio15_CRU,Bio15_ERA5,Bio15_TC,Bio15_IMERG,Bio15_CHIRPS)]
sd[, row_mean := rowMeans(.SD, na.rm = TRUE)]
sd<-sd[,sd(row_mean)]

all_env_glob[from=="bio15"&area=="asia",coef_brut:=coef/sd]

sd<-brut[Continent=="Eurasia",sd(slope)]
all_env_glob[from=="slope"&area=="asia",coef_brut:=coef/sd]

sd<-brut[Continent=="Eurasia",sd(sand)]
all_env_glob[from=="sand"&area=="asia",coef_brut:=coef/sd]

sd<-brut[Continent=="Eurasia",sd(org)]
all_env_glob[from=="org"&area=="asia",coef_brut:=coef/sd]

sd<-brut[Continent=="Eurasia",sd(ph)]
all_env_glob[from=="ph"&area=="asia",coef_brut:=coef/sd]



#Africa###################################################################################################################

mean<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(BA),mean(BA)]
sd<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(BA),sd(BA)]

all_env_glob[to=="BA"&area=="africa",coef_sd:=coef/sd]
all_env_glob[to=="BA"&area=="africa",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean)*100]
agb_att_glob[from=="BA"&area=="africa",coef_brut:=coef/sd]

mean<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(DBHqm),mean(DBHqm)]
sd<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(DBHqm),sd(DBHqm)]

all_env_glob[to=="DBHqm"&area=="africa",coef_sd:=coef/sd]
all_env_glob[to=="DBHqm"&area=="africa",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean)*100]
agb_att_glob[from=="DBHqm"&area=="africa",coef_brut:=coef/sd]

mean-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(SD),mean(SD)]
sd<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(SD),sd(SD)]

all_env_glob[to=="SD"&area=="africa",coef_sd:=coef/sd]
all_env_glob[to=="SD"&area=="africa",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean)*100]
agb_att_glob[from=="SD"&area=="africa",coef_brut:=coef/sd]

mean<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(WDba),mean(WDba)]
sd<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(WDba),sd(WDba)]

all_env_glob[to=="WDba"&area=="africa",coef_sd:=coef/sd]
all_env_glob[to=="WDba"&area=="africa",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean)*100]
agb_att_glob[from=="WDba"&area=="africa",coef_brut:=coef/sd]

mean<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Pan),mean(AGB_Feld_Pan)]
sd<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Pan),sd(AGB_Feld_Pan)]

all_env_glob[to=="AGB_Feld_Pan"&area=="africa",coef_sd:=coef/sd]
all_env_glob[to=="AGB_Feld_Pan"&area=="africa",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean)*100]
agb_att_glob[to=="AGB_Feld_Pan"&area=="africa",coef_sd:=coef/sd]
agb_att_glob[to=="AGB_Feld_Pan"&area=="africa",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean)*100]

mean<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Cont),mean(AGB_Feld_Cont)]
sd<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Cont),sd(AGB_Feld_Cont)]

all_env_glob[to=="AGB_Feld_Cont"&area=="africa",coef_sd:=coef/sd]
all_env_glob[to=="AGB_Feld_Cont"&area=="africa",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean)*100]
agb_att_glob[to=="AGB_Feld_Cont"&area=="africa",coef_sd:=coef/sd]
agb_att_glob[to=="AGB_Feld_Cont"&area=="africa",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean)*100]

mean<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Reg),mean(AGB_Feld_Reg)]
sd<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Reg),sd(AGB_Feld_Reg)]

all_env_glob[to=="AGB_Feld_Reg"&area=="africa",coef_sd:=coef/sd]
all_env_glob[to=="AGB_Feld_Reg"&area=="africa",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean)*100]
agb_att_glob[to=="AGB_Feld_Reg"&area=="africa",coef_sd:=coef/sd]
agb_att_glob[to=="AGB_Feld_Reg"&area=="africa",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean)*100]



sd<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][,.(Bio1_WC,Bio1_CHELSA,Bio1_CRU,Bio1_ERA5,Bio1_TC,Bio1_MODIS)]
sd[, row_mean := rowMeans(.SD, na.rm = TRUE)]
sd<-sd[,sd(row_mean)]

all_env_glob[from=="bio1"&area=="africa",coef_brut:=coef/sd]

sd<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][,.(Bio12_WC,Bio12_CHELSA,Bio12_CRU,Bio12_ERA5,Bio12_TC,Bio12_IMERG,Bio12_CHIRPS)]
sd[, row_mean := rowMeans(.SD, na.rm = TRUE)]
sd<-sd[,sd(row_mean)]

all_env_glob[from=="bio12"&area=="africa",coef_brut:=coef/sd]

sd<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][,.(Bio15_WC,Bio15_CHELSA,Bio15_CRU,Bio15_ERA5,Bio15_TC,Bio15_IMERG,Bio15_CHIRPS)]
sd[, row_mean := rowMeans(.SD, na.rm = TRUE)]
sd<-sd[,sd(row_mean)]

all_env_glob[from=="bio15"&area=="africa",coef_brut:=coef/sd]

sd<-brut[Continent=="Africa",sd(slope)]
all_env_glob[from=="slope"&area=="africa",coef_brut:=coef/sd]

sd<-brut[Continent=="Africa",sd(sand)]
all_env_glob[from=="sand"&area=="africa",coef_brut:=coef/sd]

sd<-brut[Continent=="Africa",sd(org)]
all_env_glob[from=="org"&area=="africa",coef_brut:=coef/sd]

sd<-brut[Continent=="Africa",sd(ph)]
all_env_glob[from=="ph"&area=="africa",coef_brut:=coef/sd]



#Africa controlée###################################################################################################################

pion<-fread("C:/Users/u237004/Documents/1_Boulot_SC/2_Papier Pan/Work/MM/7_Modele_AGB_sans_montane/pourc_pionnier_Af.csv")

result <- merge(brut, pion[, .(plot, Proportion)], by.x = "PLT_trois_bis", by.y = "plot", all.x = TRUE)
result[is.na(Proportion)&Continent=="Africa",uniqueN(PLT_trois_bis)]#28 plots ont pas

result<-result[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(Proportion)]
result<-result[!elevation.y>=1000]

essais_af[sub_rep=="DBH_qm",sub_rep:="DBHqm"]
essais5_af[sub_rep=="DBH_qm",sub_rep:="DBHqm"]
essais6_af[sub_rep=="DBH_qm",sub_rep:="DBHqm"]
essais7_af[sub_rep=="DBH_qm",sub_rep:="DBHqm"]

all_env_glob_af<-essais_af

a<-essais6_af[var=="DBHqm"]
b<-essais5_af[var=="SD"]
c<-essais7_af[var=="WDba"]
d<-essais4_af[var=="BA"]

agb_att_glob_af<-rbind(a,b,c,d)

agb_att_glob_af<-agb_att_glob_af[,.(from=var,to=sub_rep,coef=estimate,area)]
all_env_glob_af<-all_env_glob_af[,.(from=var,to=sub_rep,coef=estimate,area)]


###################################################################################################################
mean<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(BA),mean(BA)]
sd<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(BA),sd(BA)]

all_env_glob_af[to=="BA"&area=="africa",coef_sd:=coef/sd]
all_env_glob_af[to=="BA"&area=="africa",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean)*100]
agb_att_glob_af[from=="BA"&area=="africa",coef_brut:=coef/sd]

mean<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(DBHqm),mean(DBHqm)]
sd<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(DBHqm),sd(DBHqm)]

all_env_glob_af[to=="DBHqm"&area=="africa",coef_sd:=coef/sd]
all_env_glob_af[to=="DBHqm"&area=="africa",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean)*100]
agb_att_glob_af[from=="DBHqm"&area=="africa",coef_brut:=coef/sd]

mean-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(SD),mean(SD)]
sd<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(SD),sd(SD)]

all_env_glob_af[to=="SD"&area=="africa",coef_sd:=coef/sd]
all_env_glob_af[to=="SD"&area=="africa",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean)*100]
agb_att_glob_af[from=="SD"&area=="africa",coef_brut:=coef/sd]

mean<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(WDba),mean(WDba)]
sd<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(WDba),sd(WDba)]

all_env_glob_af[to=="WDba"&area=="africa",coef_sd:=coef/sd]
all_env_glob_af[to=="WDba"&area=="africa",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean)*100]
agb_att_glob_af[from=="WDba"&area=="africa",coef_brut:=coef/sd]

mean<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Pan),mean(AGB_Feld_Pan)]
sd<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Pan),sd(AGB_Feld_Pan)]


mean_prop<-result[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(Proportion),mean(Proportion)]
sd_prop<-result[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(Proportion),sd(Proportion)]


all_env_glob_af[to=="AGB_Feld_Pan"&area=="africa",coef_sd:=coef/sd]
all_env_glob_af[to=="AGB_Feld_Pan"&area=="africa",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean)*100]
agb_att_glob_af[to=="AGB_Feld_Pan"&area=="africa",coef_sd:=coef/sd]
agb_att_glob_af[to=="AGB_Feld_Pan"&area=="africa",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean)*100]

mean<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Cont),mean(AGB_Feld_Cont)]
sd<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Cont),sd(AGB_Feld_Cont)]

all_env_glob_af[to=="AGB_Feld_Cont"&area=="africa",coef_sd:=coef/sd]
all_env_glob_af[to=="AGB_Feld_Cont"&area=="africa",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean)*100]
agb_att_glob_af[to=="AGB_Feld_Cont"&area=="africa",coef_sd:=coef/sd]
agb_att_glob_af[to=="AGB_Feld_Cont"&area=="africa",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean)*100]

mean<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Reg),mean(AGB_Feld_Reg)]
sd<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][!is.na(AGB_Feld_Reg),sd(AGB_Feld_Reg)]

all_env_glob_af[to=="AGB_Feld_Reg"&area=="africa",coef_sd:=coef/sd]
all_env_glob_af[to=="AGB_Feld_Reg"&area=="africa",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean)*100]
agb_att_glob_af[to=="AGB_Feld_Reg"&area=="africa",coef_sd:=coef/sd]
agb_att_glob_af[to=="AGB_Feld_Reg"&area=="africa",coef_pourc:=(coef/mean)*100]



sd<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][,.(Bio1_WC,Bio1_CHELSA,Bio1_CRU,Bio1_ERA5,Bio1_TC,Bio1_MODIS)]
sd[, row_mean := rowMeans(.SD, na.rm = TRUE)]
sd<-sd[,sd(row_mean)]

all_env_glob_af[from=="bio1"&area=="africa",coef_brut:=coef/sd]

sd<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][,.(Bio12_WC,Bio12_CHELSA,Bio12_CRU,Bio12_ERA5,Bio12_TC,Bio12_IMERG,Bio12_CHIRPS)]
sd[, row_mean := rowMeans(.SD, na.rm = TRUE)]
sd<-sd[,sd(row_mean)]

all_env_glob_af[from=="bio12"&area=="africa",coef_brut:=coef/sd]

sd<-brut[Continent=="Africa"][,.(Bio15_WC,Bio15_CHELSA,Bio15_CRU,Bio15_ERA5,Bio15_TC,Bio15_IMERG,Bio15_CHIRPS)]
sd[, row_mean := rowMeans(.SD, na.rm = TRUE)]
sd<-sd[,sd(row_mean)]

all_env_glob_af[from=="bio15"&area=="africa",coef_brut:=coef/sd]

sd<-brut[Continent=="Africa",sd(slope)]
all_env_glob_af[from=="slope"&area=="africa",coef_brut:=coef/sd]

sd<-brut[Continent=="Africa",sd(sand)]
all_env_glob_af[from=="sand"&area=="africa",coef_brut:=coef/sd]

sd<-brut[Continent=="Africa",sd(org)]
all_env_glob_af[from=="org"&area=="africa",coef_brut:=coef/sd]

sd<-brut[Continent=="Africa",sd(ph)]
all_env_glob_af[from=="ph"&area=="africa",coef_brut:=coef/sd]


sd<-result[Continent=="Africa",sd(Proportion)]
all_env_glob_af[from=="Proportion"&area=="africa",coef_brut:=coef/sd]


```

#Export table coef global
```{r }

agb_att_glob<-rbind(agb_att_glob,agb_att_glob_af[,area:="africa_cont"])
#fwrite(agb_att_glob[,.(from,to,area,coef_brut,coef,coef_sd,coef_pourc)],"agb_att_glob.csv")

#juste garder agb!!
all_env_glob<-rbind(all_env_glob,all_env_glob_af[,area:="africa_cont"])
all_env_glob_bis<-all_env_glob[!to=="BA"&!to=="WDba"&!to=="DBHqm"&!to=="SD"]
#fwrite(all_env_glob[,.(from,to,area,coef_brut,coef,coef_sd,coef_pourc)],"all_env_glob.csv")

```


#Table RMSE des global : att sur AGB et env sur agb
```{r }

#pour env  sur agb (et sur att)
rmse_mean_all_all
rmse_mean_all_all_af
rmse_mean_all_all<-rbind(rmse_mean_all_all,rmse_mean_all_all_af[,area:="africa_cont"])
rmse_mean_all_all_bis<-rmse_mean_all_all[!sub_rep=="BA"&!sub_rep=="WDba"&!sub_rep=="DBH_qm"&!sub_rep=="SD"]
```
